en.tldr: This paper establishes a quantitative weak unique continuation theorem on an annular domain for a backward degenerate parabolic equation with a degenerate interior point.
en.motivation: To study the weak unique continuation property of degenerate parabolic equations on annular domains, providing a theoretical foundation for related inverse problems.
en.method: Approximate the degenerate parabolic equation by non-degenerate ones, establish Carleman estimates on two separate domains, and then derive the quantitative weak unique continuation.
en.result: Proved the weak unique continuation property for the degenerate parabolic equation.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand uniqueness conditions for solutions of degenerate parabolic equations, useful in inverse problems or control theory.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming a degenerate problem into a non-degenerate one before establishing estimates is a general analytical strategy.
idea_spark.risk: The approximation process may introduce errors that need careful control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to nonlinear degenerate equations or higher-dimensional annular domains.

papers.title: Pair2Score: Pairwise-to-Absolute Transfer for LLM-Based Essay Scoring
papers.summary: Many scoring applications require absolute predictions, while pairwise comparisons can provide a simpler learning objective. We present Pair2Score, a two-stage learning framework that transfers pairwise comparisons into absolute scoring with parameter-efficient LLaMA adaptation. Stage 1 trains a directional Siamese ranker on pairwise comparisons derived from absolute trait labels; Stage 2 trains an absolute predictor using configurable transfer strategies (warm-start and embedding-fusion variants). We evaluate on rubric-aligned Automated Essay Scoring (AES) traits (grammar, vocabulary, syntax) under a five-fold protocol that co-rotates held-out fold and random seed. At the trait level, the best-performing transfer variant improves quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) over an absolute-only baseline for all three traits. However, not all transfer configurations help: a one-epoch pairwise stage transfers more reliably than extended pairwise training, and transfer configuration -- not just the inclusion of a pairwise stage -- determines whether downstream scoring benefits.

ai.tldr: 提出Pair2Score框架，通过两阶段学习将成对比较转化为绝对评分，在LLaMA上实现参数高效适配，在语法、词汇、句法三个维度上提升评分一致性。
ai.motivation: 许多评分任务需要绝对预测，而成对比较的学习目标更简单，但如何有效将成对比较知识迁移到绝对评分中仍是一个挑战。
ai.method: 第一阶段训练方向性孪生排序器，从绝对标签派生成对比较；第二阶段采用可配置的迁移策略（热启动和嵌入融合变体）训练绝对预测器。
ai.result: 最佳迁移变体在所有三个特质上均优于仅绝对评分的基线，但并非所有迁移配置都有效：单轮成对阶段比多轮训练更可靠，迁移配置本身决定下游收益。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要绝对评分的应用（如作文评分）提供了一种利用成对比较简化学习、提升评分准确性的实用框架。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将成对比较与绝对评分结合的其他迁移策略，如对比学习或知识蒸馏。
idea_spark.risk: 迁移配置敏感，不恰当的设置可能导致性能下降，需要仔细调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 成对比较的简单性可降低模型学习难度，但如何设计稳健的迁移机制是关键。

en.tldr: Proposes Pair2Score, a two-stage learning framework that transfers pairwise comparisons into absolute scoring with parameter-efficient LLaMA adaptation, improving scoring consistency on grammar, vocabulary, and syntax traits.
en.motivation: Many scoring tasks require absolute predictions, but pairwise comparisons offer a simpler learning objective; effectively transferring pairwise knowledge to absolute scoring remains a challenge.
en.method: Stage 1 trains a directional Siamese ranker on pairwise comparisons derived from absolute labels; Stage 2 trains an absolute predictor using configurable transfer strategies (warm-start and embedding-fusion variants).
en.result: The best transfer variant improves QWK over an absolute-only baseline on all three traits, but not all configurations help: one-epoch pairwise training transfers more reliably than extended training, and transfer configuration determines downstream benefit.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical framework for applications requiring absolute scoring (e.g., essay scoring) by leveraging pairwise comparisons to simplify learning and improve accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Explore other transfer strategies combining pairwise and absolute scoring, such as contrastive learning or knowledge distillation.
idea_spark.risk: Transfer configuration is sensitive; improper settings may degrade performance, requiring careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: The simplicity of pairwise comparisons can reduce learning difficulty, but designing robust transfer mechanisms is key.

papers.title: On Spectral multiplier theorem for sub-Laplacians with drift on Métivier groups
papers.summary: In this paper, we prove a spectral multiplier theorem for sub-Laplacians with drift on Métivier groups. We improve the result of [Martini, Ottazzi and Vallarino, Rev. Mat. Iberoam, 2019] in case of Métivier groups, by reducing the required smoothness condition on the multiplier function from homogeneous dimension to the topological dimension of the underlying group.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了Métivier群上带漂移子拉普拉斯算子的谱乘子定理，将乘子函数所需光滑性条件从齐次维数降低到拓扑维数。
ai.motivation: 改进Martini等人2019年关于Métivier群上带漂移子拉普拉斯算子谱乘子定理的结果，降低所需光滑性条件。
ai.method: 通过分析Métivier群的结构性质，利用谱乘子理论中的标准技术，将光滑性要求从齐次维数降至拓扑维数。
ai.result: 成功降低了乘子函数所需的光滑性条件，得到了更优的谱乘子定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解Métivier群上带漂移子拉普拉斯算子的谱乘子性质提供了更精确的理论结果。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将光滑性条件从齐次维数降至拓扑维数的一般性框架。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能依赖于Métivier群的特殊结构，推广到一般群时可能遇到困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用群的结构性质优化谱乘子定理的光滑性条件，启发类似问题的研究。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用群的结构性质优化谱乘子定理的光滑性条件，启发类似问题的研究。

en.tldr: This paper proves a spectral multiplier theorem for sub-Laplacians with drift on Métivier groups, reducing the required smoothness condition from homogeneous dimension to topological dimension.
en.motivation: To improve the result of Martini et al. (2019) for Métivier groups by lowering the smoothness condition on the multiplier function.
en.method: By analyzing the structural properties of Métivier groups and applying standard techniques in spectral multiplier theory, the smoothness requirement is reduced from homogeneous dimension to topological dimension.
en.result: Successfully reduced the required smoothness condition, yielding a sharper spectral multiplier theorem.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more precise theoretical result on spectral multipliers for sub-Laplacians with drift on Métivier groups.

idea_spark.idea: Explore a general framework for reducing smoothness conditions from homogeneous dimension to topological dimension.
idea_spark.risk: The approach may rely on the special structure of Métivier groups and could face difficulties when generalized to arbitrary groups.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging group structure to optimize smoothness conditions in spectral multiplier theorems inspires similar investigations.

papers.title: Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey
papers.summary: Graph Neural Networks are powerful models for learning from graph-structured data, yet their effectiveness is often limited by two critical challenges: over-squashing, where information from distant nodes is excessively compressed, and over-smoothing, where repeated propagation makes node representations indistinguishable. Both phenomena stem from the interaction between message passing and the input topology, ultimately degrading information flow and limiting the performance of GNNs. In this survey, we examine graph rewiring techniques, a class of methods designed to modify the graph topology to enhance information propagation in GNNs. We provide a comprehensive review of state-of-the-art rewiring approaches, delving into their theoretical underpinnings, practical implementations, and performance trade-offs.

ai.tldr: 综述图神经网络中通过图重连缓解过压缩和过平滑问题的技术。
ai.motivation: 图神经网络受限于过压缩（远距离节点信息过度压缩）和过平滑（重复传播使节点表示不可区分），两者均源于消息传递与输入拓扑的交互，损害信息流和模型性能。
ai.method: 系统回顾图重连方法，分析其理论原理、实现方式及性能权衡。
ai.result: 总结了当前最先进的重连技术，揭示了不同方法在缓解过压缩和过平滑方面的效果与局限。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解图重连如何改善GNN信息传播，并为选择或设计重连策略提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应重连策略，根据任务动态调整图结构以平衡信息压缩与平滑。
idea_spark.risk: 过度重连可能破坏原始图的结构语义，导致信息丢失或过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物神经网络可塑性启发，探索基于学习或进化规则的自组织图重连机制。

en.tldr: A survey of graph rewiring techniques in GNNs to mitigate over-squashing and over-smoothing.
en.motivation: GNNs suffer from over-squashing (excessive compression of distant node information) and over-smoothing (indistinguishable node representations due to repeated propagation), both stemming from the interaction between message passing and input topology, degrading information flow and performance.
en.method: Comprehensively reviews graph rewiring methods, analyzing their theoretical foundations, practical implementations, and performance trade-offs.
en.result: Summarizes state-of-the-art rewiring approaches, revealing their effectiveness and limitations in alleviating over-squashing and over-smoothing.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how graph rewiring improves information propagation in GNNs and provides guidance for selecting or designing rewiring strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Design adaptive rewiring strategies that dynamically adjust graph structure based on tasks to balance information compression and smoothing.
idea_spark.risk: Excessive rewiring may destroy the original graph's structural semantics, leading to information loss or overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological neural plasticity, explore self-organizing graph rewiring mechanisms based on learning or evolutionary rules.

papers.title: Topological Neural Tangent Kernel
papers.summary: Graph neural tangent kernels give a principled infinite-width theory for graph neural networks, but inherit a basic limitation of graph models: they see only pairwise structure. Many relational systems contain higher-order interactions that are more naturally represented by simplicial complexes. We introduce the Topological Neural Tangent Kernel (TopoNTK), an infinite-width kernel for simplicial message passing on edge features. TopoNTK combines lower Hodge interactions, capturing graph-like coupling through shared vertices, with upper Hodge interactions, capturing coupling through filled simplices. This makes the kernel sensitive to topology invisible to graph kernels, allowing complexes with the same graph but different filled simplices to induce different kernels. Beyond expressivity, the Hodge structure gives the kernel an interpretable learning geometry. Edge signals decompose into gradient-like, harmonic, and local circulation components, and the spectrum of the TopoNTK determines how quickly each component is learned. This yields a topological form of spectral bias: components aligned with large-eigenvalue modes are learned quickly, while global harmonic modes, retained through the residual channel, often lie at smaller eigenvalues and are learned more slowly. We prove expressivity, Hodge-alignment, spectral learning, and stability properties, and validate them on synthetic simplicial tasks and DBLP higher-order link prediction. The results show that topology is not merely extra structure; it can provide coordinates that make relational learning more faithful, interpretable, and effective.

ai.tldr: 提出拓扑神经正切核（TopoNTK），将无限宽核理论扩展到单纯复形上的边特征消息传递，通过Hodge上下交互捕捉图核无法感知的拓扑结构，并揭示拓扑形式的谱偏差。
ai.motivation: 图神经正切核仅处理成对结构，无法建模高阶交互；单纯复形能自然表示高阶关系，但缺乏对应的无限宽核理论。
ai.method: 定义TopoNTK，结合下Hodge交互（共享顶点耦合）和上Hodge交互（填充单纯形耦合），利用Hodge分解将边信号分解为梯度、调和与局部环流分量，并分析核谱对学习速度的影响。
ai.result: 在合成单纯形任务和DBLP高阶链接预测上验证了表达性、Hodge对齐、谱学习与稳定性；拓扑结构使学习更忠实、可解释且有效。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理高阶交互的图学习任务提供理论驱动的核方法，可解释不同拓扑模式的学习速度差异。

idea_spark.idea: 利用TopoNTK的谱信息设计自适应学习率或正则化策略，加速调和分量的学习。
idea_spark.risk: 单纯复形构建可能引入额外计算开销，且实际数据中高阶结构稀疏时核性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 拓扑坐标可作为关系学习的归纳偏置，启发更通用的拓扑感知核方法。

en.tldr: Proposes the Topological Neural Tangent Kernel (TopoNTK), extending infinite-width kernel theory to simplicial message passing on edge features, capturing topology invisible to graph kernels via Hodge interactions and revealing a topological form of spectral bias.
en.motivation: Graph neural tangent kernels only handle pairwise structure and cannot model higher-order interactions; simplicial complexes naturally represent such interactions but lack a corresponding infinite-width kernel theory.
en.method: Defines TopoNTK combining lower and upper Hodge interactions, decomposes edge signals into gradient, harmonic, and local circulation components via Hodge decomposition, and analyzes how the kernel spectrum governs learning speed.
en.result: Validates expressivity, Hodge alignment, spectral learning, and stability on synthetic simplicial tasks and DBLP higher-order link prediction; topology provides coordinates that make relational learning more faithful, interpretable, and effective.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded kernel method for graph learning with higher-order interactions, explaining learning speed differences across topological modes.

idea_spark.idea: Use TopoNTK's spectrum to design adaptive learning rates or regularization that accelerate learning of harmonic components.
idea_spark.risk: Constructing simplicial complexes may incur extra computational cost, and kernel performance may degrade when higher-order structure is sparse in real data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Topological coordinates can serve as an inductive bias for relational learning, inspiring more general topology-aware kernel methods.

papers.title: Generative Modeling with Orbit-Space Particle Flow Matching
papers.summary: We present Orbit-Space Geometric Probability Paths (OGPP), a particle-native flow-matching framework for generative modeling of particle systems. OGPP is motivated by two insights: (i) particles are defined up to permutation symmetries, so anonymous indexing inflates per-index target variance and yields curved, hard-to-learn flows; and (ii) particles live in physical space, so the flow terminal velocity has physical meaning and can encode geometric attributes, e.g., surface normals. OGPP instantiates three key components: (1) orbit-space canonicalization of the probability-path terminal endpoint, (2) particle index embeddings for role specialization, and (3) geometric probability paths with arc-length-aware terminal velocities that generate normals as a byproduct of the flow. We evaluate OGPP on minimal-surface benchmarks, where it reduces metric error by up to two orders of magnitude in a single inference step; on ShapeNet, where it matches the state of the art with 5x fewer steps and reaches airplane EMD comparable to DiT-3D with 26x fewer parameters and 5x fewer steps; and on single-shape encoding, where it produces normals and reconstructions competitive with 6D generators while operating entirely in 3D.

ai.tldr: 提出轨道空间几何概率路径（OGPP），一种粒子本征的流匹配框架，用于粒子系统的生成建模。
ai.motivation: 粒子具有置换对称性，匿名索引会增大目标方差并产生弯曲难学的流；粒子在物理空间中运动，终端速度具有物理意义并可编码几何属性。
ai.method: OGPP包含三个关键组件：轨道空间概率路径终端端点规范化、粒子索引嵌入实现角色专业化、以及弧长感知的几何概率路径，其终端速度可生成法线作为副产品。
ai.result: 在最小曲面基准上单步推理误差降低两个数量级；在ShapeNet上以5倍更少步骤达到SOTA，在飞机EMD上以26倍更少参数和5倍更少步骤媲美DiT-3D；在单形状编码中，完全在3D空间内生成的法线和重建结果与6D生成器竞争。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、物理可解释的粒子系统生成方法，尤其适用于需要法线等几何属性的3D形状生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流终端速度的物理意义，将法线生成作为副产品，避免额外网络或后处理。
idea_spark.risk: 轨道空间规范化可能引入计算开销，且对非置换对称系统不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从粒子置换对称性和物理空间几何属性出发，设计端到端的生成流，启发其他对称性引导的生成模型。

en.tldr: We propose Orbit-Space Geometric Probability Paths (OGPP), a particle-native flow-matching framework for generative modeling of particle systems.
en.motivation: Particles are defined up to permutation symmetries, so anonymous indexing inflates per-index target variance and yields curved, hard-to-learn flows; particles live in physical space, so the flow terminal velocity has physical meaning and can encode geometric attributes.
en.method: OGPP instantiates three key components: orbit-space canonicalization of the probability-path terminal endpoint, particle index embeddings for role specialization, and geometric probability paths with arc-length-aware terminal velocities that generate normals as a byproduct of the flow.
en.result: On minimal-surface benchmarks, it reduces metric error by up to two orders of magnitude in a single inference step; on ShapeNet, it matches SOTA with 5x fewer steps and reaches airplane EMD comparable to DiT-3D with 26x fewer parameters and 5x fewer steps; on single-shape encoding, it produces normals and reconstructions competitive with 6D generators while operating entirely in 3D.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, physically interpretable generative method for particle systems, especially useful for 3D shape generation tasks requiring geometric attributes like normals.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the physical meaning of flow terminal velocity to generate normals as a byproduct, avoiding extra networks or post-processing.
idea_spark.risk: Orbit-space canonicalization may introduce computational overhead and is not applicable to non-permutation-symmetric systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from particle permutation symmetry and geometric attributes in physical space, design an end-to-end generative flow, inspiring other symmetry-guided generative models.

papers.title: On the onset of correlations in Wave Turbulence close to singularities
papers.summary: In this paper we describe in a formal way how the derivation of the turbulent wave equation for the Schrödinger equation breaks down for times close to the self similar blow up of the wave turbulence kinetic equation. To this end, we study how the derivation of the cumulants hierarchy can not be approximated using solutions of the wave turbulence kinetic equation near the blow up time. It tuns out that near the blow up time the kinetic equation has to be replaced by a hierarchy of equations which is equivalent to a random field, defined for times $t\in (-\infty, \infty)$ and satisfying a nonlinear non autonomous Schrödinger equation.

ai.tldr: 本文形式化描述了在波湍流动力学方程自相似爆破时间附近，薛定谔方程的湍流波方程推导如何失效。
ai.motivation: 揭示波湍流动力学方程在奇点附近失效的机制，并探索替代的数学描述。
ai.method: 通过分析累积量层级在爆破时间附近无法用动力学方程近似，推导出等效于随机场的非线性非自治薛定谔方程层级。
ai.result: 爆破时间附近，动力学方程必须被一个定义在全时域上的随机场方程层级取代。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解波湍流理论在奇点附近的局限性，并提供新的数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机场等效性，将爆破问题转化为全时域非线性薛定谔方程的求解，可能简化数值模拟。
idea_spark.risk: 全时域方程可能引入非物理的边界条件，且随机场的统计性质需严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于湍流闭合问题中的层级截断方法，但此处用随机场替代动力学方程，避免了传统截断的任意性。

en.tldr: This paper formally describes how the derivation of the turbulent wave equation for the Schrödinger equation breaks down near the self-similar blow-up time of the wave turbulence kinetic equation.
en.motivation: To reveal the mechanism by which the wave turbulence kinetic equation fails near singularities and to propose an alternative mathematical description.
en.method: By studying the cumulant hierarchy near the blow-up time, it is shown that the kinetic equation must be replaced by a hierarchy equivalent to a random field satisfying a nonlinear non-autonomous Schrödinger equation defined for all times.
en.result: Near the blow-up time, the kinetic equation is replaced by a hierarchy of equations equivalent to a random field defined on the whole real line.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the limitations of wave turbulence theory near singularities and provides a new mathematical framework.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the random field equivalence to reformulate the blow-up problem as a full-time nonlinear Schrödinger equation, potentially simplifying numerical simulations.
idea_spark.risk: The full-time equation may introduce unphysical boundary conditions, and the statistical properties of the random field require rigorous validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by hierarchy truncation methods in turbulence closure, but here the random field replaces the kinetic equation, avoiding arbitrary truncation.

papers.title: Volumetric density estimates for nonlocal minimal surfaces
papers.summary: In this article, we prove that viscosity subsolutions to nonlocal mean curvature-type equations satisfy universal volumetric estimates at all scales. Our results hold for general symmetric kernels that are comparable to the fractional Laplacian. Furthermore, we prove that subsolutions with low density (with respect to a universal constant) necessarily have `fat boundary', that is, have topological boundary with positive Lebesgue measure.

ai.tldr: 本文证明非局部平均曲率型方程的粘性次解满足普适的体积估计，并指出低密度次解必然具有“胖边界”。
ai.motivation: 研究非局部极小曲面的体积密度性质，揭示低密度区域的边界结构。
ai.method: 利用与分数阶拉普拉斯可比的对称核，建立粘性次解的普适体积估计。
ai.result: 所有尺度下体积估计成立；低密度次解的拓扑边界具有正Lebesgue测度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非局部几何测度论中边界正则性与密度的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 将密度条件与边界测度联系起来，可能用于图像分割或材料科学中的界面问题。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于核的对称性和可比性，对更一般核可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑用类似方法研究非局部曲率流的奇点形成。

en.tldr: This paper proves universal volumetric estimates for viscosity subsolutions of nonlocal mean curvature-type equations, and shows that low-density subsolutions necessarily have a 'fat boundary'.
en.motivation: To investigate volumetric density properties of nonlocal minimal surfaces and reveal boundary structure in low-density regions.
en.method: Using symmetric kernels comparable to the fractional Laplacian to establish universal volumetric estimates for viscosity subsolutions.
en.result: Volumetric estimates hold at all scales; low-density subsolutions have topological boundary with positive Lebesgue measure.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the relationship between density and boundary regularity in nonlocal geometric measure theory.

idea_spark.idea: Linking density conditions to boundary measure may apply to interface problems in image segmentation or materials science.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on kernel symmetry and comparability, which may fail for more general kernels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to study singularity formation in nonlocal curvature flows.

papers.title: PepSpecBench: A Unified Evaluation Benchmark for Peptide Tandem Mass Spectrometry Prediction
papers.summary: Tandem mass spectrometry provides a high-throughput framework for identifying and quantifying proteins in complex biological samples. In computational proteomics, predicting peptide MS/MS spectra is a critical task, enabling downstream applications such as large-scale peptide identification and quantification. While deep learning architectures have substantially improved prediction accuracy, three evaluation challenges obscure the true progress of the field. First, inconsistent data preprocessing and incompatible model output spaces hinder fair model comparison. Second, flawed data splitting strategies can permit hidden sequence leakage and inflate reported performance. Third, existing evaluations typically lack comprehensive cross-species benchmarking and systematic assessment of model robustness to influential experimental conditions. To address these challenges, we propose PepSpecBench, a unified benchmark for peptide MS/MS spectrum prediction. PepSpecBench standardizes data preprocessing across complementary public datasets, enforces a strict backbone-disjoint splitting strategy to eliminate sequence leakage, and evaluates diverse architectures within a shared fragment-ion representation space. It further introduces a comprehensive multi-species evaluation suite and physically grounded metadata perturbation probes to assess model robustness and instrument awareness. We uncover previously unrecognized performance discrepancies and robustness limitations across six representative models, providing actionable insights for future model design, evaluation and practical deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出PepSpecBench统一基准，解决肽段串联质谱预测中的评估难题。
ai.motivation: 现有评估存在数据预处理不一致、数据泄露和缺乏跨物种基准等问题，阻碍了真实进展。
ai.method: 标准化数据预处理、采用严格的主干不相交分割策略、统一碎片离子表示空间，并引入多物种评估和元数据扰动探针。
ai.result: 揭示了六种代表性模型之前未被发现的性能差异和鲁棒性限制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户公平比较模型、避免数据泄露，并评估模型在实际条件下的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用元数据扰动探针系统评估模型对实验条件变化的敏感性。

en.tldr: Proposes PepSpecBench, a unified benchmark to address evaluation challenges in peptide tandem mass spectrometry prediction.
en.motivation: Existing evaluations suffer from inconsistent preprocessing, data leakage, and lack of cross-species benchmarking, obscuring true progress.
en.method: Standardizes preprocessing, enforces a strict backbone-disjoint splitting strategy, unifies fragment-ion representation, and introduces multi-species evaluation and metadata perturbation probes.
en.result: Reveals previously unrecognized performance discrepancies and robustness limitations across six representative models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users fairly compare models, avoid data leakage, and assess robustness under realistic conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Use metadata perturbation probes to systematically evaluate model sensitivity to experimental condition variations.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark may not cover all real-world experimental conditions, leading to incomplete generalization assessment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires development of more robust models and promotes standardized evaluation pipelines in computational proteomics.

papers.title: Convolution-to-sum identities for Mittag-Leffler type functions
papers.summary: Product-to-sum identities for trigonometric functions play a fundamental role in function theory and numerous applications. In this spirit, we present convolution-to-sum identities for Mittag-Leffler type functions. Using a Laplace domain analysis of fractional operators, we identify a family of Mittag-Leffler type functions that encapsulates the eigenfunctions of Riemann-Liouville and Caputo fractional derivatives. We work with two closely-related parameterizations of this class, $R_{α,v}$ and $P_{α,w}$. The convolution of two such functions can be expressed as a series of them. Moreover, if the functions share the same order $α$, the convolution can be reduced to a sum of two $P/R$ functions through a partial-fraction decomposition in the Laplace domain. Furthermore, $R$ and $P$ functions satisfy a generalization of Euler's identity, which expands the scope of the previous result to convolutions of $P/R$ functions whose orders $α_1,α_2$ are related by a rational factor. For $\frac{α_1}{α_2} = \frac{n}{m}$, the resulting sum has $n+m$ terms. The foundational results and methods developed here are illustrated by their application to forced subdiffusion and to a fractionally attenuated wave equation (the Caputo-Wismer-Kelvin, or the fractional Kelvin-Voigt model).

ai.tldr: 本文为Mittag-Leffler型函数建立了卷积到和的恒等式，通过拉普拉斯域分析将卷积简化为有限项和，并推广到有理阶情形。
ai.motivation: 三角函数积化和差公式在函数论和应用中至关重要，受此启发，作者希望为分数阶微积分中的Mittag-Leffler型函数建立类似的卷积恒等式。
ai.method: 利用拉普拉斯域分析分数阶算子，识别出一族Mittag-Leffler型函数（R_{α,v}和P_{α,w}），通过部分分式分解将同阶函数的卷积化为两个函数的和，并推广到有理阶情形。
ai.result: 同阶Mittag-Leffler型函数的卷积可表示为两个函数的和；当阶数比为有理数n/m时，卷积可表示为n+m项的和；同时给出了Euler恒等式的推广。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶微分方程（如次扩散、分数阶Kelvin-Voigt模型）的解析求解提供了新的恒等式工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似的部分分式分解技术应用于分数阶偏微分方程的数值格式设计，以降低计算复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 恒等式仅适用于特定参数化函数类，实际应用时需验证函数是否属于该族。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典三角恒等式出发，利用拉普拉斯域分析发现分数阶函数的新结构，这种跨域类比思路值得借鉴。

en.tldr: This paper establishes convolution-to-sum identities for Mittag-Leffler type functions, reducing convolutions to finite sums via Laplace domain analysis, with extensions to rational-order cases.
en.motivation: Inspired by product-to-sum identities for trigonometric functions, the authors aim to derive analogous convolution identities for Mittag-Leffler type functions arising in fractional calculus.
en.method: Using Laplace domain analysis of fractional operators, a family of Mittag-Leffler type functions (R_{α,v} and P_{α,w}) is identified. Partial-fraction decomposition in the Laplace domain reduces convolutions of same-order functions to a sum of two functions, and generalizes to rational-order cases.
en.result: Convolutions of same-order Mittag-Leffler functions reduce to a sum of two functions; for orders related by a rational factor n/m, the convolution becomes an n+m-term sum. A generalization of Euler's identity is also obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides new analytic identities for solving fractional differential equations, such as subdiffusion and the fractional Kelvin-Voigt model.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar partial-fraction decomposition techniques to design efficient numerical schemes for fractional PDEs, reducing computational cost.
idea_spark.risk: Identities are specific to the parameterized function class; practical applicability requires verifying that the functions belong to this family.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing analogies from classical trigonometric identities and leveraging Laplace domain analysis to uncover new structures in fractional functions is a promising cross-domain methodology.

papers.title: A revision of Litvak's conjecture on Gaussian minima and a volumetric zone conjecture
papers.summary: Litvak (2018) conjectured that, for any $p > 0$, the quantity $\mathbb{E}[\min_{i = 1}^n |g_i|^p]$ where $g \sim \mathcal{N}(0, Σ)$ is a centered Gaussian random vector is minimized among $n \times n$ correlation matrices $Σ$ by the Gram matrix of the regular simplex in $\mathbb{R}^{n - 1}$. We disprove this conjecture: the matrix with entries $Σ^{\mathrm{cos}}_{ij}=\cos(π(i - j) / n)$ already achieves a smaller moment for $p = 2$ and $n = 4$. We propose that $Σ^{\mathrm{cos}}$ is in fact the correct minimizer of these moments for all $p > 0$ and $n \geq 1$. Towards proving this, we conjecture a volumetric extension of Fejes Tóth's zone conjecture (1973), whose covering version was proved by Jiang and Polyanskii (2017). Conditional on this conjecture, we show the stronger result that $\min_{i = 1}^n |g_i|$ for $g \sim \mathcal{N}(0, Σ^{\mathrm{cos}})$ is stochastically dominated by $\min_{i = 1}^n |h_i|$ for $h \sim \mathcal{N}(0, Σ)$ for any $n \times n$ correlation matrix $Σ$. Our counterexample $Σ^{\mathrm{cos}}$ was found by the AlphaEvolve AI-assisted optimization system, and we also include a brief discussion of its application to such problems.

ai.tldr: 本文否定了Litvak关于高斯最小值矩的猜想，提出并部分证明了新的极小化矩阵Σ^cos，并引入体积区域猜想。
ai.motivation: Litvak猜想高斯随机向量绝对值最小值的p次矩由正则单形的Gram矩阵极小化，本文旨在检验并修正该猜想。
ai.method: 通过AlphaEvolve AI优化系统发现反例矩阵Σ^cos，并基于体积区域猜想证明其随机占优性质。
ai.result: 对于n=4, p=2，Σ^cos的矩小于正则单形矩阵；条件于体积区域猜想，Σ^cos在所有相关矩阵中随机占优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高斯随机向量极值矩的极小化问题，以及AI辅助数学发现的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用AI发现反例并引导新猜想，结合几何概率证明。
idea_spark.risk: 体积区域猜想尚未证明，结果条件性成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: AI辅助发现可挑战经典猜想，推动理论发展。

en.tldr: This paper disproves Litvak's conjecture on Gaussian minima moments, proposes a new minimizer Σ^cos, and conditionally proves its stochastic dominance via a volumetric zone conjecture.
en.motivation: Litvak conjectured that the p-th moment of the minimum absolute value of a Gaussian vector is minimized by the Gram matrix of a regular simplex; we aim to test and revise this conjecture.
en.method: Using the AlphaEvolve AI optimization system to find a counterexample matrix Σ^cos, and proving its stochastic dominance conditional on a volumetric zone conjecture.
en.result: For n=4, p=2, Σ^cos achieves a smaller moment than the regular simplex matrix; conditional on the volumetric zone conjecture, Σ^cos stochastically dominates all correlation matrices.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into minimizing extreme moments of Gaussian vectors and the role of AI in mathematical discovery.

idea_spark.idea: Use AI to discover counterexamples and guide new conjectures, combined with geometric probability proofs.
idea_spark.risk: The volumetric zone conjecture remains unproven, making results conditional.
idea_spark.inspiration: AI-assisted discovery can challenge classical conjectures and drive theoretical advances.

papers.title: Testing General Relativity Through Gravitational Wave Classification: A Convolutional Neural Network Framework
papers.summary: We present a machine learning framework for testing general relativity (GR) with gravitational wave signals from binary black hole mergers. Using the source parameters of 173 BBH events from the GWTC catalog as a realistic astrophysical population, we generate simulated GR waveforms and construct beyond GR (BGR) waveforms by applying controlled phase deformations. We introduce a response function formalism that provides a systematic framework for quantifying how any observable responds to modifications of GR. We train convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on two input representations: whitened waveforms and a response function type observable derived from the waveform mismatch, which isolates the effect of phase deviations from the bulk signal. Using response functions as the CNN input improves the classification sensitivity by a factor of approximately 33 compared to whitened waveforms, demonstrating that the choice of observable representation is as important as the classifier architecture. We study the fundamental limits of this classification through Bayes optimal error analysis, averaging methods that reveal coherent patterns hidden in noise, and a comparison between CNN accuracy and a single feature classifier as a proxy for human performance. At all deformation scales, the CNN outperforms the best single feature approach. We extend the framework to physically motivated theories using the parameterized post Einsteinian (ppE) formalism and apply it to massive gravity, where the classifier detects deviations for graviton masses of order $m_g \sim 10^{-23}\;\mathrm{eV}/c^2$ with aLIGO design sensitivity.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于卷积神经网络的框架，通过引力波信号分类来检验广义相对论，并引入响应函数形式来量化对GR的偏离。
ai.motivation: 传统检验GR的方法依赖于精确波形模板，但BGR信号可能偏离模板，需要更鲁棒的分类方法。
ai.method: 使用GWTC目录中173个BBH事件的源参数生成模拟GR波形和受控相位变形的BGR波形；训练CNN处理白化波形和基于响应函数的观测值；通过贝叶斯最优误差分析研究分类极限。
ai.result: 响应函数作为CNN输入比白化波形灵敏度提高约33倍；CNN在所有变形尺度上优于最佳单特征分类器；在ppE框架下，对质量约10⁻²³ eV/c²的引力子质量可检测偏离。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种不依赖精确波形模板的GR检验方法，适用于未来引力波观测数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将CNN与响应函数结合，可能用于实时引力波事件分类和异常检测。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟波形可能无法完全覆盖真实BGR信号的复杂性，导致分类偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从波形失配中提取响应函数作为输入，启发其他领域（如地震学）的信号分类设计。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从波形失配中提取响应函数作为输入，启发其他领域（如地震学）的信号分类设计。

en.tldr: A CNN framework for testing general relativity via gravitational wave classification, using a response function formalism that improves sensitivity by ~33x over whitened waveforms.
en.motivation: Traditional GR tests rely on precise waveform templates, but BGR signals may deviate, requiring more robust classification methods.
en.method: Simulated GR and BGR waveforms from 173 BBH events in GWTC; trained CNNs on whitened waveforms and response function observables; analyzed classification limits via Bayes optimal error.
en.result: Response function input boosts CNN sensitivity by ~33x over whitened waveforms; CNN outperforms single-feature classifiers at all deformation scales; detects graviton masses ~10⁻²³ eV/c² under ppE formalism.
en.help_to_user: Provides a template-independent method for testing GR, applicable to future gravitational wave observations.

idea_spark.idea: Combining CNNs with response functions may enable real-time gravitational wave event classification and anomaly detection.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated waveforms may not fully capture real BGR signal complexity, leading to classification bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extracting response functions from waveform mismatch inspires signal classification designs in other fields like seismology.

papers.title: Projection-Free Transformers via Gaussian Kernel Attention
papers.summary: Self-attention in Transformers is typically implemented as $\mathrm{softmax}(QK^\top/\sqrt{d})V$, where $Q=XW_Q$, $K=XW_K$, and $V=XW_V$ are learned linear projections of the input $X$. We ask whether these learned projections are necessary, or whether they can be replaced by a simpler similarity-based diffusion operator. We introduce \textbf{Gaussian Kernel Attention} (GKA), a drop-in replacement for dot-product attention that computes token affinities directly using a Gaussian radial basis function (RBF) kernel applied to per-head token features. Each head learns only a bandwidth parameter $σ_h$, while a single output projection $W_O$ preserves compatibility with the standard Transformer interface. GKA can be interpreted as normalized kernel regression over tokens, linking modern Transformer architectures to classical non-local filtering and kernel smoothing methods. We evaluate GKA in both vision and language modeling settings. For autoregressive language modeling within the \texttt{nanochat} framework, we implement causal masking and sliding-window constraints by masking and renormalizing the Gaussian kernel. At depth 20, a GKA model with $0.42\times$ the parameters and $0.49\times$ the total training FLOPs of a standard attention baseline trains stably, exhibits a near-zero train-validation gap, and demonstrates competitive behavior on standard benchmarks, albeit with higher bits-per-byte (BPB) at this compute scale. Overall, GKA provides a minimal, interpretable attention mechanism with an explicit locality scale, offering a dimension in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off for Transformer design.

ai.tldr: 提出高斯核注意力（GKA），用RBF核替换点积注意力，无需学习投影矩阵，仅需学习带宽参数，在语言建模中实现参数和计算量减半。
ai.motivation: 标准Transformer的线性投影是否必要？能否用更简单的基于相似度的扩散算子替代？
ai.method: GKA直接对每头token特征应用高斯RBF核计算注意力权重，每个头仅学习一个带宽参数σ_h，保留输出投影W_O以兼容标准接口。
ai.result: 在深度20的nanochat框架下，GKA模型参数为标准注意力的0.42倍，训练FLOPs为0.49倍，训练稳定，泛化差距接近零，但BPB略高。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种极简、可解释的注意力机制，具有显式局部尺度，帮助用户在精度与效率之间进行权衡。

idea_spark.idea: 将GKA与可学习核函数（如Matern核）结合，或引入多尺度带宽以捕获不同粒度的依赖关系。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯核的局部性可能限制长距离依赖的捕获，在需要全局上下文的场景中性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典非局部滤波和核平滑方法中获得灵感，将现代Transformer与统计学习理论联系起来。

zh.tldr: 提出高斯核注意力（GKA），用RBF核替换点积注意力，无需学习投影矩阵，仅需学习带宽参数，在语言建模中实现参数和计算量减半。

en.tldr: Proposes Gaussian Kernel Attention (GKA), replacing dot-product attention with an RBF kernel, eliminating learned projections and requiring only a bandwidth parameter per head, achieving half the parameters and FLOPs in language modeling.
en.motivation: Are learned linear projections in standard Transformers necessary, or can they be replaced by a simpler similarity-based diffusion operator?
en.method: GKA computes token affinities directly using a Gaussian RBF kernel on per-head token features; each head learns only a bandwidth parameter σ_h, while a single output projection W_O maintains compatibility.
en.result: In a depth-20 nanochat framework, GKA uses 0.42× parameters and 0.49× training FLOPs of the baseline, trains stably with near-zero train-validation gap, but yields higher bits-per-byte at this compute scale.
en.help_to_user: Offers a minimal, interpretable attention mechanism with explicit locality scale, aiding users in navigating the accuracy-efficiency trade-off in Transformer design.

idea_spark.idea: Combine GKA with learnable kernels (e.g., Matern) or introduce multi-scale bandwidths to capture dependencies at different granularities.
idea_spark.risk: The locality of Gaussian kernels may limit long-range dependency capture, potentially degrading performance in tasks requiring global context.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from classical non-local filtering and kernel smoothing methods, linking modern Transformers to statistical learning theory.

papers.title: SNNF: An SNN-based Near-Sensor Noise Filter for Dynamic Vision Sensors
papers.summary: Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS) exhibit exceptional dynamic range and low power consumption, making them ideal for edge applications in the Internet of Video Things (IoVT). However, their output is often degraded by spurious Background Activity (BA) noise, leading to unnecessary computational overhead. This paper proposes SNNF, a near-sensor BA noise filter that integrates a compact Event-Based Binary Image (EBBI) representation, a parallel memory architecture, and a single-layer Spiking Neural Network (SNN) classifier. Trained on representative DVS data, the SNN distinguishes signal events from noise with an AUC of 0.89 on standard datasets. The binary-array-based EBBI eliminates timestamp dependency, significantly reducing memory footprint. Moreover, the SNN's spike-based computation replaces power-hungry multipliers with simple accumulation logic and minimizes inter-neuron data width, resulting in an extremely hardware-efficient design. FPGA implementation results show that SNNF reduces memory and logic resources to approximately 11% and 40%, respectively of state-of-the-art filters, while achieving a throughput of 29 Mega events per second (Meps). In a 65 nm CMOS ASIC implementation, SNNF achieves 44.4 Meps with an area and power consumption of only ~13% and <5% of the corresponding ANN-based designs. These results demonstrate that SNNF provides an excellent balance between filtering accuracy and hardware efficiency, making it highly suitable for resource-constrained, near-sensor deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于脉冲神经网络的近传感器噪声滤波器SNNF，用于动态视觉传感器，在保持高滤波精度的同时大幅降低硬件资源消耗。
ai.motivation: 动态视觉传感器输出常受背景活动噪声干扰，导致不必要的计算开销，现有滤波器硬件效率低，不适合资源受限的边缘部署。
ai.method: 集成紧凑的事件二值图像表示、并行存储架构和单层脉冲神经网络分类器，用脉冲计算替代乘法器，减少神经元间数据宽度。
ai.result: 在标准数据集上AUC达0.89；FPGA实现中存储和逻辑资源分别降至最先进滤波器的约11%和40%，吞吐率29 Meps；65nm CMOS ASIC实现中面积和功耗仅为ANN设计的约13%和<5%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用脉冲神经网络在近传感器端高效滤除动态视觉传感器的背景噪声，平衡精度与硬件效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将EBBI表示与SNN结合用于其他类型的事件流数据（如触觉、听觉）的噪声过滤。
idea_spark.risk: 单层SNN分类器可能对复杂噪声模式泛化能力有限，需验证在更多样化场景下的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 二进制图像表示消除时间戳依赖的思路可启发其他传感器数据压缩与高效处理方案。

en.tldr: Proposes SNNF, a near-sensor noise filter based on spiking neural networks for Dynamic Vision Sensors, achieving high filtering accuracy with drastically reduced hardware resources.
en.motivation: DVS output is often degraded by background activity noise, causing unnecessary computation; existing filters are hardware-inefficient for resource-constrained edge deployment.
en.method: Integrates a compact Event-Based Binary Image representation, parallel memory architecture, and a single-layer SNN classifier, replacing multipliers with spike-based accumulation and minimizing inter-neuron data width.
en.result: Achieves AUC of 0.89 on standard datasets; FPGA implementation reduces memory and logic resources to ~11% and 40% of state-of-the-art filters with 29 Meps throughput; 65nm CMOS ASIC achieves 44.4 Meps with area and power at ~13% and <5% of ANN-based designs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently filter background noise near the sensor using spiking neural networks, balancing accuracy and hardware efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining EBBI representation with SNNs for noise filtering in other event streams such as tactile or auditory data.
idea_spark.risk: Single-layer SNN classifier may have limited generalization to complex noise patterns; robustness needs validation on more diverse scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The binary image representation eliminating timestamp dependency inspires other sensor data compression and efficient processing schemes.

papers.title: AdamO: A Collapse-Suppressed Optimizer for Offline RL
papers.summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can fail spectacularly when bootstrapped temporal-difference (TD) updates amplify their own errors, driving the critic toward extreme and unusable Q-values. A key counterintuitive insight of this work is that collapse is not only a property of the backup rule or network architecture: optimizer dynamics themselves can directly trigger or suppress instability. From a control-theoretic viewpoint, we model offline TD learning as a feedback system and analyze Adam-based critic updates. This yields a necessary and sufficient condition for stability of the induced local update dynamics: within the regime we analyze, these dynamics are stable if and only if the spectral radius of the corresponding update operator is strictly below one. Further analysis suggests that standard Adam updates can inadvertently distort the parameter geometry, motivating explicit orthogonality constraints to prevent TD error amplification. To this end, we propose AdamO, an Adam-based optimizer with a decoupled orthogonality correction regulated by a strict task-alignment budget. We prove that this design theoretically guarantees worst-case task safety and preserves Adam's continuous-time dissipative dynamics. Empirically, AdamO is broadly compatible with diverse offline RL baselines, improving stability and returns across a broad suite of benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出AdamO优化器，通过解耦正交校正和任务对齐预算，抑制离线强化学习中Q值崩溃问题。
ai.motivation: 离线强化学习中，自举式时序差分更新会放大误差，导致评论家Q值极端化。现有方法多关注备份规则或网络架构，但优化器本身的动态也可能触发不稳定性。
ai.method: 将离线TD学习建模为反馈系统，分析Adam更新动力学，导出稳定性充要条件（谱半径<1）。提出AdamO，在Adam基础上加入解耦正交校正，并用严格的任务对齐预算保证最坏情况安全。
ai.result: 理论证明AdamO保持Adam的连续耗散动力学并保证任务安全性。实验表明，AdamO与多种离线RL基线兼容，在多个基准上提升稳定性和回报。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你在离线RL训练中遇到Q值发散或训练不稳定，可以尝试用AdamO替代标准Adam优化器。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将正交校正与自适应学习率结合，设计一种通用稳定优化器，用于对抗训练中的梯度爆炸？
idea_spark.risk: 正交约束可能限制模型容量，在复杂任务上需要精细调节任务对齐预算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 控制论视角下的优化器稳定性分析，启发我们重新审视Adam等自适应方法的几何扭曲效应。

zh.tldr: 提出AdamO优化器，通过解耦正交校正和任务对齐预算，抑制离线强化学习中Q值崩溃问题。
zh.motivation: 离线强化学习中，自举式时序差分更新会放大误差，导致评论家Q值极端化。现有方法多关注备份规则或网络架构，但优化器本身的动态也可能触发不稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将正交校正与自适应学习率结合，设计一种通用稳定优化器，用于对抗训练中的梯度爆炸？
idea_spark.risk: 正交约束可能限制模型容量，在复杂任务上需要精细调节任务对齐预算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 控制论视角下的优化器稳定性分析，启发我们重新审视Adam等自适应方法的几何扭曲效应。

en.tldr: Proposes AdamO, a collapse-suppressed optimizer for offline RL, using decoupled orthogonality correction and a strict task-alignment budget.
en.motivation: In offline RL, bootstrapped TD updates amplify errors, driving critic Q-values to extremes. Existing work focuses on backup rules or architectures, but optimizer dynamics themselves can trigger instability.
en.method: Models offline TD learning as a feedback system, analyzes Adam update dynamics, and derives a necessary and sufficient stability condition (spectral radius < 1). Proposes AdamO, which adds decoupled orthogonality correction to Adam and enforces worst-case safety via a task-alignment budget.
en.result: Theoretically proves AdamO preserves Adam's continuous-time dissipative dynamics and guarantees task safety. Empirically, AdamO is compatible with diverse offline RL baselines, improving stability and returns across benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: If you encounter Q-value divergence or training instability in offline RL, try replacing standard Adam with AdamO.

idea_spark.idea: Could we design a general stable optimizer combining orthogonality correction with adaptive learning rates to mitigate gradient explosion in adversarial training?
idea_spark.risk: Orthogonality constraints may limit model capacity; the task-alignment budget requires careful tuning for complex tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: The control-theoretic perspective on optimizer stability inspires re-examining geometric distortions in adaptive methods like Adam.

papers.title: Adaptive Alarm Threshold Prediction in 4G Mobile Networks: A Percentile-Guided Deep Learning Framework with Interpretable Outputs
papers.summary: In mobile telecommunications, alarms act as early warning signals. They are triggered when a cell, the basic unit of radio coverage, shuts down or behaves abnormally. This signals a degradation in service quality, which directly affects the customer experience. To fix the issue, operators rely on preset thresholds to decide when an engineer should be sent out. In practice, these thresholds are set manually and remain fixed regardless of the time of day, traffic levels, or overall network conditions. This often leads to serious faults slipping through during busy hours, while minor issues can cause unnecessary callouts when the network is quiet. This paper presents a machine learning framework that automatically predicts four alarm thresholds, audit window duration, inactive time limit, total fluctuation count, and per hour fluctuation limit, from live network behavior. Since no ground truth labels exist for thresholds, we introduce a percentile guided label derivation strategy and evaluate four models on an anonymized dataset of 10,648 cells across three vendors and nine regions from a real 4G network, comprising a Gradient Boosted Trees baseline, a CNN-BiLSTM with attention, the proposed PCTN, and an iTransformer. PCTN performs the best overall with respect to three of the four targets, outperforming a state-of-the-art iTransformer while using 83 percent fewer parameters. Its mixed output heads and dynamic alpha mechanism produce thresholds that are both accurate and interpretable, allowing operators to inspect and adjust the learned policy without retraining. All comparisons are statistically significant at p < 0.001. The framework undergoes daily retraining using new data, which enables the thresholds to constantly adjust to changes in the network.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于百分位数引导的深度学习框架，自动预测4G网络中的四个告警阈值，并在真实数据集上优于iTransformer，参数减少83%。
ai.motivation: 传统告警阈值手动设定且固定不变，导致忙时严重故障漏报、闲时误报，影响用户体验和运维效率。
ai.method: 采用百分位数引导的标签推导策略，训练PCTN模型（含混合输出头和动态alpha机制），并与梯度提升树、CNN-BiLSTM+注意力、iTransformer对比。
ai.result: PCTN在三个目标上表现最佳，参数比iTransformer少83%，所有比较p<0.001，且输出可解释，支持运维人员调整策略。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助网络运维人员自动生成动态、准确的告警阈值，减少人工调参成本，提升故障检测效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态alpha机制与混合输出头结合，使模型在准确性和可解释性之间取得平衡，可推广至需要策略可调的预测任务。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖每日重训练，可能增加计算开销；可解释性输出可能被运维人员过度依赖而忽略潜在模式变化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从无标签数据中通过百分位数构造伪标签的思路，可启发其他无监督或弱监督学习场景的标签设计。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖每日重训练，可能增加计算开销；可解释性输出可能被运维人员过度依赖而忽略潜在模式变化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从无标签数据中通过百分位数构造伪标签的思路，可启发其他无监督或弱监督学习场景的标签设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a percentile-guided deep learning framework to automatically predict four alarm thresholds in 4G networks, outperforming iTransformer with 83% fewer parameters on a real dataset.
en.motivation: Manual and static alarm thresholds cause missed faults during busy hours and false alarms during quiet periods, degrading user experience and operational efficiency.
en.method: Uses a percentile-guided label derivation strategy to train PCTN (with mixed output heads and dynamic alpha mechanism), compared against Gradient Boosted Trees, CNN-BiLSTM+attention, and iTransformer.
en.result: PCTN achieves best performance on three out of four targets, uses 83% fewer parameters than iTransformer, all comparisons significant at p<0.001, and outputs are interpretable for operator adjustment.
en.help_to_user: Helps network operators automatically generate dynamic and accurate alarm thresholds, reducing manual tuning and improving fault detection efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combining dynamic alpha mechanism with mixed output heads balances accuracy and interpretability, applicable to prediction tasks requiring adjustable policies.
idea_spark.risk: Daily retraining may increase computational cost; interpretable outputs might lead operators to over-rely on learned policies without detecting underlying pattern shifts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Constructing pseudo-labels via percentiles from unlabeled data inspires label design for other unsupervised or weakly supervised learning scenarios.

papers.title: Skipping the Zeros in Diffusion Models for Sparse Data Generation
papers.summary: Diffusion models (DMs) excel on dense continuous data, but are not designed for sparse continuous data. They do not model exact zeros that represent the deliberate absence of a signal. As a result, they erase sparsity patterns and perform unnecessary computation on mostly zero entries. With Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED), we model only non-zero values, preserving sparsity. SED delivers computational savings while maintaining or improving generation quality by skipping zeros during training and inference. Across physics and biology benchmarks, SED matches or surpasses conventional DMs and domain-specific baselines, while vision experiments provide intuitive insights into the limitations of dense DMs and the benefits of SED.

ai.tldr: 提出稀疏利用扩散模型（SED），通过跳过零值处理稀疏连续数据，在保持或提升生成质量的同时减少计算量。
ai.motivation: 传统扩散模型针对密集连续数据设计，无法处理稀疏数据中的精确零值，导致计算浪费和稀疏模式破坏。
ai.method: SED在训练和推理中仅建模非零值，跳过零值，保留稀疏性。
ai.result: 在物理和生物学基准上匹配或超越传统扩散模型及领域专用基线，视觉实验展示了密集扩散模型的局限和SED的优势。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效生成稀疏连续数据，节省计算资源，适用于科学数据如物理和生物学中的稀疏观测。

idea_spark.idea: 将稀疏性先验融入扩散过程，设计自适应零值掩码以动态跳过计算。
idea_spark.risk: 可能对非零值建模精度有影响，需平衡稀疏性与生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受稀疏矩阵计算和压缩感知启发，利用数据固有稀疏结构优化生成模型。

zh.tldr: 提出稀疏利用扩散模型（SED），通过跳过零值处理稀疏连续数据，在保持或提升生成质量的同时减少计算量。
zh.motivation: 传统扩散模型针对密集连续数据设计，无法处理稀疏数据中的精确零值，导致计算浪费和稀疏模式破坏。

idea_spark.risk: 可能对非零值建模精度有影响，需平衡稀疏性与生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受稀疏矩阵计算和压缩感知启发，利用数据固有稀疏结构优化生成模型。

en.tldr: Proposes Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED) that skips zeros to handle sparse continuous data, reducing computation while maintaining or improving generation quality.
en.motivation: Traditional diffusion models are designed for dense continuous data and fail to handle exact zeros in sparse data, leading to wasted computation and destroyed sparsity patterns.
en.method: SED models only non-zero values during training and inference, skipping zeros to preserve sparsity.
en.result: Matches or surpasses conventional diffusion models and domain-specific baselines on physics and biology benchmarks; vision experiments highlight limitations of dense DMs and benefits of SED.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently generate sparse continuous data with reduced computational cost, applicable to scientific data like sparse observations in physics and biology.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate sparsity prior into diffusion process with adaptive zero masks to dynamically skip computation.
idea_spark.risk: May affect modeling accuracy of non-zero values; balance between sparsity and generation quality needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by sparse matrix computation and compressed sensing, leveraging inherent data sparsity to optimize generative models.

papers.title: A Shape Design Approximation for Degenerate Partial Differential Equations and Its Application
papers.summary: In this paper, we focus on two types of degenerate partial differential equations: a degenerate elliptic equation and a degenerate parabolic equation. Significantly, both categories are characterized by the same principal operator. To obtain solutions for these equations, we introduce a novel approximation approach, termed the shape design approximation. As a practical application of this method, we derive a Carleman estimate for the backward degenerate parabolic equation. This estimate plays a pivotal role in establishing the null controllability of the degenerate parabolic equation. A notable advantage of employing the shape design approximation in deriving the Carleman estimate is that it enables us to bypass the requirement for second order derivatives in the degenerate equation. Usually, this has been a significant obstacle in the derivation of Carleman estimates for degenerate parabolic equations.

ai.tldr: 针对两类退化偏微分方程（退化椭圆方程和退化抛物方程），提出了一种形状设计逼近方法，并利用该方法推导了后向退化抛物方程的Carleman估计，进而建立了退化抛物方程的零能控性。
ai.motivation: 退化偏微分方程中Carleman估计的推导通常需要处理二阶导数，这是一个主要障碍。
ai.method: 引入形状设计逼近方法，避免了对退化方程中二阶导数的直接处理。
ai.result: 成功推导出后向退化抛物方程的Carleman估计，并证明了退化抛物方程的零能控性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种新的逼近工具，可简化退化PDE中Carleman估计的推导过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将形状设计逼近与Carleman估计结合，绕过二阶导数障碍。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能仅适用于具有相同主算子的特定退化方程类。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过重新参数化问题来规避数学困难，类似于数值分析中的形状优化思想。

idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能仅适用于具有相同主算子的特定退化方程类。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过重新参数化问题来规避数学困难，类似于数值分析中的形状优化思想。

en.tldr: For two types of degenerate PDEs (elliptic and parabolic), a shape design approximation is introduced to derive a Carleman estimate for the backward degenerate parabolic equation, leading to null controllability. The method avoids second-order derivatives, a common obstacle.
en.motivation: Deriving Carleman estimates for degenerate parabolic equations typically requires handling second-order derivatives, which is a significant obstacle.
en.method: A shape design approximation is introduced to bypass the need for second-order derivatives in the degenerate equation.
en.result: A Carleman estimate for the backward degenerate parabolic equation is obtained, and null controllability of the degenerate parabolic equation is established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new approximation tool that simplifies the derivation of Carleman estimates in degenerate PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine shape design approximation with Carleman estimates to circumvent the second-order derivative obstacle.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be limited to degenerate equations sharing the same principal operator.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reparameterizing the problem to bypass mathematical difficulties, akin to shape optimization in numerical analysis.

papers.title: Fast Newton methods for linear-quadratic dynamic games with application to autonomous vehicle platooning and intersection crossing
papers.summary: We consider constrained linear-quadratic dynamic games arising in autonomous vehicle platooning, intersection crossing and other cooperative driving scenarios. Infinite-horizon Nash equilibria are reformulated as receding-horizon affine variational inequalities with special structure. Exploiting this formulation, we design Newton-type algorithms with local quadratic convergence. The resulting methods achieve extremely fast convergence, making them well suited for real-time and embedded receding-horizon control in safety-critical traffic applications. Simulations of platooning and intersection crossing demonstrate substantial performance gains over first-order and operator-splitting approaches, hence high application potential.

ai.tldr: 针对自动驾驶队列和交叉口等场景的约束线性二次动态博弈，提出具有局部二次收敛的牛顿型算法，实现极快收敛，适合实时安全关键控制。
ai.motivation: 现有的一阶和算子分裂方法在安全关键交通应用中收敛慢，无法满足实时嵌入式控制需求。
ai.method: 将无限时域纳什均衡重新表述为具有特殊结构的滚动时域仿射变分不等式，并设计牛顿型算法。
ai.result: 仿真表明，在队列和交叉口场景中，该方法相比一阶和算子分裂方法性能显著提升，收敛极快。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶协同驾驶提供一种快速、可嵌入的实时控制算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将变分不等式与牛顿法结合，利用问题结构加速收敛，可启发设计更高效的分布式优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 牛顿法对初始点敏感，且需计算Hessian矩阵，可能增加计算和存储开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用博弈论和变分不等式框架，将复杂多车交互转化为可快速求解的数学结构。

en.tldr: For constrained linear-quadratic dynamic games in autonomous platooning and intersection crossing, we propose Newton-type algorithms with local quadratic convergence, achieving extremely fast convergence suitable for real-time safety-critical control.
en.motivation: Existing first-order and operator-splitting methods converge too slowly for real-time embedded control in safety-critical traffic applications.
en.method: Infinite-horizon Nash equilibria are reformulated as receding-horizon affine variational inequalities with special structure, and Newton-type algorithms are designed.
en.result: Simulations of platooning and intersection crossing demonstrate substantial performance gains over first-order and operator-splitting approaches, with very fast convergence.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fast, embeddable real-time control algorithm for cooperative autonomous driving.

idea_spark.idea: Combining variational inequalities with Newton methods and exploiting problem structure for fast convergence can inspire more efficient distributed optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Newton methods are sensitive to initialization and require Hessian computation, which may increase computational and memory overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using game theory and variational inequality frameworks to transform complex multi-vehicle interactions into a rapidly solvable mathematical structure.

papers.title: Relaxation dynamics of the Inertial Winfree model
papers.summary: We prove two synchronization theorems for the second-order (inertial) Winfree model of coupled oscillators. The first result is a pathwise oscillator-death theorem with explicit smallness thresholds on the natural frequencies, initial velocities, and inertia, scaling as $R_0^{3/2}$ in the initial order parameter $R_0$. The second result is a qualitative zero-inertia synchronization statement: under generic initial data, if the intrinsic and initial velocity spreads are small compared to $κ$ and the inertia $m$ is small, then the limiting order parameter can be made arbitrarily close to 2. The proof of the first result is organized around three mechanisms, namely inertial gradient flow and the Łojasiewicz theorem, an initial layer argument, and an order-parameter bootstrapping argument. The proof of the second result involves approximation to the first-order case via a quantitative Tikhonov theorem.

ai.tldr: 证明了惯性Winfree模型的同步定理，包括路径依赖的振荡器死亡和零惯性极限同步。
ai.motivation: 研究二阶惯性耦合振子模型的同步行为，填补理论空白。
ai.method: 利用惯性梯度流、Łojasiewicz定理、初始层论证和序参量自举论证，以及Tikhonov定理逼近一阶情形。
ai.result: 给出了振荡器死亡的显式小阈值，并证明在惯性很小时极限序参量可任意接近2。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解惯性对耦合振子同步的影响，提供严格的数学分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将惯性Winfree模型的分析方法推广到更一般的耦合振子网络，如Kuramoto模型。
idea_spark.risk: 推广时可能遇到高维序参量空间中的几何复杂性，导致阈值条件难以显式表达。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Tikhonov定理的逼近思想，可用于研究小惯性对复杂系统动力学的影响。

en.tldr: Proves two synchronization theorems for the inertial Winfree model: pathwise oscillator death with explicit thresholds and zero-inertia synchronization approaching order parameter 2.
en.motivation: To understand synchronization in second-order coupled oscillator systems and fill theoretical gaps.
en.method: Uses inertial gradient flow, Łojasiewicz theorem, initial layer argument, order-parameter bootstrapping, and Tikhonov theorem for approximation.
en.result: Provides explicit smallness thresholds for oscillator death and shows that for small inertia the limiting order parameter can be arbitrarily close to 2.
en.help_to_user: Offers rigorous mathematical tools to analyze the effect of inertia on synchronization in coupled oscillators.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the analysis to more general coupled oscillator networks, such as the Kuramoto model with inertia.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization may face geometric complexity in high-dimensional order parameter spaces, making threshold conditions hard to express explicitly.
idea_spark.inspiration: The Tikhonov approximation approach can inspire studies of small inertia effects in other complex systems.

papers.title: From second moments to pairwise negative correlation: applications to minimal and uniform spanning trees
papers.summary: We uncover a close connection between the second moment of the degree of a typical vertex in a random subgraph and the pairwise negative correlation (p-NC) property. On one hand, we exploit this connection to prove the p-NC property for non-adjacent edges in minimal spanning trees on complete graphs. On the other hand, we apply the classical p-NC property of uniform spanning trees to derive a universal upper bound on the second moment of the degree of a uniformly chosen vertex in uniform spanning trees on finite, connected, regular graphs, thereby resolving an open question posed by Nachmias and Peres. Furthermore, we determine that the optimal upper bound is exactly 6, and the method for achieving this optimal bound is interesting in itself -- the proof uses Edmonds' matroid polytope theorem.

ai.tldr: 揭示了随机子图中顶点度的二阶矩与边对负相关性的紧密联系，并应用于最小生成树和均匀生成树。
ai.motivation: 解决Nachmias和Peres提出的关于均匀生成树顶点度二阶矩的公开问题。
ai.method: 利用二阶矩与p-NC的等价关系，结合Edmonds的拟阵多面体定理。
ai.result: 证明了非相邻边在最小生成树中的p-NC性质，并给出均匀生成树顶点度二阶矩的最优上界6。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析随机图结构的新视角，特别是生成树中度的矩估计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拟阵多面体定理优化随机图度的矩上界。
idea_spark.risk: 拟阵方法可能不适用于非正则图或更一般的随机结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典概率方法与组合优化定理结合，解决开放问题。

en.motivation: Resolves an open question by Nachmias and Peres on the second moment of degree in uniform spanning trees.
en.method: Exploits the equivalence between second moment and p-NC, combined with Edmonds' matroid polytope theorem.
en.result: Proves p-NC for non-adjacent edges in minimal spanning trees and derives the optimal upper bound 6 for the second moment in uniform spanning trees on regular graphs.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new perspective for analyzing random graph structures, especially moment estimates of degrees in spanning trees.

idea_spark.risk: Matroid methods may not apply to non-regular graphs or more general random structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining classical probabilistic methods with combinatorial optimization theorems to solve open problems.

papers.title: Null Controllability for a Multi-Dimensional Degenerate Parabolic Equation with Degenerated Interior Point
papers.summary: In this study, we study the null controllability of a multi-dimensional degenerate parabolic equation characterized by a degenerate interior point. The control domain, which is an arbitrary inner region, does not encompass the degenerate point. To tackle this problem, we adopt a new approximation methodology. Specifically, we approximate the degenerate partial differential equations (PDEs) with a series of uniformly elliptic PDEs, notwithstanding their limited regularity. We then derive the Carleman estimate for these approximate uniformly parabolic equations and establish the observability inequality, which ultimately paves the way for demonstrating the null controllability of the system.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类具有退化内点的多维退化抛物方程在控制域不包含退化点时的零能控性。
ai.motivation: 解决控制域不包含退化点时多维退化抛物方程的零能控性问题。
ai.method: 用一系列一致椭圆型PDE逼近退化PDE，推导Carleman估计并建立可观测性不等式。
ai.result: 证明了系统的零能控性。
ai.help_to_user: 为退化抛物方程的控制理论提供了新的逼近方法和可观测性分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将逼近方法用于更一般的退化抛物系统，如具有多个退化点或非线性退化项的情形。
idea_spark.risk: 逼近过程的收敛性及Carleman估计的适用性可能受限于退化点的分布和方程的正则性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从一致椭圆型PDE的Carleman估计出发，启发我们探索退化PDE的精确可观测性条件。

en.tldr: This paper studies the null controllability of a multi-dimensional degenerate parabolic equation with a degenerate interior point, where the control domain does not contain the degenerate point.
en.motivation: To address the null controllability problem for multi-dimensional degenerate parabolic equations when the control region excludes the degenerate point.
en.method: Approximate the degenerate PDEs by a family of uniformly elliptic PDEs, derive Carleman estimates for the approximate equations, and establish an observability inequality.
en.result: The null controllability of the system is proved.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel approximation approach and observability analysis tools for control of degenerate parabolic equations.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the approximation method to more general degenerate parabolic systems, e.g., with multiple degenerate points or nonlinear degenerate terms.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of the approximation and applicability of Carleman estimates may be limited by the distribution of degenerate points and regularity of the equation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The Carleman estimates for uniformly elliptic PDEs inspire exploration of exact observability conditions for degenerate PDEs.

papers.title: Modeling Stochastic Multi-Agent Interaction in Intraday Battery Energy Storage Dispatch with Market Power
papers.summary: We develop a stochastic game-theoretic model for intraday dispatch of grid-scale battery energy storage systems (BESSs). We assume that each BESS operator competitively manages her state-of-charge to maximize energy arbitrage revenues, driven by the endogenized electricity price that depends on the sum of the charging rates. We characterize the Nash equilibrium of the resulting finite-player linear-quadratic differential game with a shared stochastic driver, obtaining semi-explicit representations of equilibrium feedback controls and equilibrium prices both in the general heterogeneous and the simplified homogeneous BESS setting, via a system of Riccati equations. We then analyze competitive effects, including the marginal externality of additional BESS entering the market, the benefit of coordination and the corresponding market power of large operators, and supply effects from hybrid-type BESSs. We further study the asymptotic regime as the number of agents grows large. Our model provides a quantitative testbed to study the impact of decentralized BESS deployment on the grid and the resulting reduction in daily price spreads.

ai.tldr: 提出一个随机博弈模型，分析日内电池储能系统调度中多个运营商的市场力与竞争效应。
ai.motivation: 现有模型未充分考虑日内调度中储能运营商之间的策略互动及其对电价的内生影响。
ai.method: 建立有限玩家线性二次型随机微分博弈，通过Riccati方程组得到纳什均衡的半显式解。
ai.result: 获得了均衡反馈控制和电价的半显式表达式，分析了新增储能、协调收益、市场力及混合型储能的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解分散式储能部署对电网和日内价差的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑储能运营商具有不同风险偏好或信息不对称时的均衡特性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设线性二次型结构，可能无法捕捉非线性约束或离散决策。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用Riccati方程解析解可设计高效的分布式协调算法。

en.tldr: A stochastic game-theoretic model for intraday battery energy storage dispatch with market power and competitive effects.
en.motivation: Existing models overlook strategic interactions among storage operators and endogenous price impacts in intraday dispatch.
en.method: Finite-player linear-quadratic stochastic differential game solved via Riccati equations for semi-explicit Nash equilibrium.
en.result: Semi-explicit equilibrium feedback controls and prices; analysis of entry, coordination, market power, and hybrid storage.
en.help_to_user: Quantifies the impact of decentralized BESS deployment on grid and daily price spreads.

idea_spark.risk: Linear-quadratic structure may miss nonlinear constraints or discrete decisions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analytical solutions via Riccati equations can enable efficient distributed coordination algorithms.

papers.title: Low-Order Conservation Law Multipliers for a Generalized Fifth-Order KP Family
papers.summary: We study local conservation law multipliers for a generalized fifth-order Kadomtsev--Petviashvili family whose one-dimensional reductions include the Lax, Sawada--Kotera, and Kaup--Kupershmidt equations. Using the direct multiplier method, we classify zeroth-order multipliers that are independent of the dependent variable within a natural polynomial subclass and construct representative conserved vectors. We then prove that every multiplier of differential order at most two is necessarily of differential order at most one. An unrestricted first-order classification is obtained when the coefficient of the cubic derivative nonlinearity is nonzero, and the same reduction is established on a generic algebraic sub-branch of the complementary case. In these regimes, all first-order multipliers reduce to the zeroth-order family. A finite list of exceptional branches remains open. The results identify the structural sources responsible for the low-order rigidity of the multiplier problem in the generic regimes treated here.

ai.tldr: 研究广义五阶KP族局部守恒律乘子的低阶刚性，分类零阶乘子并证明二阶乘子必为一阶，在一般情形下一阶乘子退化为零阶。
ai.motivation: 揭示广义五阶KP族中乘子问题低阶刚性的结构根源。
ai.method: 直接乘子法，多项式子类分类，微分阶数约化证明。
ai.result: 零阶乘子分类完成；二阶乘子必为一阶；一般情形下一阶乘子退化为零阶；留下有限例外分支。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解该族方程守恒律乘子的低阶结构，为后续完全分类提供基础。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于其他可积系统族，如高阶KdV或Boussinesq型方程。
idea_spark.risk: 例外分支可能包含高阶乘子，需特殊处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 低阶刚性可能源于方程对称性或可积结构，可结合Painlevé分析探索。

en.tldr: Studies low-order rigidity of local conservation law multipliers for a generalized fifth-order KP family, classifies zeroth-order multipliers, proves second-order multipliers reduce to first-order, and first-order reduce to zeroth-order in generic regimes.
en.motivation: To uncover structural sources responsible for low-order rigidity of the multiplier problem in this family.
en.method: Direct multiplier method, polynomial subclass classification, differential order reduction proofs.
en.result: Zeroth-order multipliers classified; second-order multipliers are at most first-order; first-order multipliers reduce to zeroth-order in generic regimes; finite list of exceptional branches remains open.
en.help_to_user: Provides foundational understanding of low-order multiplier structure for this KP family, aiding future complete classification.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying similar methods to other integrable system families, such as higher-order KdV or Boussinesq-type equations.
idea_spark.risk: Exceptional branches may harbor higher-order multipliers requiring special treatment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Low-order rigidity may stem from symmetry or integrable structure; could explore via Painlevé analysis.

papers.title: Blow-up analysis and a priori bounds for NLS equations on metric graphs
papers.summary: We consider, on a connected metric graph $\mathcal{G}$, a family of nonlinear Schrödinger equations $$   -u'' + W_n(x) u + λ_n u = ρ_n(x)|u|^{p-2}u,   \quad n \in \mathbb{N}.   \qquad (*) $$ We assume that $p > 2$, $(W_n)$, $(ρ_n) \subseteq L^{\infty}(\mathcal{G})$ with $ρ_n \geq 0$, $|W_n|_{L^\infty(\mathcal{G})}$ and $|ρ_n|_{L^\infty(\mathcal{G})}$ are bounded and $λ_n \to +\infty$. Given $n \in \mathbb{N}$, we call "solution" a function $u_n \in H^1(\mathcal{G})$ which satisfies (*) for that $n\in \mathbb{N}$ together with the Kirchhoff conditions at the vertices. Focusing on the limiting behavior of sequences $(u_n) \subseteq H^1(\mathcal{G})$ of solutions as $λ_n \to + \infty$ and assuming that the Morse index $m(u_n)$ of $u_n$ is uniformly bounded, we establish, the existence of a finite subset of blow-up points away from which, up to a subsequence, $|u_n|$ has a global exponential decay. These points are generally a strict subset of the blow-up points, and their number is estimated by the bound on the Morse index of $(u_n)$. It is the first time that this global exponential decay property is established on graphs even if one consider only signed solutions. In the last part of the paper we derive various results of a priori bounds on the solutions in $L^\infty$ and $L^2$. Our blow-up analysis, combined with ODE arguments allows, for frequently considered classes of graphs, to obtain a fairly complete picture of the relationships between the number of nodal regions, Morse index, $L^\infty$ and $L^2$ norms of solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究了度量图上非线性薛定谔方程解的爆破分析与先验界，建立了在Morse指数一致有界时解的全局指数衰减性质。
ai.motivation: 理解度量图上NLS方程解在参数趋于无穷时的极限行为，特别是爆破点的分布与解的衰减性质。
ai.method: 结合爆破分析、Morse指数估计和常微分方程论证，利用Kirchhoff条件处理顶点连接。
ai.result: 证明了存在有限个爆破点，远离这些点时解具有全局指数衰减，且爆破点数目受Morse指数界控制；并得到了L∞和L²范数的先验界。
ai.help_to_user: 为度量图上NLS方程解的定性行为提供了系统分析工具，可用于研究图上的非线性色散方程。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图的拓扑结构（如顶点连接）来限制爆破点的位置和数目，可能导出更精细的紧性结果。
idea_spark.risk: 对于复杂图结构（如无限图或带环的图），指数衰减的全局性可能不成立，需要额外条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将图上的局部爆破行为与全局拓扑约束相结合，可能为图上的模式形成问题提供新视角。

en.tldr: We study blow-up analysis and a priori bounds for NLS equations on metric graphs, establishing global exponential decay of solutions away from a finite set of blow-up points under uniform Morse index bound.
en.motivation: To understand the limiting behavior of solutions to NLS equations on metric graphs as parameters tend to infinity, focusing on blow-up points and decay properties.
en.method: Blow-up analysis combined with Morse index estimates and ODE arguments, using Kirchhoff conditions at vertices.
en.result: Existence of a finite set of blow-up points such that, up to a subsequence, |u_n| decays globally exponentially away from them; the number of such points is bounded by the Morse index. Also, a priori L∞ and L² bounds are derived.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic framework for analyzing qualitative properties of NLS solutions on metric graphs, applicable to nonlinear dispersive equations on networks.

idea_spark.idea: Exploiting graph topology (e.g., vertex connections) to restrict the location and number of blow-up points may yield sharper compactness results.
idea_spark.risk: For complex graph structures (e.g., infinite graphs or loops), global exponential decay may fail without additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Merging local blow-up behavior with global topological constraints on graphs could offer new insights into pattern formation on networks.

papers.title: Before and beyond the mixing time: New approximations for additive functionals of stationary Gauss-Markov processes
papers.summary: Whereas classical invariance principles for ergodic Markov chains address the situation in which the time horizon of observations is much larger than the mixing time, the quality of approximation is questionable when this is not the case anymore -- even when starting the Markov chain in the invariant law. In this article, we prove quantitative and functional limit theorems for additive functionals along triangular arrays of stationary Gaussian Markov processes when the mixing time $t_{\text{mix}}$ scales sub-, super- and proportionately to the number of observations $n$. Our major finding is a phase-transition at $t_{\text{mix}}\asymp n$, together with the identification and interrelation properties of the emerging new limit processes at and before the mixing time.

ai.tldr: 研究了平稳高斯马尔可夫过程加性泛函在混合时间与观测时间不同尺度下的极限行为，发现了混合时间与观测次数成比例时的相变现象。
ai.motivation: 经典遍历马尔可夫链的不变性原理要求观测时间远大于混合时间，当这一条件不满足时近似质量存疑，即使链从不变分布启动。
ai.method: 针对三角阵列中的平稳高斯马尔可夫过程，考虑混合时间与观测次数n呈次、超和正比三种标度，证明定量和泛函极限定理。
ai.result: 主要发现是当混合时间与n同阶时出现相变，并识别出混合时间之前和之时的新极限过程及其相互关系。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在混合时间与观测时间可比或更短时，加性泛函的极限行为，为短时间序列的统计推断提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将混合时间标度作为控制参数，系统研究不同标度下极限过程的分类与过渡，可能揭示更多非经典极限行为。
idea_spark.risk: 新极限过程可能难以解析刻画，且实际应用中混合时间未知或难以估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在机器学习中处理短时间序列或在线学习时，考虑混合时间与样本量的相对关系对收敛速度的影响。

en.tldr: Studies the limit behavior of additive functionals of stationary Gauss-Markov processes when the mixing time scales sub-, super- and proportionately to the number of observations, revealing a phase transition when mixing time is of order n.
en.motivation: Classical invariance principles for ergodic Markov chains require the observation horizon to be much larger than the mixing time; approximation quality is questionable otherwise, even when starting from the invariant distribution.
en.method: Considers triangular arrays of stationary Gaussian Markov processes with mixing time scaling sub-, super- and proportionately to n, proving quantitative and functional limit theorems.
en.result: Main finding is a phase transition at mixing time of order n, along with identification and interrelation properties of new limit processes at and before the mixing time.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical understanding of additive functional limits when mixing time is comparable to or shorter than the observation horizon, aiding statistical inference for short time series.

idea_spark.idea: Use mixing time scaling as a control parameter to systematically classify limit behaviors across different regimes, potentially revealing non-classical limits.
idea_spark.risk: New limit processes may be difficult to characterize analytically, and mixing time is often unknown or hard to estimate in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires consideration of the relative scaling of mixing time and sample size on convergence rates in machine learning tasks with short sequences or online learning.

papers.title: An Algorithm for On-Sensor Agnostic Detection of Changes in Human Activity for Ultra-Low-Power Applications
papers.summary: Wearable devices running Human Activity Recognition(HAR) on Inertial Measurement Units~(IMUs) waste energy by performing continuous classification for each window, even during long periods of unchanged activity. We address this with a lightweight change-detection gate: a non-parametric algorithm based on dynamic template matching that runs continuously at only approximately 16kFLOPs per step, requires no offline training, and does not need prior definition of target activity classes. The gate invokes the full HAR network only when it detects an activity change, reducing the computational load by over 67% in realistic monitoring settings. The algorithm is evaluated on smart glasses, smartwatch, and smartphone data, requiring only a brief device-specific calibration phase. The gate achieves 98% sensitivity on UCA-EHAR, ensuring no genuine activity transition is missed, while 75% specificity keeps unnecessary HAR invocations low. Results on WISDM are 97% sensitivity and 76% specificity, demonstrating robustness and flexibility to various settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级变化检测门控算法，通过动态模板匹配在传感器端实时检测人类活动变化，仅在活动变化时唤醒全精度HAR网络，从而大幅降低计算能耗。
ai.motivation: 可穿戴设备持续运行HAR网络会浪费大量能量，尤其在长时间无活动变化时。
ai.method: 基于动态模板匹配的非参数变化检测门控，无需离线训练或预定义活动类别，计算量仅约16kFLOPs/步。
ai.result: 在UCA-EHAR数据集上灵敏度98%、特异度75%；在WISDM上灵敏度97%、特异度76%；计算负载降低超过67%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解如何通过简单的传感器端变化检测来显著延长可穿戴设备的电池寿命。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态模板匹配与更复杂的异常检测模型结合，或引入自适应阈值以提升特异度。
idea_spark.risk: 在活动变化非常细微或噪声较大的场景中，灵敏度可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类感知中“只关注变化”的启发，将计算资源集中在真正需要处理的事件上。
