en.tldr: Proposes an integrated communication and control (ICoCo) framework that uses the control plant itself as a communication channel for implicit coordination between a leader and a follower in decentralized LQG control with asymmetric information.
en.motivation: In decentralized LQG control, the leader knows the target state but the follower does not, and there is no explicit communication channel, leading to information asymmetry that requires an implicit communication mechanism for coordination.
en.method: The leader encodes the target state into its control input via an additive communication term, and the follower decodes it from the resulting state trajectory; an implicit coordination scheme is designed based on joint source-channel coding, and the communication power design is formulated as an optimal control problem.
en.result: The follower's estimation error decreases monotonically to zero, enabling the two agents to steer the system to the target state; numerical results show the control cost approaches the explicit-communication lower bound.
en.help_to_user: This framework provides an implicit coordination method for multi-agent systems without explicit communication channels, applicable to scenarios such as drone swarms and robot collaboration.

idea_spark.idea: Combining deep learning for end-to-end learning of joint encoding and controller design may further improve performance.
idea_spark.risk: Implicit communication may introduce additional control cost and is sensitive to model errors; robustness needs to be considered in practical deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by implicit signaling in biological groups (e.g., ant pheromones), using physical interaction as a communication medium.

papers.title: High-dimensional limits for reflected Brownian motion in the orthant
papers.summary: We study interacting Brownian particles on the half-line whose interaction occurs through boundary local times at the origin. The particle system is given by \[ X_i^n(t)=X^n_{0,i}+W_i^n(t)+L_i^n(t) +\frac{1}{n-1}\sum_{j\ne i}ρ^n_{ij}L_j^n(t), \qquad i\in[n],\ t\ge0, \] where the initial conditions are exchangeable, the driving Brownian motions $W_i^n$ are i.i.d., and $L_i^n$ denotes the boundary local time of $X_i^n$ at zero. For each fixed coefficient array $\{ρ^n_{ij}\}$, the system can be viewed as a semimartingale reflected Brownian motion in the orthant. We first consider the homogeneous case $ρ^n_{ij}=a$. In this case, global well-posedness holds under the completely-$\mathcal S$ condition $a>-1$. We prove propagation of chaos under this condition; the subregime $a\in(-1,0]$, in the homogeneous setting, was previously covered as part of the results of \cite{baker2025particle}. The limiting process is the nonlinear reflected Brownian motion \[ \bar X(t)=\bar X_0+\bar W(t)+\bar L(t)+a\mathbb E[\bar L(t)], \qquad t\ge0. \] We also treat heterogeneous random coefficients $ρ^n_{ij}$, assumed to have mean $a$, support in a compact subset of $(-1,1)$, and to be independent across $j$ for each $i$. In both the quenched and annealed settings, the particle system converges to the same McKean--Vlasov limit as in the homogeneous case. The model is motivated by large Jackson networks in heavy traffic.

ai.tldr: 研究半直线上通过边界局部时间相互作用的布朗粒子系统，在高维极限下证明混沌传播，并得到非线性反射布朗运动作为极限过程。
ai.motivation: 受重交通下大型Jackson网络的启发，建立反射布朗运动在高维下的极限理论。
ai.method: 利用交换初始条件、独立同分布驱动布朗运动及边界局部时间，将系统建模为正交象限中的半鞅反射布朗运动，通过齐次和异质随机系数两种情况分析。
ai.result: 在完全-𝒮条件（a > -1）下，齐次情形证明混沌传播；异质随机系数（均值为a，支撑在(-1,1)紧子集）下，淬火和退火设置均收敛到相同的McKean-Vlasov极限。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解高维相互作用扩散系统的平均场极限提供严格数学框架，尤其适用于排队网络和随机过程领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将异质系数视为随机图上的边权，探索网络拓扑对极限行为的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 异质系数假设独立于每个i的j，可能忽略实际网络中的相关性，导致模型过于理想化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合图论与随机分析，研究稀疏或稠密随机图上的反射布朗运动极限。

en.tldr: We study interacting Brownian particles on the half-line via boundary local times, prove propagation of chaos in high-dimensional limits, and obtain a nonlinear reflected Brownian motion as the limiting process.
en.motivation: Motivated by large Jackson networks in heavy traffic, we develop limit theory for reflected Brownian motion in high dimensions.
en.method: Using exchangeable initial conditions, i.i.d. driving Brownian motions, and boundary local times, the system is modeled as a semimartingale reflected Brownian motion in the orthant, analyzed under homogeneous and heterogeneous random coefficients.
en.result: Under the completely-𝒮 condition (a > -1), propagation of chaos holds for the homogeneous case; for heterogeneous random coefficients (mean a, support in a compact subset of (-1,1)), both quenched and annealed settings converge to the same McKean-Vlasov limit.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for mean-field limits of high-dimensional interacting diffusion systems, particularly useful for queueing networks and stochastic processes.

idea_spark.idea: Treat heterogeneous coefficients as edge weights on a random graph to explore the impact of network topology on limiting behavior.
idea_spark.risk: The assumption of independence across j for each i may ignore correlations in real networks, making the model overly idealized.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine graph theory and stochastic analysis to study limits of reflected Brownian motion on sparse or dense random graphs.

papers.title: Phase-space measurements and decoherence for angular momentum systems
papers.summary: The monitoring of the three independent components of the angular momentum (or spin) of a quantum system by its environment that does not isolate any preferred orientation is modelled in two different ways. One describes the dynamics by the Lindblad equation generated by three independent angular momentum operators. The other uses iterated measurements of the ``phase-space'' point on the sphere in terms of the positive operator-valued measure generated by SU(2) coherent states. In contrast to the equivalent scenario on a flat phase space, these two models give rise to subtle differences. Specifically, it is shown that the two super-operators corresponding to the two decoherence models for angular momentum systems are commutative, but their eigenvalues are different. Hence although both models give rise to phase-space decoherence, their dynamical behaviours are not equivalent. In either model, we find that the characterisation of classicality as represented by the decay rates of the elements of the density matrix (i.e. decoherence) and that as represented by the positivity of the quasiprobability distribution are not equivalent for angular momentum systems.

ai.tldr: 研究了角动量系统在无偏好取向环境下的两种退相干模型，发现它们虽然可交换但动力学不等价，且经典性判据不一致。
ai.motivation: 探索角动量系统在无偏好环境中的退相干机制，并比较两种不同建模方式的差异。
ai.method: 采用Lindblad方程和基于SU(2)相干态的正算子值测度两种模型，分析其超算符特征值及动力学行为。
ai.result: 两种模型超算符可交换但特征值不同，导致动力学不等价；密度矩阵衰减率与准概率分布正定性给出的经典性判据不一致。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解角动量系统退相干的两种建模差异，以及经典性判据的局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用两种模型的不等价性，设计实验区分环境对系统不同自由度的耦合方式。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现可能困难，需精确控制环境对三个角动量分量的独立监测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发思考量子经典过渡中，不同退相干模型对经典性定义的敏感性。

en.tldr: Investigates two decoherence models for angular momentum systems under orientation-unbiased environments, finding them commutative but dynamically inequivalent, with inconsistent classicality criteria.
en.motivation: To explore decoherence mechanisms for angular momentum systems in unbiased environments and compare two different modeling approaches.
en.method: Uses Lindblad equation and positive operator-valued measure based on SU(2) coherent states, analyzing eigenvalues and dynamics of the corresponding superoperators.
en.result: The two superoperators commute but have different eigenvalues, leading to inequivalent dynamics; classicality criteria from density matrix decay rates and quasiprobability positivity disagree.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand differences between two decoherence models for angular momentum systems and limitations of classicality criteria.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the inequivalence of the two models to design experiments distinguishing environmental coupling to different degrees of freedom.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental realization may be challenging, requiring precise control of independent monitoring of three angular momentum components.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires reflection on the sensitivity of classicality definitions to different decoherence models in the quantum-to-classical transition.

papers.title: Toward a Scientific Discovery Engine for Weather and Climate Data: A Visual Analytics Workbench for Embedding-Based Exploration
papers.summary: Earth system science is producing increasingly large, high-dimensional datasets from physics based Earth system models to AI-based weather and climate models. Embedding-based representations can make these data searchable through similarity search and analog retrieval, but nearest neighbors in latent space are not automatically scientifically meaningful: it may reflect real weather structure, or preprocessing, geography, or model bias. Researchers therefore need ways to inspect how embeddings organize meteorological data, compare representation models, develop retrieval strategies, and verify results against physical evidence.   We present an open-source visual analytics workbench for each of these steps. The system links embedding experiments to source data, metadata, spatial context, and model configurations, so latent-space results can be traced back to the physics. Users can explore latent spaces for different models, issue global or localized queries, and inspect analogs through familiar meteorological views. This enables a discovery workflow in which scientists characterize a phenomenon of interest in a well-understood dataset, identifying its signature in latent space, and then use that signature to probe larger, less-labeled archives or ensembles for similar events. We demonstrate the workbench through tropical-cyclone retrieval using ERA5-derived embeddings and IBTrACS metadata, and evaluate its out-of-core retrieval backend to show that large embedding collections can be searched beyond in-memory limits on commodity workstation hardware.

ai.tldr: 提出一个开源可视化分析工作台，支持通过嵌入表示对天气和气候数据进行相似性搜索和类比检索，并验证结果的物理意义。
ai.motivation: 地球系统科学产生大量高维数据，嵌入表示可支持搜索，但潜在空间中的最近邻不一定具有科学意义，需要工具来检查和组织这些嵌入。
ai.method: 构建一个可视化分析工作台，将嵌入实验与源数据、元数据、空间上下文和模型配置链接，支持全局或局部查询，并通过气象视图检查类比结果。
ai.result: 通过热带气旋检索案例（使用ERA5嵌入和IBTrACS元数据）展示了工作台的有效性，并评估了其外核检索后端，证明可在普通工作站上搜索超出内存限制的大型嵌入集合。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员探索不同模型的潜在空间，追溯嵌入结果到物理过程，并利用已知数据集中的特征签名在更大、标签较少的档案中寻找类似事件。

idea_spark.idea: 结合物理约束和可视化交互，开发一个通用的科学发现引擎，使嵌入表示不仅用于搜索，还能自动生成可解释的物理假设。
idea_spark.risk: 嵌入表示可能过度依赖训练数据分布，导致在极端或罕见事件上的检索偏差；可视化交互可能引入主观性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受气象学中类比检索和物理验证需求的启发，将可视化分析与嵌入技术结合，形成闭环的科学发现流程。

zh.tldr: 提出一个开源可视化分析工作台，支持通过嵌入表示对天气和气候数据进行相似性搜索和类比检索，并验证结果的物理意义。
zh.motivation: 地球系统科学产生大量高维数据，嵌入表示可支持搜索，但潜在空间中的最近邻不一定具有科学意义，需要工具来检查和组织这些嵌入。
zh.method: 构建一个可视化分析工作台，将嵌入实验与源数据、元数据、空间上下文和模型配置链接，支持全局或局部查询，并通过气象视图检查类比结果。
zh.result: 通过热带气旋检索案例（使用ERA5嵌入和IBTrACS元数据）展示了工作台的有效性，并评估了其外核检索后端，证明可在普通工作站上搜索超出内存限制的大型嵌入集合。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员探索不同模型的潜在空间，追溯嵌入结果到物理过程，并利用已知数据集中的特征签名在更大、标签较少的档案中寻找类似事件。

idea_spark.idea: 结合物理约束和可视化交互，开发一个通用的科学发现引擎，使嵌入表示不仅用于搜索，还能自动生成可解释的物理假设。
idea_spark.risk: 嵌入表示可能过度依赖训练数据分布，导致在极端或罕见事件上的检索偏差；可视化交互可能引入主观性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受气象学中类比检索和物理验证需求的启发，将可视化分析与嵌入技术结合，形成闭环的科学发现流程。

en.tldr: Presents an open-source visual analytics workbench that enables similarity search and analog retrieval on weather and climate data via embeddings, with verification against physical evidence.
en.motivation: Earth system science produces large high-dimensional datasets; embeddings enable search, but nearest neighbors in latent space are not automatically scientifically meaningful, requiring tools to inspect and organize them.
en.method: Builds a visual analytics workbench linking embedding experiments to source data, metadata, spatial context, and model configurations, supporting global or localized queries and inspection of analogs through meteorological views.
en.result: Demonstrated via tropical cyclone retrieval using ERA5 embeddings and IBTrACS metadata; evaluated out-of-core retrieval backend showing large embedding collections can be searched beyond memory limits on commodity hardware.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers explore latent spaces of different models, trace embedding results back to physics, and use signatures from well-understood datasets to probe larger, less-labeled archives for similar events.

idea_spark.idea: Combine physical constraints with visual interaction to develop a general scientific discovery engine where embeddings not only enable search but also automatically generate interpretable physical hypotheses.
idea_spark.risk: Embeddings may over-rely on training data distribution, causing retrieval bias for extreme or rare events; visual interaction may introduce subjectivity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for analog retrieval and physical verification in meteorology, combining visual analytics with embedding techniques to form a closed-loop discovery workflow.

papers.title: Cardiac Mesh Flow: One-Step Generation of 3D+t Cardiac Four-Chamber Meshes via Flow Matching
papers.summary: Spatio-temporal (3D+t) generative modelling of cardiac shape and motion is crucial for understanding heart structure and function at population scale. Existing generative models for cardiac shape synthesis either adopt volumetric shape representations that lack anatomical correspondence across different time points and subjects, or rely on VAE-based frameworks that suffer from a trade-off between reconstruction fidelity and generative diversity. In this work, we propose Cardiac Mesh Flow, a novel generative flow model for 3D+t cardiac four-chamber mesh generation with anatomical correspondence, temporal coherence, and periodic consistency. Leveraging the flow matching technique, Cardiac Mesh Flow performs efficient one-step generation of multi-scale free-form deformation fields, which warp a template mesh to generate cardiac four-chamber meshes across a cardiac cycle. Furthermore, Cardiac Mesh Flow enables controllable generation conditioned on cardiac chamber volumes, allowing precise control of the synthetic heart. Experimental results demonstrate that Cardiac Mesh Flow achieves high fidelity and diversity on both unconditional and conditional generation, compared to state-of-the-art 3D+t cardiac mesh generation methods.

ai.tldr: 提出Cardiac Mesh Flow，利用流匹配技术一步生成具有解剖对应、时间一致性和周期一致性的3D+t心脏四腔网格。
ai.motivation: 现有心脏形状生成方法要么使用缺乏解剖对应的体素表示，要么依赖VAE框架在重建保真度和生成多样性之间存在权衡。
ai.method: 基于流匹配，学习多尺度自由形变场，将模板网格变形为整个心动周期的心脏四腔网格，支持无条件生成和基于心室容积的条件生成。
ai.result: 在无条件生成和条件生成任务上，与最先进的3D+t心脏网格生成方法相比，实现了更高的保真度和多样性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效生成具有解剖一致性和时间连贯性的心脏网格，支持基于心室容积的精确控制，可用于大规模心脏形态与功能研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将多尺度形变场与流匹配结合，实现高效且可控的4D网格生成。
idea_spark.risk: 对模板网格的依赖可能限制生成形状的多样性，条件控制仅基于容积可能忽略其他临床参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受流匹配在图像生成中的成功启发，将其应用于4D心脏网格生成，并引入多尺度形变场以保持解剖对应。

idea_spark.risk: 对模板网格的依赖可能限制生成形状的多样性，条件控制仅基于容积可能忽略其他临床参数。

en.tldr: Proposes Cardiac Mesh Flow, which uses flow matching for one-step generation of 3D+t cardiac four-chamber meshes with anatomical correspondence, temporal coherence, and periodic consistency.
en.motivation: Existing methods either use volumetric representations lacking anatomical correspondence or rely on VAE frameworks with a trade-off between reconstruction fidelity and generative diversity.
en.method: Leverages flow matching to learn multi-scale free-form deformation fields that warp a template mesh to generate cardiac four-chamber meshes over a cardiac cycle, supporting both unconditional and conditional generation based on chamber volumes.
en.result: Achieves higher fidelity and diversity on both unconditional and conditional generation compared to state-of-the-art 3D+t cardiac mesh generation methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently generate cardiac meshes with anatomical consistency and temporal coherence, with precise control via chamber volumes, useful for large-scale cardiac morphology and function studies.

idea_spark.idea: Combines multi-scale deformation fields with flow matching for efficient and controllable 4D mesh generation.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on a template mesh may limit shape diversity; conditional control only via volume may overlook other clinical parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of flow matching in image generation, applied to 4D cardiac mesh generation with multi-scale deformation fields to preserve anatomical correspondence.

papers.title: On the observability of the Schrödinger equation in the torus from open sets
papers.summary: We study the observability of the Schrödinger equation on the $d$-dimensional torus $\mathbb T^d$, $d \geq 1$, from an open subset $ω\subset \mathbb T^d$. Our first main result establishes a quantitative observability estimate for the free Schrödinger equation in the regime of small times $T$ and for small observation sets of the form $ω= \prod_{j=1}^{d}(a_j,b_j)$. Our second main result shows that observability holds for the Schrödinger equation with a merely bounded potential $V \in L^{\infty}(\mathbb T^d)$, in any dimension $d \geq 1$, for every time $T>0$ and every nonempty open subset $ω$. This resolves a well-known conjecture in the field. A central ingredient in the proof is a cluster decomposition method combined with an induction scheme introduced by Bourgain and further developed by Burq and Zhu.

ai.tldr: 研究了d维环面上薛定谔方程从开子集的可观测性，解决了有界势情形下的著名猜想。
ai.motivation: 解决环面上薛定谔方程从开子集可观测性的长期猜想，特别是对有界势的情形。
ai.method: 采用簇分解方法和Bourgain引入、Burq与Zhu发展的归纳方案。
ai.result: 建立了自由薛定谔方程在小时间和小观测集下的定量可观测性估计；证明了任意维数、任意正时间和任意非空开子集下，有界势薛定谔方程的可观测性。
ai.help_to_user: 为偏微分方程控制理论和量子力学中的观测问题提供了严格的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用簇分解将全局可观测性分解为局部问题，再通过归纳逐步建立整体估计。
idea_spark.risk: 归纳步骤可能依赖于特定几何结构（如环面），推广到一般流形需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合调和分析与控制论，为复杂系统的可观测性提供新工具。

zh.tldr: 研究了d维环面上薛定谔方程从开子集的可观测性，解决了有界势情形下的著名猜想。

en.tldr: Studies the observability of the Schrödinger equation on the d-dimensional torus from open subsets, resolving a well-known conjecture for bounded potentials.
en.motivation: To resolve the long-standing conjecture on observability of the Schrödinger equation from open subsets on the torus, especially for bounded potentials.
en.method: Uses a cluster decomposition method combined with an induction scheme introduced by Bourgain and further developed by Burq and Zhu.
en.result: Establishes a quantitative observability estimate for the free Schrödinger equation for small times and small observation sets; proves observability for the Schrödinger equation with bounded potential in any dimension, for any positive time and any nonempty open subset.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical foundations for control theory of PDEs and observation problems in quantum mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose global observability into local problems via cluster decomposition, then build the overall estimate step by step through induction.
idea_spark.risk: The induction steps may rely on specific geometric structure (e.g., torus); generalization to general manifolds may require additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining harmonic analysis with control theory offers new tools for observability of complex systems.

papers.title: SRGAN-CKAN: Expressive Super-Resolution with Nonlinear Functional Operators under Minimal Resources
papers.summary: Single-Image Super-Resolution (SISR) aims to reconstruct a High-Resolution (HR) image from a Low-Resolution (LR) observation, a fundamentally ill-posed problem where high-frequency details are severely degraded at large upscaling factors. Recent advances have been driven by transformer-based architectures and diffusion models improve global context modeling and perceptual quality at the cost of increased computational complexity. In contrast, this work focuses on enhancing the expressivity of local operators under minimal resources. We propose SRGAN--CKAN, a hybrid super-resolution framework that integrates Convolutional Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (CKAN) into an adversarial learning setting reformulating convolution as a nonlinear patch-based transformation. The proposed operator replaces linear local mappings with spline-based functional representations, allowing expressive modeling of complex local structures and high-frequency textures using minimal hardware resources. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach improves perceptual quality while preserving reconstruction fidelity, achieving a favorable balance between distortion-based and perceptual metrics. These results are obtained under constrained computational settings, highlighting the efficiency of the proposed formulation. Overall, this work introduces a complementary direction to existing approaches by improving the representational power of local transformations, providing an efficient and scalable alternative to globally intensive architectures.

ai.tldr: 提出SRGAN-CKAN，用卷积Kolmogorov-Arnold网络替代传统卷积，在极小资源下实现高表达力的超分辨率重建。
ai.motivation: 现有基于Transformer和扩散模型的超分辨率方法计算复杂度过高，难以在资源受限场景部署。
ai.method: 将卷积层替换为基于样条的非线性局部变换（CKAN），并嵌入对抗学习框架。
ai.result: 在保持重建保真度的同时提升感知质量，在有限计算资源下取得优于传统方法的平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量级超分辨率方案，适合边缘设备或实时应用。

idea_spark.idea: 用可学习的非线性函数替代固定卷积核，增强局部建模能力。
idea_spark.risk: 样条表示可能增加过拟合风险，且训练稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理引入卷积网络，为轻量级高表达力模型设计提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes SRGAN-CKAN, replacing standard convolutions with Kolmogorov-Arnold networks for expressive super-resolution under minimal resources.
en.motivation: Existing transformer and diffusion models for super-resolution are computationally heavy, limiting deployment on resource-constrained devices.
en.method: Replaces convolutional layers with spline-based nonlinear local transforms (CKAN) within an adversarial learning framework.
en.result: Improves perceptual quality while maintaining reconstruction fidelity, achieving a favorable trade-off under limited computational budgets.
en.help_to_user: Offers a lightweight super-resolution solution suitable for edge devices or real-time applications.

idea_spark.idea: Replace fixed convolution kernels with learnable nonlinear functions to enhance local modeling capacity.
idea_spark.risk: Spline representations may increase overfitting risk and require careful training stability analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem into convolutional networks opens a new direction for designing lightweight yet expressive models.

papers.title: The Mesoscopic Partition Function:A Combined Spatial and Phase-Space Cell Structure
papers.summary: We introduce a mesoscopic partition function for classical many-body systems based on a combined spatial and phase-space coarse-graining, replacing the canonical phase-space integral with a discrete sum over occupation numbers. The construction recovers the standard canonical partition function in the fine-graining limit. Our main result shows that factorisation of the mesoscopic partition function across spatial cells is equivalent to extensivity of the coarse-grained free energy, with deviations governed by inter-cell correlations quantifiable via mutual information. We derive a generalised Euler relation with a subextensive correction encoding boundary and correlation effects. Together, these results provide a unified framework linking coarse-graining, factorisation, and extensivity in mesoscopic thermodynamics.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于空间和相空间粗粒化的介观配分函数，用离散占据数求和替代正则相空间积分，并证明其因子化等价于粗粒化自由能的广延性，偏差由互信息量化。
ai.motivation: 经典多体系统的正则配分函数在介观尺度下难以直接计算，需要一种结合空间和相空间粗粒化的统一框架来连接微观与宏观热力学。
ai.method: 通过将相空间积分替换为空间格子上的离散占据数求和，构造介观配分函数，并利用互信息分析格子间关联对自由能广延性的影响。
ai.result: 介观配分函数在细粒化极限下恢复标准正则配分函数；其因子化等价于粗粒化自由能的广延性，非广延修正由互信息描述；推导出包含边界和关联效应的广义欧拉关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为介观热力学中的粗粒化、因子化和广延性提供了统一数学框架，有助于理解多体系统的尺度依赖行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用互信息量化粗粒化过程中的信息损失，可能用于设计更高效的模拟算法。
idea_spark.risk: 离散化格子大小选择可能影响结果，需谨慎处理粗粒化尺度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将配分函数因子化与自由能广延性等价，启发我们重新审视热力学极限的数学基础。

idea_spark.risk: 离散化格子大小选择可能影响结果，需谨慎处理粗粒化尺度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将配分函数因子化与自由能广延性等价，启发我们重新审视热力学极限的数学基础。

en.tldr: We introduce a mesoscopic partition function based on combined spatial and phase-space coarse-graining, replacing the canonical integral with a discrete sum over occupation numbers, and show that its factorisation is equivalent to extensivity of the coarse-grained free energy, with deviations quantified by mutual information.
en.motivation: The canonical partition function for classical many-body systems is intractable at mesoscopic scales, motivating a unified coarse-graining framework that bridges micro and macro thermodynamics.
en.method: We construct the mesoscopic partition function by replacing the phase-space integral with a discrete sum over occupation numbers in spatial cells, and analyse inter-cell correlations via mutual information.
en.result: The mesoscopic partition function recovers the standard canonical one in the fine-graining limit; its factorisation is equivalent to extensivity of the coarse-grained free energy, with subextensive corrections from correlations; a generalised Euler relation is derived.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified mathematical framework linking coarse-graining, factorisation, and extensivity in mesoscopic thermodynamics, useful for understanding scale-dependent behaviour of many-body systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using mutual information to quantify information loss during coarse-graining may inspire more efficient simulation algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of cell size in discretisation may affect results; careful handling of coarse-graining scale is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The equivalence between partition function factorisation and free energy extensivity prompts a re-examination of the mathematical foundations of the thermodynamic limit.

papers.title: Risk-Averse Ensemble Control for Control-Affine Systems
papers.summary: A number of important modern applications in optimal control can be formulated as open loop control problems in which the underlying dynamical systems are subject to random inputs. These so-called ensemble control problems require the corresponding optimal control to be deterministic, as it must be computed before the realization of uncertainty and the passage of time. Practical applications of ensemble control include quantum control and the training of Neural ODEs. However, the standard approach to ensemble control treats the uncertainty in the objective function via the expectation, which provides optimal controls that only work well on average while ignoring critical outlier phenomena. This study provides a comprehensive mathematical treatment of risk-averse ensemble control. Within this setting, we adopt a control-affine structure that ensures the lower semi-continuity needed for proving the existence of optimal solutions. The central analytical contribution of this paper is a rigorous characterization of the control-to-state mapping in which we establish weak-to-strong continuity, continuous Fréchet differentiability, and weak-to-strong continuity of the derivative operator. Furthermore, this regularity yields primal and dual first-order optimality conditions characterized by an adjoint state of bounded variation, and it fulfills the functional prerequisites required for the convergence of infinite dimensional optimization algorithms. We conclude by validating these theoretical developments through a numerical experiment in quantum control.

ai.tldr: 本文针对受随机输入影响的控制仿射系统，提出了一种风险规避的集总控制方法，并给出了严格的数学分析，包括控制到状态映射的正则性、最优性条件以及数值验证。
ai.motivation: 标准集总控制方法仅优化期望性能，忽略了极端异常现象，而许多实际应用（如量子控制、神经ODE训练）需要处理不确定性并规避风险。
ai.method: 采用控制仿射结构保证下半连续性，通过建立弱到强连续性、Fréchet可微性及导数算子的弱到强连续性，推导出有界变差伴随状态的一阶最优性条件。
ai.result: 严格证明了最优解的存在性，给出了原始和对偶最优性条件，并通过量子控制数值实验验证了理论结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理随机输入下的确定性最优控制问题提供了风险规避的理论框架和可计算的优化条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将风险规避思想与集总控制结合，利用有界变差伴随状态处理非光滑目标。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（控制仿射、弱到强连续性）可能限制在高度非线性或非光滑系统中的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴金融风险度量（如条件风险价值CVaR）到控制领域，可进一步探索其他风险度量（如熵风险）的适用性。

zh.tldr: 本文针对受随机输入影响的控制仿射系统，提出了一种风险规避的集总控制方法，并给出了严格的数学分析，包括控制到状态映射的正则性、最优性条件以及数值验证。
zh.motivation: 标准集总控制方法仅优化期望性能，忽略了极端异常现象，而许多实际应用（如量子控制、神经ODE训练）需要处理不确定性并规避风险。
zh.method: 采用控制仿射结构保证下半连续性，通过建立弱到强连续性、Fréchet可微性及导数算子的弱到强连续性，推导出有界变差伴随状态的一阶最优性条件。
zh.result: 严格证明了最优解的存在性，给出了原始和对偶最优性条件，并通过量子控制数值实验验证了理论结果。
zh.help_to_user: 为处理随机输入下的确定性最优控制问题提供了风险规避的理论框架和可计算的优化条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将风险规避思想与集总控制结合，利用有界变差伴随状态处理非光滑目标。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（控制仿射、弱到强连续性）可能限制在高度非线性或非光滑系统中的应用。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a risk-averse ensemble control method for control-affine systems subject to random inputs, providing rigorous mathematical analysis including regularity of the control-to-state mapping, optimality conditions, and numerical validation.
en.motivation: Standard ensemble control optimizes only expected performance, ignoring critical outlier phenomena, while many practical applications (e.g., quantum control, Neural ODE training) require handling uncertainty and avoiding risks.
en.method: Adopts a control-affine structure to ensure lower semi-continuity, establishes weak-to-strong continuity, Fréchet differentiability, and weak-to-strong continuity of the derivative operator, leading to first-order optimality conditions characterized by an adjoint state of bounded variation.
en.result: Proves existence of optimal solutions, provides primal and dual optimality conditions, and validates the theory through a numerical experiment in quantum control.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and computable optimization conditions for risk-averse deterministic optimal control under random inputs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine risk aversion with ensemble control using bounded variation adjoint states to handle non-smooth objectives.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (control-affine, weak-to-strong continuity) may limit applicability to highly nonlinear or non-smooth systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing financial risk measures (e.g., CVaR) into control, further explore other risk measures (e.g., entropic risk) for ensemble control.

papers.title: A position dependent mass Hamiltonian and abstract ladder operators
papers.summary: We consider the Hamiltonian $H$ of a particle in one dimension with a position dependent mass for which we apply the recent strategy of the so-called {\em abstract ladder operators}, in the attempt to find its eigenvalues and eigenvectors. We don't assume that $H$ is self-adjoint, while we focus on the case of a factorizable operator. We show then that pseudo-bosonic operators play a relevant role in this analysis, and we construct bi-coherent states attached to these operators. Explicit examples are discussed.

ai.tldr: 本文研究一维位置依赖质量粒子的哈密顿量，利用抽象阶梯算子方法求解本征值和本征向量，并构造双相干态。
ai.motivation: 探索非自伴哈密顿量在位置依赖质量系统中的可解性，推广抽象阶梯算子方法。
ai.method: 将哈密顿量分解为可因子化形式，引入伪玻色子算子，构造双相干态。
ai.result: 证明了伪玻色子算子在分析中的关键作用，并给出了显式例子。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理非自伴位置依赖质量哈密顿量的系统框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用伪玻色子算子构造双相干态，可能用于量子信息中的纠缠态制备。
idea_spark.risk: 非自伴性可能导致物理可解释性不足，需验证可观测量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将因子化方法应用于更复杂的势能或高维系统。

en.tldr: This paper studies a position-dependent mass Hamiltonian in one dimension, applying abstract ladder operators to find eigenvalues and eigenvectors, and constructs bi-coherent states.
en.motivation: To explore solvability of non-self-adjoint Hamiltonians in position-dependent mass systems and generalize abstract ladder operator methods.
en.method: Factorize the Hamiltonian, introduce pseudo-bosonic operators, and construct bi-coherent states.
en.result: Demonstrates the key role of pseudo-bosonic operators and provides explicit examples.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic framework for handling non-self-adjoint position-dependent mass Hamiltonians.

idea_spark.idea: Using pseudo-bosonic operators to construct bi-coherent states may enable entanglement generation in quantum information.
idea_spark.risk: Non-self-adjointness may lead to lack of physical interpretability; observables need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply factorization methods to more complex potentials or higher-dimensional systems.

papers.title: UnGAP: Uncertainty-Guided Affine Prompting for Real-Time Crack Segmentation
papers.summary: Real-time crack segmentation is vital for structural health monitoring but is plagued by aleatoric uncertainties arising from varying lighting, blur, and texture ambiguity. Current uncertainty-aware approaches typically treat uncertainty estimation as a passive endpoint for post-hoc analysis, failing to close the loop by feeding this information back to refine feature representations. We contend that independent pixel-wise heteroscedastic modeling is uniquely suited for crack segmentation, as cracks are defined by fine-grained local gradients rather than the global semantic coherence relied upon in general object segmentation. However, this approach suffers from a structural optimization pathology: high predicted variance attenuates loss gradients, effectively causing the model to ignore difficult samples and under-fit complex boundaries. To address these challenges, we propose UnGAP, a novel framework that establishes a closed-loop mechanism between uncertainty estimation and feature learning. Central to our approach is the Uncertainty-Prompted Feature Modulator (UPFM), which treats aleatoric uncertainty as an active visual prompt rather than a mere output. UPFM dynamically calibrates feature distributions through pixel-wise affine transformations. Crucially, this mechanism mitigates the heteroscedastic pathology by transforming high variance, which would otherwise indicate gradient suppression, into a constructive signal for stronger feature rectification in ambiguous regions. Additionally, a boundary-aware detection head is introduced to further constrain prediction precision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UnGAP balances superior segmentation accuracy with real-time inference speed, effectively validating the benefit of transforming uncertainty from a passive metric into an active calibration tool.

ai.tldr: 提出UnGAP框架，将不确定性从被动指标转化为主动校准工具，实现实时裂缝分割。
ai.motivation: 现有不确定性感知方法将不确定性估计作为事后分析，未反馈优化特征表示；异方差建模在裂缝分割中因高方差抑制梯度导致欠拟合。
ai.method: 设计不确定性提示特征调制器（UPFM），通过像素级仿射变换将不确定性作为主动视觉提示动态校准特征分布；引入边界感知检测头。
ai.result: 在保持实时推理速度的同时显著提升分割精度，验证了不确定性主动校准的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将不确定性用于实时裂缝分割的闭环优化方法，可直接应用于结构健康监测系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将异方差不确定性作为特征调制信号，而非仅用于置信度评估。
idea_spark.risk: 仿射变换可能引入额外计算开销，需在实时性与精度间权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉提示学习启发，将不确定性视为一种动态提示来引导特征学习。

en.tldr: Proposes UnGAP, a framework that transforms uncertainty from a passive metric into an active calibration tool for real-time crack segmentation.
en.motivation: Existing uncertainty-aware methods treat uncertainty estimation as a post-hoc analysis endpoint without feeding it back to refine features; heteroscedastic modeling suffers from gradient suppression under high variance, causing underfitting on complex boundaries.
en.method: Designs an Uncertainty-Prompted Feature Modulator (UPFM) that uses pixel-wise affine transformations to treat aleatoric uncertainty as an active visual prompt for dynamic feature calibration; introduces a boundary-aware detection head.
en.result: Achieves superior segmentation accuracy with real-time inference speed, validating the benefit of turning uncertainty into an active calibration tool.
en.help_to_user: Provides a closed-loop uncertainty optimization method for real-time crack segmentation, directly applicable to structural health monitoring systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use heteroscedastic uncertainty as a feature modulation signal rather than merely for confidence assessment.
idea_spark.risk: Affine transformations may introduce extra computational overhead, requiring a trade-off between real-time performance and accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by visual prompt learning, treating uncertainty as a dynamic prompt to guide feature learning.

papers.title: Generic Irreducibility of Bloch Varieties for Periodic Graph Operators
papers.summary: We give a complete characterization of generic irreducibility for dispersion polynomials and Bloch varieties of periodic graph operators. More precisely, we prove that for a generic choice of edge weights and potentials, the dispersion polynomial/Bloch variety of a nontrivial periodic graph is irreducible if and only if the quotient graph is connected.   Our proof uses a strong dichotomy for parameterized Laurent polynomials: reducibility either occurs for every parameter or fails on a nonempty Zariski-open set. After establishing this dichotomy, we reduce the problem to minimally connected periodic graphs.

ai.tldr: 本文完整刻画了周期图算子色散多项式和Bloch簇的通用不可约性，证明当且仅当商图连通时，非平凡周期图的色散多项式/Bloch簇在一般边权和势能下不可约。
ai.motivation: 理解周期图算子能带结构的代数几何性质，特别是Bloch簇的不可约性条件。
ai.method: 建立参数化Laurent多项式的强二分性（要么处处可约，要么在非空Zariski开集上不可约），并将问题约化到极小连通周期图。
ai.result: 对于一般边权和势能，非平凡周期图的色散多项式/Bloch簇不可约当且仅当商图连通。
ai.help_to_user: 为周期图算子的能带理论提供严格的代数几何基础，有助于设计具有特定能带结构的材料或光子晶体。

idea_spark.idea: 利用商图连通性作为判据，可系统构造可约或不可约的周期图算子，用于调控能带拓扑。
idea_spark.risk: 实际材料中边权和势能可能不满足“一般”条件，需验证具体系统的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将图论连通性与代数几何不可约性关联，启发用图结构设计具有特定代数性质的物理系统。

en.tldr: This paper gives a complete characterization of generic irreducibility for dispersion polynomials and Bloch varieties of periodic graph operators, proving that for generic edge weights and potentials, the dispersion polynomial/Bloch variety of a nontrivial periodic graph is irreducible if and only if the quotient graph is connected.
en.motivation: To understand the algebraic-geometric properties of band structures of periodic graph operators, specifically the irreducibility condition of Bloch varieties.
en.method: Establishes a strong dichotomy for parameterized Laurent polynomials (either reducible for every parameter or irreducible on a nonempty Zariski-open set) and reduces the problem to minimally connected periodic graphs.
en.result: For generic edge weights and potentials, the dispersion polynomial/Bloch variety of a nontrivial periodic graph is irreducible if and only if the quotient graph is connected.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous algebraic-geometric foundation for band theory of periodic graph operators, aiding in the design of materials or photonic crystals with specific band structures.

idea_spark.idea: Using quotient graph connectivity as a criterion, one can systematically construct reducible or irreducible periodic graph operators to tune band topology.
idea_spark.risk: In real materials, edge weights and potentials may not satisfy the 'generic' condition; applicability to specific systems needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Linking graph connectivity with algebraic irreducibility inspires the design of physical systems with desired algebraic properties via graph structure.

papers.title: Phase-map synthesis from magnitude-only MR images using conditional score-based diffusion models with application in training of accelerated MRI reconstruction models
papers.summary: Accelerated magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) enabled by the training of deep learning (DL)-based image recon. models requires large and diverse raw k-space datasets. In most clinical MRI applications, due to storage and patient privacy concerns, raw k-space data is discarded and magnitude-only images are the only component saved. Consequently, a large portion of the DL-based MRI recon. literature has either relied on small training datasets or has used one of the few available open-source k-space datasets. At the same time, the growing number of anonymized magnitude-only image registries/databases motivates the development of techniques that can use them as training datasets for generalizable DL-based recon. models. Here we propose to address this challenge by employing a generative approach based on conditional score-based diffusion models (SBDMs): given a magnitude-only MR image, it synthesizes a phase map (in the image domain) that realistically corresponds to the magnitude-only image. We evaluate its generative capabilities in a downstream DL-based recon. task whereby a large k-space dataset is generated by combining the SBDM-synthesized phase-maps and the corresponding magnitude-only images, and this k-space dataset is then used to train a DL model for accelerated MRI recon. We compare the performance of the resulting DL model versus those trained according to (a) a naive approach that uses smooth phase, (b) a k-space training dataset generated using synthesized phase maps derived from a generative adversarial network, and (c) the ground truth k-space data. Our results suggest that the DL model trained from SBDM-synthesized k-space data outperforms the other approaches in terms of quantitative metrics as well as qualitatively observed recon. fidelity, i.e., whether the reconstructed images include erroneous or hallucinated features that could adversely impact diagnostic accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出使用条件分数扩散模型从幅度图像合成相位图，生成k空间数据以训练加速MRI重建模型。
ai.motivation: 临床MRI中原始k空间数据常被丢弃，仅保留幅度图像，导致深度学习重建模型训练数据不足。
ai.method: 基于条件分数扩散模型，从幅度图像合成对应的相位图，结合生成k空间数据训练重建模型。
ai.result: 与平滑相位、GAN合成及真实k空间数据相比，该方法在定量指标和重建保真度上表现更优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户利用大量幅度图像数据库生成高质量k空间数据，提升MRI重建模型性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将扩散模型用于多模态图像合成，例如从T1加权图像合成T2加权图像。
idea_spark.risk: 合成相位图可能引入伪影或不符合生理特征，影响下游诊断准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用生成模型弥补缺失数据，为数据稀缺的医学成像任务提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes using conditional score-based diffusion models to synthesize phase maps from magnitude-only MR images, generating k-space data for training accelerated MRI reconstruction models.
en.motivation: Raw k-space data is often discarded in clinical MRI, leaving only magnitude images, which limits training data for deep learning reconstruction models.
en.method: Employs conditional score-based diffusion models to synthesize realistic phase maps from magnitude images, then combines them to generate k-space data for training reconstruction models.
en.result: Outperforms smooth phase, GAN-based synthesis, and ground truth k-space data in quantitative metrics and reconstruction fidelity.
en.help_to_user: Helps users leverage large magnitude-only image databases to generate high-quality k-space data, improving MRI reconstruction model performance.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using diffusion models for multi-modal image synthesis, e.g., synthesizing T2-weighted images from T1-weighted images.
idea_spark.risk: Synthesized phase maps may introduce artifacts or unphysiological features, affecting downstream diagnostic accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using generative models to compensate for missing data offers a new approach for data-scarce medical imaging tasks.

papers.title: On the redundancy of transitivity constraints in the clique partitioning problem
papers.summary: In this study, we identify a class of redundant transitivity constraints in a 0-1 integer linear programming formulation of the clique partitioning problem. The transitivity constraints in this class can be removed from the formulation without changing the optimal solution set, although each transitivity constraint defines a facet of the associated polytope. This leads to a smaller formulation that is particularly effective for instances arising from correlation clustering, where edge weights are drawn from $\{-1,1\}$. Our computational experiments show that the resulting formulation outperforms existing formulations on such instances.

ai.tldr: 识别团划分问题中一类冗余的传递性约束，移除后不改变最优解集，在相关聚类实例上表现更优。
ai.motivation: 团划分问题的0-1整数线性规划模型中传递性约束数量庞大，影响求解效率。
ai.method: 理论分析证明一类传递性约束是冗余的，尽管每个约束定义关联多面体的一个面。
ai.result: 精简后的模型在边权为{-1,1}的相关聚类实例上优于现有模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过移除冗余约束来简化团划分问题的整数规划模型。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他聚类问题中是否存在类似的结构性冗余约束。
idea_spark.risk: 冗余约束的识别可能依赖于特定的权重分布，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多面体理论出发，系统性地寻找整数规划中的冗余约束。

en.tldr: Identifies a class of redundant transitivity constraints in the clique partitioning problem; removing them yields a smaller formulation that outperforms existing ones on correlation clustering instances.
en.motivation: The large number of transitivity constraints in the 0-1 integer linear programming formulation of clique partitioning hinders computational efficiency.
en.method: Theoretical analysis proves that a class of transitivity constraints is redundant, even though each defines a facet of the associated polytope.
en.result: The reduced formulation outperforms existing formulations on correlation clustering instances with edge weights in {-1,1}.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to simplify integer programming models for clique partitioning by removing redundant constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether similar structural redundancies exist in other clustering problems.
idea_spark.risk: The redundancy may depend on specific weight distributions; general applicability needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Systematically search for redundant constraints in integer programming from a polyhedral perspective.

papers.title: TemPose-TF-ASF: Two-Stage Bidirectional Stroke Context Fusion for Badminton Stroke Classification
papers.summary: Accurate badminton stroke prediction is crucial for fine-grained sports analysis and tactical decision support. However, existing methods struggle to model rich temporal context. This paper introduces \emph{TemPose-TF-ASF (Adjacent-Stroke Fusion)}, a context-aware extension of \emph{TemPose}. It enhances stroke recognition by incorporating stroke-type information from both preceding and subsequent strokes. A two-stage training and inference strategy is adopted. Preliminary predictions from the baseline model are reused as estimated temporal context. These predictions guide the joint optimization of the \emph{ASF} module and the classifier. By explicitly modeling bidirectional temporal stroke dependencies, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing state-of-the-art models. Experiments on a large-scale badminton match dataset show consistent improvements over the baseline and its variants in terms of Accuracy and Macro-F1. Moreover, integrating \emph{ASF} into other advanced methods yields notable performance gains. These results demonstrate strong transferability and generalization capability.

ai.tldr: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF方法，通过双向相邻击球上下文融合提升羽毛球击球分类精度。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以建模丰富的时序上下文，导致击球预测不准确。
ai.method: 采用两阶段训练推理策略，利用基线模型初步预测作为时序上下文，联合优化ASF模块与分类器。
ai.result: 在大型羽毛球比赛数据集上，准确率和Macro-F1均优于基线及变体，且集成到其他先进方法中也有显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过双向时序依赖建模提升细粒度动作分类性能。

idea_spark.risk: 两阶段训练可能引入误差累积，需设计鲁棒的上下文估计机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用相邻动作的类别信息作为显式上下文，启发其他时序预测任务中的上下文增强方法。

papers.title: Sampling-Based Control via Entropy-Regularized Optimal Transport
papers.summary: Sampling-based model predictive control methods like MPPI and CEM are essential for real-time control of nonlinear robotic systems, particularly where discontinuous dynamics preclude gradient-based optimization. However, these methods derive from information-theoretic objectives that are agnostic to the geometry of the control problem, leading to pathological behaviors such as mode-averaging when the cost landscape is complex. We present OT-MPC, a sampling-based algorithm that overcomes these limitations through an entropy-regularized optimal transport formulation. By computing an optimal coupling between candidate control sequences and low-cost proposals, OT-MPC refines candidates toward nearby promising samples while coordinating updates across the ensemble to maintain coverage of the solution space. We derive closed-form, gradient-free updates via the Sinkhorn algorithm, enabling real-time performance. Experiments on navigation, manipulation, and locomotion tasks demonstrate improved success rates over existing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于熵正则化最优传输的采样模型预测控制方法，克服了传统方法在复杂代价景观下的模式平均问题。
ai.motivation: 现有采样MPC方法（如MPPI、CEM）忽略控制问题的几何结构，在复杂代价景观下出现模式平均等病态行为。
ai.method: 通过熵正则化最优传输计算候选控制序列与低代价提议之间的最优耦合，利用Sinkhorn算法实现闭式无梯度更新。
ai.result: 在导航、操作和 locomotion 任务上，成功率优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为非线性机器人系统的实时控制提供了一种更鲁棒的采样MPC算法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最优传输的几何特性改进采样优化算法，避免模式坍塌。

papers.title: Deep Speckle Holography Redefines Label-free Nanoparticle Phenotyping
papers.summary: Nanoparticle metrology has long been constrained by the assumption that, in mixed and unprocessed fluids, particle size, morphology, composition, and species-specific abundance cannot be resolved simultaneously from a single label-free measurement. Here, we revisit this long-standing limitation by showing that complex forward speckle-holographic fields define an information-rich optical space for multidimensional particle signatures. We report deep speckle holography, a physics-informed generative framework that profiles particle identity, size, morphology, and species-resolved abundance from a single non-contact optical measurement. Across purified suspensions, mixed particle populations, environmental waters, human urine, and other unprocessed native fluids, the method enables direct nanoparticle inference without purification, labeling, or destructive preprocessing, delivering concurrent multidimensional readouts in 0.9 s over a dynamic range spanning 10 orders of magnitude. Deep speckle holography establishes a route toward direct label-free nanoparticle phenotyping in real-world fluids, moving nanoscale measurement beyond isolated-particle characterization toward multidimensional inference in complex mixtures, and expanding the scope of questions nanoscale measurement can address, from real-time tracking of nanoparticle transformations in living and environmental systems to non-invasive quality control of nanomedicine formulations, and beyond.

ai.tldr: 提出深度散斑全息术，通过单次无标记光学测量同时解析混合流体中纳米颗粒的尺寸、形态、组成和物种丰度。
ai.motivation: 传统纳米颗粒计量学无法在混合未处理流体中同时解析颗粒的多个维度属性。
ai.method: 利用复杂前向散斑全息场构建信息丰富的光学空间，结合物理信息生成式深度学习框架。
ai.result: 在纯化悬浮液、混合颗粒、环境水、人尿液等真实流体中，0.9秒内实现10个数量级动态范围的多维纳米颗粒推断。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标记、无需预处理的纳米颗粒表型分析工具，适用于复杂真实流体。

papers.title: Brain criticality through nonadditive entropic analysis of electroencephalograms
papers.summary: On the grounds of nonadditive entropies -- appropriate for complex systems -- we investigate the electroencephalogram amplitudes of typical and ADHD children. The corresponding probability distributions are $q$-Gaussians, i.e., $ρ(x) \propto e_q^{-βx^2} \equiv [1+(q-1) βx^2]^{1/(1-q)}$, where $(q,β)$ are, respectively, the entropic index characterizing complexity and the inverse width. We show that $q$ tends to monotonically vary with $β$ for both typical and ADHD subjects, thus revealing critical behavior of the brain. Moreover, we verify that ADHD subjects have a higher complexity than the typical ones. Consistently, biomarkers for objective phychyatric diagnosis could emerge along this path. We show that $q$ tends to monotonically vary with $β$ for both typical and ADHD subjects, thus revealing critical behavior of the brain. Moreover, we verify that ADHD subjects have a higher complexity than the typical ones. Consistently, biomarkers for objective phychyatric diagnosis could emerge along this path.

ai.motivation: 探索非加性熵在复杂系统脑电图分析中的应用，并寻找ADHD的客观生物标志物。

en.tldr: Using nonadditive entropy analysis of EEG amplitudes, we find that both typical and ADHD children's brains exhibit critical behavior, with ADHD children showing higher complexity.
en.motivation: To explore nonadditive entropy in complex system EEG analysis and identify objective biomarkers for ADHD.
en.method: Fit EEG amplitude distributions of typical and ADHD children to q-Gaussians, analyzing the monotonic variation of entropic index q with inverse width β.

papers.title: When Embedding-Based Defenses Fail: Rethinking Safety in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.summary: Large language model (LLM)-powered multi-agent systems (MAS) enable agents to communicate and share information, achieving strong performance on complex tasks. However, this communication also creates an attack surface where malicious agents can propagate misinformation and manipulate group decisions, undermining MAS safety. Existing embedding-based defenses aim to detect and prune suspicious agents, but their effectiveness depends on a clear separation between the text embeddings of malicious and benign messages. Attackers can circumvent such defenses by crafting messages whose embeddings lie close to benign ones. We analyze this failure mode theoretically and validate it empirically with three attacks, Slow Drift, Benign Wrapper, and Chaos Seeding. Our analysis further reveals a fundamental limitation of embedding-based defenses: because they rely solely on the text embeddings, they ignore token-level confidence signals such as logits, which can remain informative when embeddings are not distinguishable under attack. We propose using confidence scores to prune or down-weight messages during MAS communication. Experiments show improved robustness across models, datasets, and communication topologies. Moreover, we find that the effectiveness of confidence signals decays over communication rounds, highlighting the importance of early intervention. This insights can inform and inspire future work on MAS attacks and defenses.

ai.tldr: 基于嵌入的防御在多智能体系统中易被绕过，本文提出利用置信度分数进行剪枝或降权，提升鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有基于嵌入的防御依赖恶意与良性消息的嵌入分离，攻击者可构造嵌入接近良性消息的恶意消息，从而绕过防御。
ai.method: 理论分析嵌入防御的局限性，提出使用模型输出的置信度分数（如logits）在通信过程中剪枝或降权可疑消息。
ai.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种模型、数据集和通信拓扑下提升了鲁棒性，但置信度信号的有效性随通信轮次衰减，早期干预更有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多智能体系统的安全漏洞，并提供一种不依赖嵌入的实用防御思路。

idea_spark.idea: 结合嵌入和置信度信号设计混合防御，或利用通信轮次动态调整防御强度。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击者可能通过对抗性训练降低置信度差异，或利用长对话中的信号衰减。
idea_spark.inspiration: 早期干预的重要性提示可设计自适应通信协议，在早期轮次强制验证消息来源。

en.tldr: Embedding-based defenses in multi-agent systems are vulnerable to attacks; this paper proposes using confidence scores to prune or down-weight messages, improving robustness.
en.motivation: Existing embedding-based defenses rely on clear separation between malicious and benign message embeddings, but attackers can craft messages with embeddings close to benign ones, bypassing detection.
en.method: Theoretical analysis of embedding defense limitations, followed by a method that uses model confidence scores (e.g., logits) to prune or down-weight suspicious messages during MAS communication.
en.result: Experiments show improved robustness across models, datasets, and communication topologies, but confidence signal effectiveness decays over communication rounds, highlighting the need for early intervention.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand security vulnerabilities in multi-agent systems and provides a practical defense approach that does not rely on embeddings.

idea_spark.idea: Design hybrid defenses combining embeddings and confidence signals, or dynamically adjust defense strength based on communication round.
idea_spark.risk: Attackers may reduce confidence differences via adversarial training, or exploit signal decay in long conversations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The importance of early intervention suggests designing adaptive communication protocols that enforce source verification in early rounds.

papers.title: On weak solutions for the stationary Cahn-Hillard-Navier-Stokes equations with singular potential
papers.summary: The stationary Navier--Stokes--Cahn--Hilliard equations are considered, governing the motion of a compressible, two-phase fluid mixture with a diffuse interface. The free energy density in this paper has a singular logarithmic (Flory-uggins) form, ensuring that the mass fraction remains in the physical range and allowing for vacuum states. We prove the existence of weak solutions in a three-dimensional bounded domain under structural assumptions on the adiabatic exponent. The stationary setting poses two main mathematical challenges: the absence of an energy inequality driven by the evolution process to control the singular potential, and the degeneracy of the density near the vacuum. To address these issues, we introduce a specialized regularization of the logarithmic term that eliminates the quadratic growth induced by anti-diffusion, thereby restoring compactness. Uniform estimates are obtained through a special choice of artificial pressure and an interpolation argument that controls the desired norm of the density. A two-level limiting process then yields a weak solution that satisfies the physical bounds almost everywhere on the support of the density.To our knowledge, this is the first existence result for the steady compressible Navier--Stokes--Cahn--Hilliard system that incorporates both a singular free energy and vacuum regions.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了具有奇异对数势的稳态可压缩两相流Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard方程组弱解的存在性，允许真空态。
ai.motivation: 稳态设置下缺乏能量不等式来控制奇异势，且密度在真空附近退化，给数学分析带来挑战。
ai.method: 引入对数项的特殊正则化消除反扩散导致的二次增长，通过人工压力和插值论证获得一致估计，再经两层极限过程得到弱解。
ai.result: 首次获得了同时包含奇异自由能和真空区域的稳态可压缩Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard系统的存在性结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解具有物理约束（质量分数在物理范围内）的稳态两相流模型提供了严格的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用人工压力与插值技巧控制密度范数，结合正则化恢复紧性，为处理稳态退化问题提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化参数和极限过程的收敛性需仔细验证，可能依赖特定结构假设（如绝热指数）。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似正则化策略应用于非牛顿流体或更复杂的相场模型稳态分析。

zh.tldr: 本文证明了具有奇异对数势的稳态可压缩两相流Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard方程组弱解的存在性，允许真空态。
zh.motivation: 稳态设置下缺乏能量不等式来控制奇异势，且密度在真空附近退化，给数学分析带来挑战。
zh.method: 引入对数项的特殊正则化消除反扩散导致的二次增长，通过人工压力和插值论证获得一致估计，再经两层极限过程得到弱解。
zh.result: 首次获得了同时包含奇异自由能和真空区域的稳态可压缩Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard系统的存在性结果。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解具有物理约束（质量分数在物理范围内）的稳态两相流模型提供了严格的数学基础。

en.tldr: This paper proves the existence of weak solutions for the stationary compressible Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard equations with a singular logarithmic potential, allowing vacuum states.
en.motivation: The stationary setting lacks an energy inequality to control the singular potential, and density degeneracy near vacuum poses mathematical challenges.
en.method: A specialized regularization of the logarithmic term eliminates anti-diffusion-induced quadratic growth; uniform estimates are obtained via artificial pressure and an interpolation argument; a two-level limiting process yields weak solutions.
en.result: This is the first existence result for the steady compressible Navier-Stokes-Cahn-Hilliard system incorporating both singular free energy and vacuum regions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for steady two-phase flow models with physical constraints (mass fraction within physical range).

idea_spark.idea: Using artificial pressure and interpolation to control density norms, combined with regularization to restore compactness, offers a new approach for stationary degenerate problems.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of regularization parameters and limiting processes may depend on specific structural assumptions (e.g., adiabatic exponent).
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar regularization strategies could be applied to steady-state analysis of non-Newtonian fluids or more complex phase-field models.

papers.title: An Inverse Source Problem For a Time-Fractional Mixed Wave-Diffusion-Wave Equation in a Cylindrical Domain
papers.summary: This paper addresses the inverse source problem for a mixed-type fractional wave-diffusion-wave equation posed in a cylindrical domain. The governing equation involves a time-dependent variable-order fractional derivative, which enables the model to effectively capture temporal transitions between wave-like and diffusive behaviors. The solution is constructed in the form of a Fourier-Bessel series. By employing the method of separation of variables together with fundamental properties of Bessel functions, we analyze the uniform convergence of the resulting infinite series. This analysis ultimately leads to a rigorous proof of the existence of a solution.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了圆柱域中一类混合型时间分数阶波动-扩散-波动方程的反源问题，通过傅里叶-贝塞尔级数构造解并证明存在性。
ai.motivation: 现有模型难以同时描述波动与扩散行为的时变过渡，需要建立更精确的数学框架。
ai.method: 采用变阶分数阶导数建模，利用分离变量法和贝塞尔函数性质分析傅里叶-贝塞尔级数的一致收敛性。
ai.result: 严格证明了反源问题解的存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含时变分数阶导数的混合型方程反问题提供了理论依据和级数解法。

idea_spark.idea: 将变阶分数阶导数与圆柱域傅里叶-贝塞尔级数结合，统一处理波动与扩散的时变过渡。
idea_spark.risk: 级数收敛性分析依赖于特定边界条件，推广至复杂几何时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受贝塞尔函数在圆柱域本征问题中的自然出现启发，选择傅里叶-贝塞尔级数作为解表示。

zh.motivation: 现有模型难以同时描述波动与扩散行为的时变过渡，需要建立更精确的数学框架。

en.tldr: This paper addresses the inverse source problem for a mixed-type time-fractional wave-diffusion-wave equation in a cylindrical domain, constructing the solution via Fourier-Bessel series and proving its existence.
en.motivation: Existing models cannot effectively capture temporal transitions between wave-like and diffusive behaviors, necessitating a more accurate mathematical framework.
en.method: A variable-order fractional derivative is employed; separation of variables and properties of Bessel functions are used to analyze uniform convergence of the Fourier-Bessel series.
en.result: A rigorous proof of the existence of a solution to the inverse source problem is provided.
en.help_to_user: Offers a theoretical foundation and series solution method for inverse problems involving time-varying fractional derivatives in mixed-type equations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine variable-order fractional derivatives with Fourier-Bessel series in cylindrical domains to unify wave and diffusion transitions over time.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence analysis relies on specific boundary conditions and may fail for complex geometries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the natural appearance of Bessel functions in cylindrical eigenvalue problems, the Fourier-Bessel series is chosen as the solution representation.

papers.title: H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
papers.summary: Representing and navigating hierarchy is a fundamental primitive of reasoning. Large language models have demonstrated proficiency in a wide variety of tasks requiring hierarchical reasoning, but there exists limited analysis on how the models geometrically represent the necessary latent constructions for such thinking. To this end, we develop \textit{H-probes}, a collection of linear probes that extract hierarchical structure, specifically depth and pairwise distance, from latent representations. In synthetic tree traversal tasks, the H-probes robustly find the subspaces containing hierarchical structure necessary to complete the tasks; furthermore, in comprehensive ablation experiments, we show that these hierarchy-containing subspaces are low-dimensional, causally important for high task performance, and generalize within- and out-of-domain. Furthermore, we find analogous, though weaker, hierarchical structure in real-world hierarchical contexts such as mathematical reasoning traces. These results demonstrate that models represent hierarchy not only at the level of syntax and concepts, but at deeper levels of abstraction -- including the reasoning process itself.

ai.tldr: 提出H-Probes线性探针，从语言模型隐层表示中提取层级结构（深度和成对距离），并证明该结构低维、因果重要且可泛化。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在层级推理任务中表现优异，但对其内部如何几何表示层级结构的分析有限。
ai.method: 设计一组线性探针H-Probes，从隐层表示中提取层级深度和成对距离；在合成树遍历任务和真实数学推理轨迹上进行实验。
ai.result: 探针能稳健找到包含层级结构的子空间；该子空间低维、对任务性能因果重要，且能域内和域外泛化；在真实层级上下文中也发现类似结构。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解语言模型内部层级表示的几何特性，为模型可解释性和改进层级推理提供工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用线性探针定位层级子空间后，可尝试通过干预该子空间来增强或修正模型的层级推理能力。
idea_spark.risk: 线性探针可能无法捕捉非线性层级结构；真实任务中层级定义可能不明确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经科学中线性解码器分析神经表征的启发，将类似思路应用于语言模型隐层分析。

zh.tldr: 提出H-Probes线性探针，从语言模型隐层表示中提取层级结构（深度和成对距离），并证明该结构低维、因果重要且可泛化。
zh.motivation: 大语言模型在层级推理任务中表现优异，但对其内部如何几何表示层级结构的分析有限。

idea_spark.risk: 线性探针可能无法捕捉非线性层级结构；真实任务中层级定义可能不明确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经科学中线性解码器分析神经表征的启发，将类似思路应用于语言模型隐层分析。

en.tldr: Proposes H-Probes, a set of linear probes that extract hierarchical structure (depth and pairwise distance) from latent representations of language models, showing the subspace is low-dimensional, causally important, and generalizable.
en.motivation: Large language models excel at hierarchical reasoning, but there is limited analysis of how they geometrically represent hierarchical structure internally.
en.method: Designs linear probes (H-Probes) to extract hierarchical depth and pairwise distance from latent representations; tested on synthetic tree traversal tasks and real-world mathematical reasoning traces.
en.result: Probes robustly find subspaces containing hierarchical structure; these subspaces are low-dimensional, causally important for task performance, and generalize in-domain and out-of-domain; analogous structure found in real-world hierarchical contexts.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the geometric representation of hierarchy in language models, offering tools for interpretability and improving hierarchical reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: After localizing hierarchical subspaces via linear probes, one could intervene on those subspaces to enhance or correct the model's hierarchical reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Linear probes may miss non-linear hierarchical structures; hierarchy definitions in real tasks may be ambiguous.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by linear decoding approaches in neuroscience for analyzing neural representations, applied to language model latent spaces.

papers.title: Arithmetic in the Wild: Llama uses Base-10 Addition to Reason About Cyclic Concepts
papers.summary: Does structure in representations imply structure in computation? We study how Llama-3.1-8B reasons over cyclic concepts (e.g., "what month is six months after August?"). Even though Llama-3.1-8B's representations for these concepts are circularly structured, we find that instead of directly computing modular addition in the period of the cyclic concept (e.g., 12 for months), the model re-uses a generic addition mechanism across tasks that operates independently of concept-specific geometry. First, it computes the sum of its two inputs using base-10 addition (six + August=14). Then, it maps this sum back to cyclic concept space (14->February). We show that Llama-3.1-8B uses task-agnostic Fourier features to compute these sums--in fact, these features have periods that respect standard base-10 addition, e.g., 2, 5, and 10, rather than the cyclic concept period (e.g., 12 for months). Furthermore, we identify a sparse set of 28 MLP neurons re-used across all tasks (approximately 0.2% of the MLP at layer 18) that can be partitioned into disjoint clusters, each computing the sum for a Fourier feature with a different period. Our work highlights how an interplay between causal abstraction and feature geometry can deepen our mechanistic understanding of LMs.

ai.tldr: Llama-3.1-8B 在处理循环概念（如月份）时，并未直接使用模加法，而是复用通用的十进制加法机制，再映射回循环概念空间。
ai.motivation: 探究语言模型中的表示结构是否意味着计算结构，特别是循环概念推理的底层机制。
ai.method: 通过因果抽象和特征几何分析，识别出模型在循环概念任务中复用的一组稀疏 MLP 神经元，这些神经元计算不同周期的傅里叶特征。
ai.result: 模型使用与任务无关的傅里叶特征（周期为 2、5、10 等）执行十进制加法，而非直接使用循环概念的周期（如 12）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解大语言模型如何复用通用算术机制处理不同领域的概念推理，为可解释性研究提供新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 设计实验验证其他模型（如 GPT-4）是否也使用类似的通用加法机制，或探索不同模型在算术推理上的差异。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能依赖特定训练数据中的表面模式，而非真正的通用算术能力，需谨慎推广结论。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们利用因果抽象和特征几何结合的方法，系统性地揭示语言模型中的隐藏计算模块。

en.tldr: Llama-3.1-8B does not directly compute modular addition for cyclic concepts (e.g., months) but reuses a generic base-10 addition mechanism and then maps the sum back to the cyclic concept space.
en.motivation: To investigate whether structure in representations implies structure in computation, specifically the underlying mechanism for reasoning over cyclic concepts.
en.method: Using causal abstraction and feature geometry analysis, we identify a sparse set of MLP neurons reused across tasks, each computing Fourier features with different periods.
en.result: The model uses task-agnostic Fourier features (periods 2, 5, 10, etc.) to perform base-10 addition, rather than directly using the cyclic concept period (e.g., 12).
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how LLMs reuse generic arithmetic mechanisms for different conceptual reasoning tasks, offering new insights for mechanistic interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Design experiments to test whether other models (e.g., GPT-4) also use similar generic addition mechanisms, or explore differences in arithmetic reasoning across models.
idea_spark.risk: The model may rely on surface patterns in training data rather than true general arithmetic ability; conclusions should be generalized cautiously.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic discovery of hidden computational modules in language models by combining causal abstraction and feature geometry.

papers.title: FeedbackLLM: Metadata driven Multi-Agentic Language Agnostic Test Case Generator with Evolving prompt and Coverage Feedback
papers.summary: Traditional approaches to test case generation often involve manual effort and incur significant computational overhead. Additionally, these approaches are not scalable, and hence, unsuitable for complex software systems. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have been applied to software testing. However, single-shot prompt engineering-based approaches tend to hallucinate and generate redundant test cases, resulting in fewer branches. To handle the above-mentioned limitations, in this paper, we propose FeedbackLLM, a novel automated language-agnostic test case generation framework based on tightly coupled two-stage approach. In the first stage, FeedbackLLM extracts the input constraints by parsing source code and generates the possible test cases. The quality of the test cases is evaluated in the second stage by the following two specialized LLM feedback agents: (i) Line Feedback Agent: extracts the metadata related to missed line executions and (ii) Branch Feedback Agent: extracts the metadata of the unexecuted branch conditions. The above agents operate in a two-stage process, communicating in tandem, and this procedure is repeated for k-steps. Further, we also introduced a redundancy prevention cache to avoid duplicate API requests and avoid unnecessary execution cycles. The performance of the proposed architecture is evaluated on the standard benchmark programs related to C and Python programs. FeedbackLLM demonstrated more line and branch coverage than baseline tools while scaling linearly in execution time.

ai.tldr: 提出FeedbackLLM，一种基于LLM的多智能体测试用例生成框架，通过两阶段反馈循环提升代码覆盖。
ai.motivation: 传统测试用例生成方法手动且计算开销大，单次提示的LLM方法易产生幻觉和冗余，分支覆盖不足。
ai.method: 第一阶段解析源码提取输入约束生成测试用例；第二阶段通过行反馈智能体和分支反馈智能体提取未覆盖元数据，迭代k步优化，并引入冗余预防缓存。
ai.result: 在C和Python基准程序上，FeedbackLLM的行覆盖和分支覆盖均优于基线工具，执行时间线性增长。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动生成高覆盖率的测试用例，减少人工编写和调试成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合静态分析（约束提取）与动态反馈（覆盖元数据）的迭代优化思路。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM输出质量，可能引入不准确反馈；多轮迭代增加延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件测试中覆盖率驱动的测试生成启发，将LLM作为协作智能体而非单一生成器。

zh.tldr: 提出FeedbackLLM，一种基于LLM的多智能体测试用例生成框架，通过两阶段反馈循环提升代码覆盖。
zh.motivation: 传统测试用例生成方法手动且计算开销大，单次提示的LLM方法易产生幻觉和冗余，分支覆盖不足。

zh.result: 在C和Python基准程序上，FeedbackLLM的行覆盖和分支覆盖均优于基线工具，执行时间线性增长。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动生成高覆盖率的测试用例，减少人工编写和调试成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合静态分析（约束提取）与动态反馈（覆盖元数据）的迭代优化思路。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM输出质量，可能引入不准确反馈；多轮迭代增加延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件测试中覆盖率驱动的测试生成启发，将LLM作为协作智能体而非单一生成器。

en.tldr: Proposes FeedbackLLM, a multi-agent LLM-based test case generation framework that improves code coverage through a two-stage feedback loop.
en.motivation: Traditional test generation is manual and computationally heavy; single-shot LLM approaches hallucinate and produce redundant tests with low branch coverage.
en.method: Stage 1 parses source code to extract input constraints and generate test cases; Stage 2 uses Line and Branch Feedback Agents to extract missed coverage metadata, iterating for k steps with a redundancy prevention cache.
en.result: On C and Python benchmarks, FeedbackLLM achieves higher line and branch coverage than baselines with linear execution time scaling.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically generate high-coverage test cases, reducing manual effort and debugging costs.

idea_spark.idea: Iterative optimization combining static analysis (constraint extraction) with dynamic feedback (coverage metadata).
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on LLM output quality may introduce inaccurate feedback; multi-round iteration increases latency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by coverage-driven test generation in software testing, using LLMs as collaborative agents rather than single generators.

papers.title: A Coupled Fourth Order Telegraph Diffusion Framework Using Grayscale Indicators for Image Despeckling
papers.summary: Speckle noise severely limits the quality of images acquired from coherent imaging systems such as Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) and medical ultrasound. Traditional second-order PDE-based despeckling approaches, although popular, often introduce staircase artifacts and blur fine details. To overcome these limitations, we present a nonlinear, fourth-order coupled hyperbolic-parabolic PDE model that effectively reduces noise while preserving the structure. The framework consists of two evolution equations: one governing fourth-order diffusion for effective speckle reduction and smooth intensity transitions, and another refining an edge indicator to protect textures and structural features. The diffusion coefficient is adaptively constructed using both the image intensity variable u and a grayscale-based indicator function, ensuring structure-aware denoising while avoiding blocky artifacts and preserving fine details. We also prove the existence of a weak solution to the proposed model by applying Schauder fixed-point theorem. A finite-difference scheme with Gauss Seidel iteration is employed for efficient implementation. We compare the proposed model with the existing coupled second-order PDE model (HPCPDE) and the fourth-order telegraph diffusion model (TDFM). The results show that our model consistently outperforms these approaches. Experiments on standard grayscale images, real SAR and ultrasound data, as well as speckle-corrupted color images, demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance over conventional PDE-based techniques in terms of PSNR, MSSIM, and Speckle Index.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于灰度指示器的四阶电报扩散框架，用于图像去斑，有效去除散斑噪声并保留细节。
ai.motivation: 传统二阶PDE去斑方法易产生阶梯伪影和模糊细节，需要更优的模型。
ai.method: 构建非线性四阶耦合双曲-抛物PDE模型，包含四阶扩散方程和边缘指示器演化方程，扩散系数由图像强度和灰度指示函数自适应构造。

en.tldr: A coupled fourth-order telegraph diffusion framework using grayscale indicators for image despeckling, effectively reducing speckle noise while preserving fine details.
en.motivation: Traditional second-order PDE despeckling methods introduce staircase artifacts and blur details, necessitating a more advanced model.
en.method: A nonlinear fourth-order coupled hyperbolic-parabolic PDE model with two evolution equations: one for fourth-order diffusion and another for refining an edge indicator, with diffusion coefficient adaptively constructed using image intensity and a grayscale indicator.
en.result: Outperforms HPCPDE and TDFM on standard grayscale, SAR, ultrasound, and color images in terms of PSNR, MSSIM, and Speckle Index.
en.help_to_user: Provides a structure-preserving despeckling method that avoids blocky artifacts and retains fine details.

idea_spark.idea: Combine grayscale indicators with fourth-order diffusion for adaptive structure-aware denoising.
idea_spark.risk: Higher computational complexity of fourth-order PDEs may hinder real-time applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use grayscale indicator functions to dynamically adjust diffusion strength, preventing over-smoothing of edges.

papers.title: TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution
papers.summary: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.

ai.tldr: 提出TOC-SR框架，通过紧凑扩散骨干和单步蒸馏实现高效超分辨率。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在超分辨率中性能优异，但模型大、采样慢，难以实际部署。
ai.method: 从16通道潜扩散模型出发，用特征级生成蒸馏构建参数高效替代块，结合ε约束贝叶斯优化发现紧凑架构，再蒸馏为单步生成器。
ai.result: 参数减少6.6倍，GMACs减少2.8倍，同时保持强重建质量。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种系统化压缩扩散模型用于超分辨率的方法，降低计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将贝叶斯优化与特征蒸馏结合，自动发现任务最优紧凑架构。
idea_spark.risk: 紧凑架构可能在某些复杂场景下牺牲细节保真度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受模型压缩和神经架构搜索启发，将两者融合于扩散模型。

en.motivation: Diffusion models achieve strong super-resolution performance but are computationally expensive due to large size and iterative sampling.
en.method: Starting from a 16-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks via feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery with epsilon-constrained Bayesian optimization, then distill into a one-step generator.

idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by model compression and neural architecture search, fused for diffusion models.

papers.title: Unified Lyapunov Method for ISS of PDEs: A Tutorial on Constructing Generalized Lyapunov Functionals for Parabolic and Hyperbolic Equations
papers.summary: This tutorial provides an overview of the generalized Lyapunov method (GLM) for analyzing input-to-state stability (ISS) of partial differential equations (PDEs). We begin by revisiting the classical Lyapunov method and the standard ISS-Lyapunov theorem, highlighting their limitations when applied to systems with complex boundary disturbances. In contrast, the GLM, based on the concept of generalized Lyapunov functionals (GLFs) that explicitly depend on the external input, offers greater flexibility and efficiency, particularly for PDEs with Dirichlet-type disturbances. The main objective of this tutorial is to demonstrate how to systematically construct GLFs to establish ISS estimates in $L^q$ spaces with any $q\in[2,\infty]$ for different PDEs. Specifically, we consider three representative classes of PDEs: (i) an $N$-dimensional nonlinear parabolic equation with mixed nonlinear boundary disturbances, (ii) a first order nonlinear hyperbolic equation with boundary disturbances, and (iii) a second order linear hyperbolic equation, i.e., a wave equation, with boundary damping and disturbances. For each case, we provide step-by-step constructions of appropriate GLFs and derive explicit ISS estimates, illustrating the general applicability of the GLM. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including the systematic construction of GLFs for broader classes of PDEs and their applications in controller design.

ai.tldr: 本教程系统介绍了广义Lyapunov方法，用于分析偏微分方程（PDE）的输入-状态稳定性（ISS），并针对抛物型和双曲型方程给出了具体的泛函构造步骤。
ai.motivation: 经典Lyapunov方法在处理带有复杂边界扰动的PDE时存在局限性，需要更灵活高效的稳定性分析工具。
ai.method: 基于广义Lyapunov泛函（GLF）的广义Lyapunov方法（GLM），GLF显式依赖于外部输入，可灵活处理Dirichlet型边界扰动。
ai.result: 针对三类代表性PDE（非线性抛物方程、一阶非线性双曲方程、二阶线性波动方程）成功构造了GLF，并导出了显式的ISS估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一套系统构造GLF的步骤，帮助用户掌握分析PDE边界扰动稳定性的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将GLF的构造与自适应控制或鲁棒控制结合，实现边界扰动下的在线稳定性保障。
idea_spark.risk: GLF的构造可能依赖特定PDE结构，对复杂非线性或时变系统缺乏通用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴GLF显式依赖输入的思想，可尝试在神经网络稳定性分析中引入输入依赖的Lyapunov函数。
