en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how offline precomputation can accelerate online integer linear programming solving.

idea_spark.idea: Combine decision trees with machine learning to automatically learn optimal test sequences, reducing manual design.
idea_spark.risk: High synthesis cost may be prohibitive for problems with frequently changing feasible sets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by offline-online algorithms and decision tree classifiers applied to optimization decisions.

papers.title: Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET
papers.summary: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [$^{18}$F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by high costs and radiation exposure. In this paper, we investigate the feasibility of "virtual scanning" as a feature-enhancement strategy by evaluating whether synthetic PET data can provide complementary feature representations to supplement anatomical CT scans in histological subtype classification.   We propose a framework that leverages a 3D Pix2Pix Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), pretrained on the FDG-PET/CT Lesions dataset, to synthesize pseudo-PET volumes from anatomical CT scans. These synthetic volumes are integrated with structural CT data within the MINT framework, a multi-stage intermediate fusion architecture.   Our experiments, conducted on a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, demonstrate that the inclusion of synthetic metabolic features significantly improves classification performance over a CT-only baseline. The multimodal approach achieved a statistically significant increase in the Area Under the Curve (AUC) from 0.489 to 0.591 and improved the Geometric Mean (GMean) from 0.305 to 0.524. These results suggest that synthetic PET scans provide discriminatory metabolic cues that enable deep learning models to exploit complementary cross-modal information, offering a potential feature-enhancement strategy for clinical scenarios where physical PET scans are unavailable.

ai.tldr: 提出虚拟扫描策略，利用3D Pix2Pix GAN从CT合成PET，辅助NSCLC组织学亚型分类，AUC从0.489提升至0.591。
ai.motivation: PET/CT成本高且有辐射，探索合成PET作为特征增强手段，替代真实PET进行组织学分类。
ai.method: 基于3D Pix2Pix GAN预训练模型从CT合成伪PET，再通过MINT多阶段中间融合架构与CT结合。
ai.result: 在714例多中心数据上，多模态方法AUC从0.489提升至0.591，GMean从0.305提升至0.524。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需真实PET即可获得代谢特征增强的思路，适用于PET不可用的临床场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将合成PET与真实PET联合训练，或引入对比学习进一步提升合成质量。
idea_spark.risk: 合成PET可能引入伪影或丢失真实代谢信息，需验证其泛化性和临床可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用GAN进行跨模态特征增强，启发在数据稀缺场景下用合成数据补充真实数据。

en.tldr: Proposes virtual scanning using 3D Pix2Pix GAN to synthesize PET from CT, improving NSCLC histological subtype classification AUC from 0.489 to 0.591.
en.motivation: PET/CT is costly and involves radiation; investigate synthetic PET as a feature-enhancement strategy to replace real PET for histology classification.
en.method: Pretrained 3D Pix2Pix GAN synthesizes pseudo-PET from CT; synthetic volumes are integrated with CT via MINT multi-stage intermediate fusion.
en.result: On a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, multimodal approach improves AUC from 0.489 to 0.591 and GMean from 0.305 to 0.524.
en.help_to_user: Provides a way to obtain metabolic feature enhancement without real PET, useful for clinical scenarios where PET is unavailable.

idea_spark.risk: Synthetic PET may introduce artifacts or miss real metabolic information; generalization and clinical reliability need validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using GAN for cross-modal feature enhancement inspires using synthetic data to supplement real data in data-scarce scenarios.

papers.title: Statistically-Lossless Quantization of Large Language Models
papers.summary: Model quantization has become essential for efficient large language model deployment, yet existing approaches involve clear trade-offs: methods such as GPTQ and AWQ achieve practical compression but are lossy, while lossless techniques preserve fidelity but typically do not accelerate inference. This paper explores the middle ground of statistically-lossless compression through three complementary notions of losslessness for quantized LLMs. First, task-lossless compression preserves zero-shot benchmark accuracy within natural sampling variance and remains achievable at aggressive bitwidths. Second, we formalize the stricter notion of distribution-lossless compression, requiring the quantized model's next-token distribution to be practically indistinguishable from the original, and propose the Expected Acceptance Rate (EAR), the maximum token-agreement probability under optimal coupling, as a directly interpretable fidelity metric (for example, EAR >= 0.99 indicates 99% agreement). Third, we prove a gamma-squared variance law showing that symmetric quantization inflates noise variance by gamma squared relative to asymmetric quantization, making asymmetry necessary for distribution-lossless fidelity but not for task-level preservation. Using SLQ, a layer-wise non-uniform method with asymmetric quantization and wide bitwidth search, we achieve task-lossless compression at well below 4 bits per parameter (as low as 3.3 bits depending on the model), distribution-lossless compression at 5 to 6 bits per parameter on average, and inference speedups of 1.7 to 3.6x relative to FP16 with optimized kernels. Source code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/SLQ.

ai.tldr: 提出统计无损量化概念，在保持模型输出分布几乎不变的同时实现高效压缩与推理加速。
ai.motivation: 现有量化方法在保真度与效率间存在权衡：有损方法压缩率高但损失精度，无损方法保真但无法加速推理。
ai.method: 定义任务无损、分布无损和统计无损三个层次，提出期望接受率（EAR）作为保真度指标，并证明对称量化会放大噪声方差，非对称量化是分布无损的必要条件。基于此设计SLQ方法，采用逐层非均匀量化和宽位宽搜索。
ai.result: 任务无损压缩可达3.3比特/参数，分布无损压缩平均5-6比特/参数，推理速度相比FP16提升1.7-3.6倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解量化中的保真度层次，并提供一种在保持模型输出几乎不变的前提下实现高压缩比和加速的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将EAR指标用于量化感知训练，动态调整量化参数以最大化令牌一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 分布无损要求可能限制压缩率，实际部署中需根据任务需求选择合适无损层次。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息论角度重新定义量化损失，启发设计更精细的保真度度量与优化目标。

idea_spark.risk: 分布无损要求可能限制压缩率，实际部署中需根据任务需求选择合适无损层次。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息论角度重新定义量化损失，启发设计更精细的保真度度量与优化目标。

en.tldr: Proposes statistically-lossless quantization that preserves model output distribution while achieving high compression and inference speedup.
en.motivation: Existing quantization methods trade off fidelity and efficiency: lossy methods compress well but lose accuracy, while lossless methods preserve fidelity but do not accelerate inference.
en.method: Defines three levels of losslessness (task-lossless, distribution-lossless, statistically-lossless), introduces Expected Acceptance Rate (EAR) as a fidelity metric, and proves that symmetric quantization inflates noise variance, making asymmetry necessary for distribution-lossless fidelity. SLQ uses layer-wise non-uniform quantization with wide bitwidth search.
en.result: Achieves task-lossless compression at 3.3 bits per parameter, distribution-lossless at 5-6 bits per parameter on average, and 1.7-3.6x inference speedup over FP16.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand fidelity levels in quantization and provides a practical method for high compression and speedup while keeping model output nearly unchanged.

idea_spark.idea: Use EAR as a training objective in quantization-aware training to dynamically adjust quantization parameters for maximum token agreement.
idea_spark.risk: Distribution-lossless requirement may limit compression ratio; practical deployment should choose appropriate losslessness level based on task needs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redefining quantization loss from an information-theoretic perspective inspires finer-grained fidelity metrics and optimization targets.

papers.title: Zero-Shot Confidence Estimation for Small LLMs: When Supervised Baselines Aren't Worth Training
papers.summary: How reliably can a small language model estimate its own correctness? The answer determines whether local-to-cloud routing-escalating queries a cheap local model cannot handle-can work without supervised training data. As inference costs dominate large language model (LLM) deployment budgets, routing most queries to a cheap local model while reserving expensive cloud calls for hard cases is an increasingly common cost-control strategy. We compare zero-shot confidence signals against RouteLLM-style supervised baselines across three 7-8B model families and two datasets (1,000 and 500 queries per model, respectively). Average token log-probability, which requires no training data, matches or exceeds supervised baselines in-distribution (Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve (AUROC) 0.650-0.714 vs. 0.644-0.676) and substantially outperforms them out-of-distribution (0.717-0.833 vs. 0.512-0.564), because it measures a property of the model's generation rather than the query distribution. This paper further proposes retrieval-conditional self-assessment, a pre-generation signal that selectively injects retrieved knowledge when similarity is high, improving over bare self-assessment by up to +0.069 AUROC at 3-10x lower latency than log-probability. A supervised baseline trained on 1,000 labeled examples never exceeds the zero-shot signal. We release all code, data, and experiment logs.

ai.tldr: 提出零样本置信度估计方法，使小型语言模型无需监督训练即可评估自身正确性，在路由场景中优于监督基线。
ai.motivation: 大型语言模型推理成本高昂，需要将简单查询路由到廉价本地模型，但本地模型需可靠估计自身正确性，而监督训练数据难以获取。
ai.method: 使用平均token对数概率作为零样本置信度信号，并进一步提出检索条件自评估，在生成前根据检索相似度选择性注入知识。
ai.result: 零样本信号在分布内AUROC达0.650-0.714，分布外达0.717-0.833，均优于监督基线；检索条件自评估在更低延迟下提升AUROC最多0.069。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不依赖标注数据的情况下，为小型语言模型实现可靠的置信度估计，从而优化本地-云端路由策略，降低推理成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合检索增强与生成前置信度信号，设计轻量级路由决策模块，实现动态知识注入与延迟优化。
idea_spark.risk: 检索质量可能影响置信度估计的准确性，且零样本方法在极端分布偏移下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从模型生成的内在属性（如对数概率）出发，而非依赖外部标注，为无监督置信度估计提供了新思路。

zh.motivation: 大型语言模型推理成本高昂，需要将简单查询路由到廉价本地模型，但本地模型需可靠估计自身正确性，而监督训练数据难以获取。
zh.method: 使用平均token对数概率作为零样本置信度信号，并进一步提出检索条件自评估，在生成前根据检索相似度选择性注入知识。
zh.result: 零样本信号在分布内AUROC达0.650-0.714，分布外达0.717-0.833，均优于监督基线；检索条件自评估在更低延迟下提升AUROC最多0.069。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不依赖标注数据的情况下，为小型语言模型实现可靠的置信度估计，从而优化本地-云端路由策略，降低推理成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合检索增强与生成前置信度信号，设计轻量级路由决策模块，实现动态知识注入与延迟优化。
idea_spark.risk: 检索质量可能影响置信度估计的准确性，且零样本方法在极端分布偏移下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从模型生成的内在属性（如对数概率）出发，而非依赖外部标注，为无监督置信度估计提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes zero-shot confidence estimation for small LLMs to assess their own correctness without supervised training, outperforming supervised baselines in routing scenarios.
en.motivation: High inference costs of large LLMs necessitate routing simple queries to cheap local models, but local models need reliable self-confidence estimation without labeled data.
en.method: Uses average token log-probability as a zero-shot confidence signal, and further proposes retrieval-conditional self-assessment that selectively injects retrieved knowledge before generation.
en.result: Zero-shot signal achieves AUROC 0.650-0.714 in-distribution and 0.717-0.833 out-of-distribution, surpassing supervised baselines; retrieval-conditional self-assessment improves AUROC by up to 0.069 with lower latency.
en.help_to_user: Enables reliable confidence estimation for small LLMs without labeled data, optimizing local-to-cloud routing strategies to reduce inference costs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine retrieval augmentation with pre-generation confidence signals to design lightweight routing modules for dynamic knowledge injection and latency optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Retrieval quality may affect confidence accuracy, and zero-shot methods may fail under extreme distribution shifts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging intrinsic model properties (e.g., log-probability) rather than external labels offers a new direction for unsupervised confidence estimation.

papers.title: A Real-Time Scalable Heuristic DSS Framework for Capacity-Constrained Retail Allocation under Supply Chain Uncertainty
papers.summary: The rapid proliferation of omnichannel retail strategies has fundamentally transformed store replenishment operations in uncertain supply chain environments. With retail stores increasingly acting as hybrid fulfillment centers, pooled inventory allocation must absorb uncertain order realizations, constrained receiving capacities, dynamic vehicle limits, multi-tiered product priorities, and planner-controlled outbound warehouse preferences. This study frames this commercial reality as an extended constrained variant of the Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP). Recognizing that exact optimization techniques such as Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) are computationally prohibitive in large-scale real-time settings, we propose a real-time scalable heuristic embedded in a computationally efficient Decision Support System (DSS) framework based on set-oriented cumulative filtering. The framework evaluates cumulative flow-through deductions, third-party logistics routing integrations, category-specific volume caps, warehouse activation filters, and user-defined warehouse priority ranks. An extensive case study within a large retail network covering 212,278 order records from June 2025 to April 2026 demonstrates the impact of the proposed methodology. Using January 2026 as the go-live cutoff, weighted ship-to-order ratio improved from 54.1% to 67.8%, weighted same-day coverage improved from 24.3% to 37.8%, and store-days with order volumes above store limits were reduced by 48.6%. These findings indicate that the proposed real-time scalable heuristic and computationally efficient DSS framework provide practical, uncertainty-aware allocation support for volatile retail supply chains.

ai.tldr: 提出一个实时可扩展的启发式决策支持系统框架，用于解决全渠道零售中容量受限的库存分配问题，在大型零售网络中显著提升了订单履行率和覆盖率。
ai.motivation: 全渠道零售中，门店作为混合履行中心，面临不确定订单、有限收货能力、动态车辆限制等多重约束，精确优化方法（如MILP）在大规模实时场景下计算不可行。
ai.method: 将问题建模为扩展的多维背包问题，设计基于集合累积过滤的实时可扩展启发式算法，嵌入计算高效的决策支持系统，处理累积流量扣减、第三方物流路由、品类容量上限、仓库激活过滤和用户定义优先级。
ai.result: 在包含212,278条订单记录的大型零售网络中，加权船运订单比从54.1%提升至67.8%，加权当日覆盖率从24.3%提升至37.8%，超限门店天数减少48.6%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助零售运营管理者在不确定供应链环境下快速做出容量受限的库存分配决策，提升订单履行效率和门店运营稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习动态调整过滤规则，或引入预测性需求模型以进一步提升分配准确性。
idea_spark.risk: 启发式算法可能无法保证全局最优解，在极端波动场景下性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从零售库存分配扩展到多级供应链协同优化，例如结合供应商补货策略和门店需求预测。

en.tldr: A real-time scalable heuristic DSS framework for capacity-constrained retail allocation under supply chain uncertainty, achieving significant improvements in order fulfillment and coverage in a large retail network.
en.motivation: Omnichannel retail transforms stores into hybrid fulfillment centers facing uncertain orders, limited receiving capacities, dynamic vehicle limits, and other constraints, making exact optimization computationally infeasible in real-time large-scale settings.
en.method: Formulates the problem as an extended Multidimensional Knapsack Problem and proposes a real-time scalable heuristic based on set-oriented cumulative filtering, embedded in a computationally efficient DSS that handles cumulative flow-through deductions, 3PL routing, category volume caps, warehouse activation filters, and user-defined priorities.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate reinforcement learning to dynamically adjust filtering rules, or incorporate predictive demand models to further enhance allocation accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Heuristic methods may not guarantee global optimality and could degrade in extreme volatility scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extend from retail inventory allocation to multi-echelon supply chain coordination, e.g., combining supplier replenishment strategies with store demand forecasting.

papers.title: A Single-Loop Stochastic Gradient Algorithm for Minimax Optimization with Nonlinear Coupled Constraints
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose a single-loop stochastic gradient algorithm for solving stochastic nonconvex-concave minimax optimization with nonlinear convex coupled constraints (MCC). The proposed method, SPACO (Stochastic Penalty-based Algorithm for minimax optimization with COupled constraints), is built upon a penalty-based smooth approximation framework for MCC. This framework integrates a quadratic penalty scheme with regularization to yield a continuously differentiable approximation of the MCC problem. We provide theoretical convergence guarantees for this smoothing framework. Furthermore, we establish non-asymptotic complexity bounds and provide an asymptotic analysis characterizing the stationarity of accumulation points for the iterates generated by SPACO. Experimental results on synthetic examples and practical machine learning tasks demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 提出一种单循环随机梯度算法SPACO，用于求解带非线性凸耦合约束的随机非凸-凹极小极大优化问题。
ai.motivation: 现有方法处理带耦合约束的极小极大优化时，往往需要双循环或高阶计算，效率较低。
ai.method: 基于罚函数平滑近似框架，将二次罚函数与正则化结合，构造连续可微的近似问题，并设计单循环随机梯度更新。
ai.result: 给出非渐近复杂度界和渐近收敛性分析，合成数据与机器学习任务实验验证了方法的有效性和效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为带复杂约束的极小极大优化提供一种高效的单循环求解方案，降低计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将二次罚函数与正则化结合，使约束条件平滑融入目标，避免显式投影或拉格朗日乘子更新。
idea_spark.risk: 罚参数选取不当可能影响收敛速度或精度，需谨慎调节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴罚函数法与随机梯度下降的结合思路，简化约束处理流程。

zh.tldr: 提出一种单循环随机梯度算法SPACO，用于求解带非线性凸耦合约束的随机非凸-凹极小极大优化问题。
zh.motivation: 现有方法处理带耦合约束的极小极大优化时，往往需要双循环或高阶计算，效率较低。
zh.method: 基于罚函数平滑近似框架，将二次罚函数与正则化结合，构造连续可微的近似问题，并设计单循环随机梯度更新。

zh.help_to_user: 为带复杂约束的极小极大优化提供一种高效的单循环求解方案，降低计算开销。

idea_spark.risk: 罚参数选取不当可能影响收敛速度或精度，需谨慎调节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴罚函数法与随机梯度下降的结合思路，简化约束处理流程。

en.tldr: Proposes a single-loop stochastic gradient algorithm SPACO for stochastic nonconvex-concave minimax optimization with nonlinear convex coupled constraints.
en.motivation: Existing methods for minimax optimization with coupled constraints often require double loops or high-order computations, leading to inefficiency.
en.method: Builds a penalty-based smooth approximation framework that integrates a quadratic penalty scheme with regularization to yield a continuously differentiable approximation, and updates via single-loop stochastic gradient.
en.result: Provides non-asymptotic complexity bounds and asymptotic convergence analysis; experiments on synthetic data and machine learning tasks demonstrate effectiveness and efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient single-loop solution for minimax optimization with complex nonlinear constraints, reducing computational overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Combine quadratic penalty with regularization to smoothly incorporate constraints into the objective, avoiding explicit projections or Lagrangian updates.
idea_spark.risk: Improper penalty parameter selection may affect convergence speed or accuracy, requiring careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from combining penalty methods with stochastic gradient descent to simplify constraint handling.

papers.title: nvPAX: Constrained Optimization for Dynamic Power Allocation in Hierarchical and Multi-Tenant Systems
papers.summary: Power oversubscription is increasingly central to datacenter operation as power density grows, making it necessary to dynamically allocate limited power budgets across devices based on real-time demand. Existing approaches typically assume flat power domains, whereas in practice power distribution is hierarchical and allocation decisions must additionally respect tenant-level contractual constraints. We present nvPAX, a constrained-optimization policy that computes feasible power allocations at every control step via a three-phase hybrid QP/LP procedure. Phase I allocates power with minimum deviation from each device's power request, while respecting job priorities. Phase II fairly distributes excess power among active devices. Phase III fairly distributes any remaining power to idle devices. The rationale behind the three phases is to allow power oversubscription while maximizing datacenter utilization. On a trace-driven large-scale simulation using GPU power telemetry from a production datacenter, nvPAX runs with a mean wall-clock time of 264.69 ms per allocation interval and achieves a mean satisfaction ratio of 98.92%, outperforming static equal-share allocation and providing robustness beyond greedy proportional allocation in the presence of non-uniform hierarchical bottlenecks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种约束优化策略nvPAX，通过三阶段混合QP/LP过程在分层多租户系统中动态分配功率，实现高利用率和高满意度。
ai.motivation: 现有功率分配方法假设平坦功率域，忽略实际数据中心的分层结构和租户级合同约束，导致利用率低或违反约束。
ai.method: 采用三阶段混合二次规划/线性规划：阶段一最小化与设备请求的偏差并尊重作业优先级；阶段二公平分配超额功率给活跃设备；阶段三将剩余功率分配给空闲设备。
ai.result: 基于生产数据中心GPU功率遥测的轨迹驱动大规模仿真中，平均分配间隔耗时264.69毫秒，平均满意度比率98.92%，优于静态均分和贪婪比例分配。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助数据中心管理员在分层多租户环境下实现高效、公平且满足约束的动态功率分配。

idea_spark.idea: 将功率分配分解为请求满足、超额公平分配和剩余分配三个阶段，兼顾优先级、公平性和利用率。
idea_spark.risk: 三阶段顺序可能引入次优解，且对实时性要求高的场景需进一步优化计算延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分层电力分配和租户合同约束的实际需求启发，将约束优化与多阶段决策结合。

zh.tldr: 提出一种约束优化策略nvPAX，通过三阶段混合QP/LP过程在分层多租户系统中动态分配功率，实现高利用率和高满意度。

zh.result: 基于生产数据中心GPU功率遥测的轨迹驱动大规模仿真中，平均分配间隔耗时264.69毫秒，平均满意度比率98.92%，优于静态均分和贪婪比例分配。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助数据中心管理员在分层多租户环境下实现高效、公平且满足约束的动态功率分配。

idea_spark.idea: 将功率分配分解为请求满足、超额公平分配和剩余分配三个阶段，兼顾优先级、公平性和利用率。
idea_spark.risk: 三阶段顺序可能引入次优解，且对实时性要求高的场景需进一步优化计算延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分层电力分配和租户合同约束的实际需求启发，将约束优化与多阶段决策结合。

en.tldr: Proposes nvPAX, a constrained optimization policy using a three-phase hybrid QP/LP procedure for dynamic power allocation in hierarchical multi-tenant systems, achieving high utilization and satisfaction ratio.
en.motivation: Existing power allocation methods assume flat power domains, ignoring hierarchical structures and tenant-level contractual constraints in real datacenters, leading to low utilization or constraint violations.
en.method: Employs a three-phase hybrid quadratic/linear programming: Phase I minimizes deviation from device requests while respecting job priorities; Phase II fairly distributes excess power to active devices; Phase III distributes remaining power to idle devices.
en.result: In trace-driven large-scale simulation using GPU power telemetry from a production datacenter, mean wall-clock time is 264.69 ms per allocation interval, mean satisfaction ratio is 98.92%, outperforming static equal-share and greedy proportional allocation.
en.help_to_user: Helps datacenter operators achieve efficient, fair, and constraint-satisfying dynamic power allocation in hierarchical multi-tenant environments.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose power allocation into request satisfaction, excess fair distribution, and residual distribution phases to balance priority, fairness, and utilization.
idea_spark.risk: Sequential phases may lead to suboptimal solutions; computational latency needs further reduction for real-time scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by practical hierarchical power distribution and tenant contract constraints, combining constrained optimization with multi-stage decision making.

papers.title: Optimizing Travel Time and Regenerative Energy for Periodic Timetables
papers.summary: Regenerating braking energy is one major pathway to make rail traffic energy-efficient. It is therefore desirable to design timetables that exploit this feature. However, timetables that allow to regenerate energy are often bad for the passengers. We hence formulate and analyze a bicriteria optimization problem (PESP-Passenger-Energy) to find periodic railway timetables that maximize the regenerated energy in terms of the brake-traction overlap time and minimize the travel time of the passengers. Our model extends the Periodic Event Scheduling Problem (PESP) and offers a rich combinatorial theory. We investigate its computational complexity on one-station networks, building on matchings and Hamiltonian paths. Besides showing its NP-hardness even for a single objective, we identify several polynomial-time solvable special cases. Finally, we provide two case studies, underlining the practicability of our model, and analyzing the Pareto front.

ai.tldr: 提出一个双目标优化模型，在周期性铁路时刻表中同时最大化再生制动能量重叠时间和最小化乘客旅行时间。
ai.motivation: 再生制动是铁路节能的重要途径，但最大化能量回收的时刻表往往增加乘客旅行时间，需要权衡。
ai.method: 扩展周期性事件调度问题（PESP）为双目标模型，基于匹配和哈密顿路径分析单站网络的计算复杂度，证明NP难并识别多项式可解特例。
ai.result: 通过两个案例研究验证模型实用性，并分析帕累托前沿。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助铁路调度员理解能量回收与旅行时间之间的权衡，并设计更优的时刻表。

idea_spark.idea: 将再生制动重叠时间作为目标之一，可启发其他交通模式（如电动汽车）的能量回收调度研究。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度高，实际大规模网络可能难以求解；帕累托前沿分析需要大量计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合图论中的匹配与哈密顿路径分析，为组合优化问题提供新的理论视角。

zh.tldr: 提出一个双目标优化模型，在周期性铁路时刻表中同时最大化再生制动能量重叠时间和最小化乘客旅行时间。
zh.motivation: 再生制动是铁路节能的重要途径，但最大化能量回收的时刻表往往增加乘客旅行时间，需要权衡。

zh.result: 通过两个案例研究验证模型实用性，并分析帕累托前沿。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助铁路调度员理解能量回收与旅行时间之间的权衡，并设计更优的时刻表。

idea_spark.idea: 将再生制动重叠时间作为目标之一，可启发其他交通模式（如电动汽车）的能量回收调度研究。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度高，实际大规模网络可能难以求解；帕累托前沿分析需要大量计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合图论中的匹配与哈密顿路径分析，为组合优化问题提供新的理论视角。

en.tldr: A bicriteria optimization model for periodic railway timetables that maximizes regenerative braking energy overlap and minimizes passenger travel time.
en.motivation: Regenerative braking is key for energy-efficient rail, but energy-maximizing timetables often increase passenger travel time, requiring a trade-off.
en.method: Extends the Periodic Event Scheduling Problem (PESP) to a bicriteria model, analyzes computational complexity on one-station networks using matchings and Hamiltonian paths, proves NP-hardness, and identifies polynomial-time solvable cases.
en.result: Two case studies validate the model's practicality and analyze the Pareto front.
en.help_to_user: Helps railway schedulers understand the trade-off between energy recovery and travel time, enabling better timetable design.

idea_spark.idea: Using brake-traction overlap as an objective may inspire energy recovery scheduling in other transport modes like electric vehicles.
idea_spark.risk: High model complexity may hinder solution for large-scale networks; Pareto front analysis requires significant computation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining graph theory concepts like matchings and Hamiltonian paths offers new theoretical insights for combinatorial optimization.

papers.title: Rethink MAE with Linear Time-Invariant Dynamics
papers.summary: Standard representation probing for visual models relies on mathematically permutation-invariant operations like Global Average Pooling (GAP) or CLS tokens, treating patch representations as an unstructured bag-of-words. We challenge this paradigm by demonstrating that token order is a critical, exploitable dimension in frozen visual representations (e.g., MAE, BEiT, DINOv2, and ViT as CLS-ablation extreme). We propose SSMProbe, a probing framework driven by a State Space Model (SSM). Operating as discrete Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) dynamical systems, SSMs act as permutation-sensitive probes where sequence order strictly dictates the final state due to inherent memory decay. Formulating token ordering as an information scheduling problem, we compare fixed scan heuristics against a differentiable soft permutation (Sinkhorn-based) learned from downstream supervision. Evaluations on standard and fine-grained classification benchmarks reveal a striking order gap: while fixed scans fail dramatically on highly localized patch features, our learned soft permutation successfully extracts highly competitive performance from otherwise heavily localized patch sequences. We find that pre-training objectives fundamentally shape token structure: DINOv2 concentrates global semantics in optimized CLS tokens leaving patches hyperspecialized, pure MAE preserves distributed representations with heterogeneous patch informativeness, and ViT represents a supervised CLS-dominated extreme. BEiT occupies middle ground. This heterogeneity is order-dependent -- meaning the SSM probe's performance depends critically on which tokens are placed at which temporal positions -- and is not merely a topological property of the spatial grid. SSMProbe's learned routing effectively discovers and exploits this heterogeneity, offering a powerful new diagnostic lens for visual representation analysis.

ai.tldr: 提出SSMProbe，利用状态空间模型（LTI系统）对冻结视觉表示中的token顺序进行探测，发现顺序是关键维度，并通过可学习的软排列提取高性能。
ai.motivation: 标准视觉表示探测方法（如GAP、CLS token）将token视为无序词袋，忽略了token顺序蕴含的结构信息。
ai.method: 将状态空间模型（SSM）作为排列敏感的探测器，利用其记忆衰减特性使最终状态依赖序列顺序；并引入基于Sinkhorn的可微分软排列学习最优token顺序。
ai.result: 在多个基准上，固定扫描在高度局部化的patch特征上表现差，而学习到的软排列能显著提升性能；揭示了不同预训练目标（MAE、DINOv2、ViT等）下token结构的异质性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种新的诊断工具，通过token顺序分析视觉表示的内部结构，帮助理解预训练模型的特征组织方式。

idea_spark.idea: 将token顺序视为可学习的调度问题，利用SSM的LTI特性进行探测，可能启发更高效的表示压缩或特征选择方法。
idea_spark.risk: 软排列学习可能引入额外计算开销，且对预训练目标高度敏感，需要谨慎调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控制理论中LTI系统的记忆衰减启发，将视觉表示分析转化为动态系统问题，开辟了新的研究视角。

en.tldr: Proposes SSMProbe, which uses a State Space Model (LTI system) to probe token order in frozen visual representations, revealing order as a critical dimension and achieving high performance via learned soft permutations.
en.motivation: Standard visual representation probing methods (e.g., GAP, CLS tokens) treat tokens as an unordered bag-of-words, ignoring the structural information inherent in token order.
en.method: Employs a State Space Model (SSM) as a permutation-sensitive probe, leveraging its memory decay to make the final state depend on sequence order; introduces a differentiable soft permutation (Sinkhorn-based) to learn optimal token ordering.
en.result: On multiple benchmarks, fixed scans perform poorly on highly localized patch features, while learned soft permutations significantly boost performance; reveals heterogeneity in token structure across pretraining objectives (MAE, DINOv2, ViT, etc.).
en.help_to_user: Provides a new diagnostic tool for analyzing the internal structure of visual representations via token order, helping understand feature organization in pretrained models.

idea_spark.idea: Treating token order as a learnable scheduling problem and exploiting SSM's LTI properties for probing may inspire more efficient representation compression or feature selection methods.
idea_spark.risk: Learning soft permutations may introduce additional computational overhead and is highly sensitive to the pretraining objective, requiring careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by memory decay in LTI systems from control theory, transforming visual representation analysis into a dynamical system problem opens a new research perspective.

papers.title: Sharp regret-Hellinger bounds for Gaussian empirical Bayes via polynomial approximation
papers.summary: A central problem in the theory of empirical Bayes is to control the regret (excess risk) of a learned Bayes rule by the Hellinger distance between the estimated and true marginal densities. In the normal means model, the classical result of Jiang and Zhang (2009, Annals of Statistics) achieves this only after regularizing the Bayes rule and incurs an extraneous cubic logarithmic factor through a delicate recursive argument.   This paper introduces a new technique, based on polynomial approximation and Bernstein-type inequalities for weighted $L_2$ norms, that bounds the unregularized regret directly. The method is conceptually simpler and yields sharper, sometimes optimal, regret bounds. For compactly supported priors, we prove the sharp bound that the regret is at most $O(ε^2 \log(1/ε)/\log\log(1/ε))$, where $ε$ is the Hellinger distance between the marginal densities. The same method also extends to priors with exponential tails. Conversely, we show that regularization is genuinely necessary for heavy-tailed priors under only bounded moment assumptions. As a statistical consequence, we obtain improved regret bounds for the nonparametric maximum likelihood estimator.

ai.tldr: 通过多项式逼近和加权L2范数的Bernstein型不等式，直接界定了未正则化经验Bayes规则的遗憾，得到了更优的遗憾-Hellinger界。
ai.motivation: 经典结果需要正则化且含额外对数因子，本文旨在消除正则化并改进界。
ai.method: 利用多项式逼近和加权L2范数的Bernstein型不等式，直接分析未正则化遗憾。
ai.result: 对紧支撑先验得到最优遗憾界O(ε² log(1/ε)/log log(1/ε))，并推广到指数尾先验；同时证明重尾先验下正则化必要。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了更简洁、更紧的经验Bayes遗憾界，可用于改进非参数最大似然估计的统计性质。

idea_spark.idea: 将遗憾界问题转化为多项式逼近误差控制，利用加权L2范数不等式简化分析。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于先验的紧支撑或指数尾假设，对一般重尾分布可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从函数逼近理论中汲取工具，替代传统递归论证，实现更直接的上界推导。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了更简洁、更紧的经验Bayes遗憾界，可用于改进非参数最大似然估计的统计性质。

idea_spark.idea: 将遗憾界问题转化为多项式逼近误差控制，利用加权L2范数不等式简化分析。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于先验的紧支撑或指数尾假设，对一般重尾分布可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从函数逼近理论中汲取工具，替代传统递归论证，实现更直接的上界推导。

en.tldr: Using polynomial approximation and Bernstein-type inequalities for weighted L2 norms, this paper directly bounds the unregularized regret in empirical Bayes, achieving sharper regret-Hellinger bounds.
en.motivation: Classical results require regularization and incur an extra logarithmic factor; this work aims to remove regularization and improve the bound.
en.method: Polynomial approximation combined with Bernstein-type inequalities for weighted L2 norms to directly analyze unregularized regret.
en.result: For compactly supported priors, the sharp regret bound O(ε² log(1/ε)/log log(1/ε)) is obtained, extended to exponential-tail priors; regularization is shown necessary for heavy-tailed priors.
en.help_to_user: Provides simpler and tighter regret bounds for empirical Bayes, improving the statistical properties of nonparametric maximum likelihood estimation.

idea_spark.idea: Transform regret bounding into controlling polynomial approximation error using weighted L2 norm inequalities, simplifying the analysis.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on compact support or exponential-tail assumptions on the prior, and may fail for general heavy-tailed distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing tools from function approximation theory to replace traditional recursive arguments, enabling more direct upper bound derivation.

papers.title: Stabilizing Private LASSO under Heterogeneous Covariates via Anisotropic Objective Perturbation
papers.summary: We study high-dimensional LASSO under differential privacy via objective perturbation with heterogeneous covariate scales. In practical scenarios, covariates often exhibit diverse scales; however, standard preprocessing is problematic under privacy constraints, as it consumes additional privacy budget. This heterogeneity induces effective anisotropy in the objective perturbation via the inverse Gram matrix of covariates, which can degrade the stability and accuracy of algorithms. To address this, we propose a Gram-based anisotropic objective perturbation, a ``pre-distortion" strategy that counteracts the distortion from the covariate structure to restore isotropy in the estimation process. Using an Approximate Message Passing (AMP) framework and state evolution analysis, we demonstrate that our proposed perturbation significantly stabilizes convergence and improves both statistical efficiency and privacy performance compared to standard uniform noise injection. Our results provide theoretical insights into designing stable and efficient private estimators without relying on data-dependent preprocessing.

ai.tldr: 针对高维LASSO在差分隐私下的异质协变量问题，提出基于Gram矩阵的各向异性目标扰动方法，通过预失真策略恢复估计过程的各向同性，提升稳定性和精度。
ai.motivation: 实际场景中协变量尺度各异，标准预处理在隐私约束下会消耗额外隐私预算，导致目标扰动因协变量结构产生各向异性，降低算法稳定性与准确性。
ai.method: 提出基于Gram矩阵的各向异性目标扰动，即预失真策略，通过逆Gram矩阵抵消协变量结构带来的扭曲，恢复估计过程的各向同性。
ai.result: 在近似消息传递框架和状态演化分析下，证明所提扰动相比标准均匀噪声注入显著稳定收敛，并提升统计效率与隐私性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计不依赖数据预处理的稳定高效私有估计器提供理论指导。

idea_spark.idea: 将Gram矩阵的逆作为扰动协方差，主动补偿协变量尺度差异，实现各向同性噪声注入。
idea_spark.risk: Gram矩阵逆的计算可能引入额外计算开销，且在高维下需谨慎处理矩阵可逆性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信号处理中的预均衡概念出发，将隐私噪声视为信道干扰，通过预失真实现无偏估计。

zh.motivation: 实际场景中协变量尺度各异，标准预处理在隐私约束下会消耗额外隐私预算，导致目标扰动因协变量结构产生各向异性，降低算法稳定性与准确性。

zh.result: 在近似消息传递框架和状态演化分析下，证明所提扰动相比标准均匀噪声注入显著稳定收敛，并提升统计效率与隐私性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将Gram矩阵的逆作为扰动协方差，主动补偿协变量尺度差异，实现各向同性噪声注入。
idea_spark.risk: Gram矩阵逆的计算可能引入额外计算开销，且在高维下需谨慎处理矩阵可逆性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信号处理中的预均衡概念出发，将隐私噪声视为信道干扰，通过预失真实现无偏估计。

en.tldr: For high-dimensional LASSO under differential privacy with heterogeneous covariates, we propose a Gram-based anisotropic objective perturbation that counteracts covariate-induced distortion via a pre-distortion strategy, restoring isotropy and improving stability and accuracy.
en.motivation: In practice, covariates often have diverse scales, but standard preprocessing consumes extra privacy budget. This heterogeneity causes effective anisotropy in objective perturbation via the inverse Gram matrix, degrading algorithm stability and accuracy.
en.method: We propose a Gram-based anisotropic objective perturbation, a pre-distortion strategy that uses the inverse Gram matrix to counteract covariate structure distortion and restore isotropy in estimation.
en.result: Using an Approximate Message Passing framework and state evolution analysis, we show that our perturbation significantly stabilizes convergence and improves both statistical efficiency and privacy performance compared to standard uniform noise injection.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights for designing stable and efficient private estimators without relying on data-dependent preprocessing.

idea_spark.idea: Use the inverse Gram matrix as the perturbation covariance to actively compensate for covariate scale differences, achieving isotropic noise injection.
idea_spark.risk: Computing the inverse Gram matrix may introduce additional computational overhead, and matrix invertibility must be carefully handled in high dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by pre-equalization in signal processing, treat privacy noise as channel interference and apply pre-distortion for unbiased estimation.

papers.title: SCGNN: Semantic Consistency enhanced Graph Neural Network Guided by Granular-ball Computing
papers.summary: Capturing semantic consistency among nodes is crucial for effective graph representation learning. Existing approaches typically rely on $k$-nearest neighbors ($k$NN) or other node-level full search algorithms (FSA) to mine semantic relationships via exhaustive pairwise similarity computation, which suffer from high computational complexity and rigid neighbor selection, limiting scalability and introducing noisy connections. In this paper, we propose the Semantic Consistency enhanced Graph Neural Network (SCGNN), a novel plug-and-play framework that leverages granular-ball computing (GBC) to efficiently capture semantic consistency in a scalable manner. Unlike node-level FSA methods, SCGNN models group-level semantic structure by adaptively partitioning nodes into granular balls, significantly reducing computational cost while improving robustness to noise. To effectively utilize the discovered group-level semantic consistency, we design a dual enhancement strategy. Specifically, (1) a structure enhancement module constructs an anchor-based graph structure, where each anchor is a virtual node representing the group-level semantic carried by a granular ball, then injecting group-level semantic information into the graph structure; and (2) a supervision enhancement module performs label consistency checking (LCC) by combining GBC predictions with model-generated pseudo-labels, thereby producing more reliable supervision signals. SCGNN is compatible with various GNN backbones. During the forward propagation of SCGNN, the vanilla graph and the augment graph are jointly encoded, and their predictions are fused; during the backpropagation, the supervision enhancement module provides enhanced supervision signals to guide parameter updates.

ai.tldr: 提出SCGNN框架，利用粒球计算高效捕获节点间语义一致性，通过结构增强和监督增强双策略提升图神经网络性能。
ai.motivation: 现有基于kNN或全搜索的方法计算复杂度高、邻居选择刚性，难以扩展且易引入噪声连接。
ai.method: 用粒球计算自适应划分节点为粒球，构建锚点图注入组级语义；结合粒球预测与伪标签进行标签一致性检查，增强监督信号。
ai.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SCGNN显著降低计算开销，同时提升节点分类等任务的准确性和鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种即插即用的图神经网络增强模块，可集成到现有GNN骨干中，提升语义一致性建模效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒球计算与对比学习结合，利用组级语义构造正负样本对，增强图表示判别力。
idea_spark.risk: 粒球划分的粒度选择可能影响性能，需自适应机制；伪标签质量依赖模型初始预测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从粒计算视角重新审视图结构学习，启发用不同粒度层次捕获多尺度语义模式。

zh.tldr: 提出SCGNN框架，利用粒球计算高效捕获节点间语义一致性，通过结构增强和监督增强双策略提升图神经网络性能。
zh.motivation: 现有基于kNN或全搜索的方法计算复杂度高、邻居选择刚性，难以扩展且易引入噪声连接。
zh.method: 用粒球计算自适应划分节点为粒球，构建锚点图注入组级语义；结合粒球预测与伪标签进行标签一致性检查，增强监督信号。
zh.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SCGNN显著降低计算开销，同时提升节点分类等任务的准确性和鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种即插即用的图神经网络增强模块，可集成到现有GNN骨干中，提升语义一致性建模效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒球计算与对比学习结合，利用组级语义构造正负样本对，增强图表示判别力。
idea_spark.risk: 粒球划分的粒度选择可能影响性能，需自适应机制；伪标签质量依赖模型初始预测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从粒计算视角重新审视图结构学习，启发用不同粒度层次捕获多尺度语义模式。

en.tldr: Proposes SCGNN, a plug-and-play framework that leverages granular-ball computing to efficiently capture semantic consistency among nodes, enhancing GNNs via structure and supervision enhancement.
en.motivation: Existing kNN or full-search methods suffer from high complexity, rigid neighbor selection, and noise, limiting scalability.
en.method: Uses granular-ball computing to adaptively partition nodes into granular balls, constructs an anchor graph to inject group-level semantics, and performs label consistency checking with pseudo-labels for enhanced supervision.
en.result: SCGNN significantly reduces computational cost while improving accuracy and robustness on node classification benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a plug-and-play module that can be integrated into existing GNN backbones to improve semantic consistency modeling efficiently.

idea_spark.idea: Combine granular-ball computing with contrastive learning to construct positive/negative pairs from group-level semantics for better representation discrimination.
idea_spark.risk: Granularity selection may affect performance; pseudo-label quality depends on initial model predictions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting graph structure learning from a granular computing perspective inspires multi-scale semantic pattern capture at different granularity levels.

papers.title: ClarifySTL: An Interactive LLM Agent Framework for STL Transformation through Requirements Clarification
papers.summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a formal language for specifying real-time behaviors of cyber-physical systems (CPS). Automatically transforming natural language requirements into STL specifications has received growing attention. Recent efforts leveraging large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance, but some natural language requirements in practice contain vague or ambiguous information, which remains challenging for LLMs to handle. To address these challenges, we propose ClarifySTL, an interactive LLM-agent framework that enhances STL transformation through requirements clarification. ClarifySTL first detects vague expressions that indicate underspecified information in a requirement. If any vagueness is detected, it generates targeted clarification queries to guide users in supplementing the requirement until all necessary details are provided. Subsequently, if ClarifySTL detects ambiguities, it formulates focused ambiguity clarification queries and updates the requirements based on user feedback until all ambiguities are resolved. Finally, the requirements with vagueness and ambiguity clarified are transformed into STL specifications using LLMs. This interactive framework ensures that the resulting STL formulas faithfully capture user intent while reducing the burden on the user. We evaluate ClarifySTL on the representative benchmarks DeepSTL and STL-DivEn, as well as our newly introduced AmbiEval benchmark, which is specifically designed to assess the performance of the agents in handling vagueness and ambiguity, including both detection and query generation. The experimental results show that ClarifySTL is effective.

ai.tldr: 提出ClarifySTL，一个交互式LLM智能体框架，通过需求澄清提升自然语言到STL的转换质量。
ai.motivation: 自然语言需求中的模糊和歧义信息使LLM难以准确转换为STL规范。
ai.method: 先检测模糊表达并生成澄清查询，再处理歧义，最后将澄清后的需求转换为STL。
ai.result: 在DeepSTL、STL-DivEn和新AmbiEval基准上验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户将不精确的自然语言需求转化为精确的STL公式，减少用户负担。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习和用户反馈循环，自动生成针对性问题以消除需求中的不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖用户及时准确反馈，可能增加交互成本；对复杂歧义的处理能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM作为对话式需求分析助手，通过多轮交互逐步精化规范。

zh.tldr: 提出ClarifySTL，一个交互式LLM智能体框架，通过需求澄清提升自然语言到STL的转换质量。
zh.motivation: 自然语言需求中的模糊和歧义信息使LLM难以准确转换为STL规范。
zh.method: 先检测模糊表达并生成澄清查询，再处理歧义，最后将澄清后的需求转换为STL。
zh.result: 在DeepSTL、STL-DivEn和新AmbiEval基准上验证了有效性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户将不精确的自然语言需求转化为精确的STL公式，减少用户负担。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习和用户反馈循环，自动生成针对性问题以消除需求中的不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖用户及时准确反馈，可能增加交互成本；对复杂歧义的处理能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM作为对话式需求分析助手，通过多轮交互逐步精化规范。

en.tldr: Proposes ClarifySTL, an interactive LLM agent framework that improves natural language to STL transformation via requirements clarification.
en.motivation: Vague and ambiguous information in natural language requirements hinders accurate STL specification generation by LLMs.
en.method: Detects vague expressions and generates clarification queries, then resolves ambiguities through user feedback before final STL transformation.
en.result: Effectively validated on DeepSTL, STL-DivEn, and the new AmbiEval benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Helps users convert imprecise natural language requirements into precise STL formulas with reduced user burden.

idea_spark.idea: Combine active learning with user feedback loops to automatically generate targeted questions that eliminate uncertainty in requirements.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on timely and accurate user feedback, potentially increasing interaction cost; limited handling of complex ambiguities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use LLMs as conversational requirements analysis assistants to progressively refine specifications through multi-turn interaction.

papers.title: Serrin's overdetermined problem and sharp harmonic quadrature identities in the plane
papers.summary: We study a weak formulation of Serrin's overdetermined boundary value problem in planar Jordan domains with rectifiable boundary. Our first result establishes that, within the class of rectifiable Jordan Smirnov domains, the corresponding harmonic quadrature identity, equivalent to Serrin's overdetermined problem, necessarily implies that the domain is a disk. Subsequently, we construct a family of rectifiable, non-Smirnov Jordan domains that nonetheless satisfy the same quadrature identity, thereby demonstrating the sharpness of the Smirnov regularity assumption. Consequently, there exists a nontrivial Jordan domain with rectifiable boundary satisfying the weak formulation of Serrin's overdetermined system in $\mathbb R^2$.

ai.tldr: 在平面Jordan域中，Serrin超定边值问题的弱形式等价于调和求积恒等式；在可求长Jordan Smirnov域中该恒等式迫使域为圆盘，但存在非Smirnov的可求长Jordan域满足该恒等式，表明Smirnov正则性假设是紧的。
ai.motivation: 研究Serrin超定问题在弱形式下的可解性，并探究边界正则性条件（Smirnov性）的必要性。
ai.method: 利用调和求积恒等式与Serrin问题的等价性，构造反例族以检验Smirnov假设的紧性。
ai.result: 在可求长Jordan Smirnov域中恒等式迫使域为圆盘；存在可求长非Smirnov Jordan域满足同一恒等式，从而得到非平凡解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Serrin超定问题在弱框架下的边界正则性要求，以及调和求积恒等式在几何刻画中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非Smirnov域构造反例，说明弱解存在但经典解不存在的边界条件。
idea_spark.risk: 反例构造依赖于平面复分析技巧，推广到高维可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 边界正则性假设的紧性结果启发我们重新审视其他超定问题中正则性条件的必要性。

zh.tldr: 在平面Jordan域中，Serrin超定边值问题的弱形式等价于调和求积恒等式；在可求长Jordan Smirnov域中该恒等式迫使域为圆盘，但存在非Smirnov的可求长Jordan域满足该恒等式，表明Smirnov正则性假设是紧的。
zh.motivation: 研究Serrin超定问题在弱形式下的可解性，并探究边界正则性条件（Smirnov性）的必要性。

zh.result: 在可求长Jordan Smirnov域中恒等式迫使域为圆盘；存在可求长非Smirnov Jordan域满足同一恒等式，从而得到非平凡解。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非Smirnov域构造反例，说明弱解存在但经典解不存在的边界条件。

en.tldr: In planar Jordan domains, a weak formulation of Serrin's overdetermined problem is equivalent to a harmonic quadrature identity; within rectifiable Jordan Smirnov domains the identity forces the domain to be a disk, but a family of rectifiable non-Smirnov Jordan domains satisfies the same identity, showing sharpness of the Smirnov regularity assumption.
en.motivation: To study the solvability of Serrin's overdetermined problem in a weak sense and to investigate the necessity of boundary regularity (Smirnov condition).
en.method: Using the equivalence between the harmonic quadrature identity and Serrin's problem, constructing counterexample families to test sharpness of the Smirnov assumption.
en.result: In rectifiable Jordan Smirnov domains the identity forces the domain to be a disk; there exist rectifiable non-Smirnov Jordan domains satisfying the same identity, yielding a nontrivial weak solution.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the boundary regularity requirements for Serrin's overdetermined problem in a weak framework and the role of harmonic quadrature identities in geometric characterization.

idea_spark.idea: Use non-Smirnov domains to construct counterexamples where weak solutions exist but classical solutions do not.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on planar complex analysis; generalization to higher dimensions may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: The sharpness result on boundary regularity assumptions encourages re-examining necessity of regularity conditions in other overdetermined problems.

papers.title: Unsupervised Machine Learning for Detecting Structural Anomalies in European Regional Statistics
papers.summary: Ensuring the coherence of regional socio-economic statistics is a central task for national statistical institutes. Traditional validation tools, such as range edits, ratio checks, or univariate outlier detection, are effective for identifying extreme values in individual series but are less suited for detecting unusual combinations of indicators in high-dimensional settings. This paper proposes an unsupervised machine learning framework for identifying structurally atypical regional profiles within Europe using publicly available Eurostat data. We construct a cross-sectional dataset of NUTS2 regions (2022) covering four key indicators: GDP per capita in PPS, unemployment rate, tertiary educational attainment, and population density. We apply and compare five anomaly detection techniques, univariate z-scores, Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, and One-Class SVM, and classify a region as a structural anomaly if it is flagged by at least three of the five methods. The findings show that machine learning methods identify a consistent set of regions whose multivariate profiles diverge substantially from the EU-wide pattern. These include both highly developed metropolitan economies (Brussels, Vienna, Berlin, Prague) and regions with persistent socio-economic disadvantages (Central and Western Slovakia, Northern Hungary, Castilla-La Mancha, Extremadura), as well as Istanbul, whose profile differs markedly from EU capital regions. Importantly, these anomalies do not necessarily signal data quality issues; rather, they reflect meaningful structural divergence that warrants analytical or policy attention. The proposed framework is fully reproducible, scalable, and compatible with existing validation workflows, offering a flexible tool for early detection of unusual regional configurations within the European Statistical System.

ai.tldr: 提出无监督机器学习框架，利用Eurostat数据检测欧洲NUTS2区域的结构性异常，识别出高度发达和持续落后的区域。
ai.motivation: 传统验证工具难以检测高维数据中指标的非典型组合，需要更有效的方法确保区域统计的连贯性。
ai.method: 构建包含四个关键指标的横截面数据集，比较五种异常检测技术（z分数、马氏距离、孤立森林、局部异常因子、单类SVM），采用多数投票法标记异常区域。
ai.result: 机器学习方法一致识别出多元特征显著偏离欧盟模式的区域，包括发达都市和落后地区，这些异常反映结构性差异而非数据质量问题。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可复现、可扩展的异常检测工具，帮助统计机构早期发现区域配置异常，支持政策分析。

idea_spark.idea: 结合时间序列数据，检测区域指标随时间演变的异常模式。
idea_spark.risk: 多数投票法可能忽略单一方法发现的细微异常，需平衡敏感性与特异性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用无监督学习自动发现数据中的结构性模式，减少人工审查负担。

en.tldr: Proposes an unsupervised machine learning framework to detect structural anomalies in European NUTS2 regions using Eurostat data, identifying both highly developed and persistently disadvantaged areas.
en.motivation: Traditional validation tools are ineffective for detecting unusual combinations of indicators in high-dimensional settings, necessitating more robust methods for ensuring regional statistical coherence.
en.method: Constructs a cross-sectional dataset of four key indicators, compares five anomaly detection techniques (z-scores, Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest, LOF, One-Class SVM), and classifies regions flagged by at least three methods as anomalies.
en.result: Machine learning methods consistently identify regions with multivariate profiles diverging from EU patterns, including metropolitan economies and disadvantaged areas, reflecting structural divergence rather than data quality issues.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible, scalable anomaly detection tool for early identification of unusual regional configurations, supporting analytical and policy attention.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate time-series data to detect anomalous temporal patterns in regional indicators.
idea_spark.risk: Majority voting may miss subtle anomalies detected by a single method, requiring a balance between sensitivity and specificity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage unsupervised learning to automatically discover structural patterns in data, reducing manual review burden.

papers.title: Emergent population dynamics of random walkers with cooperative reproduction and spatial selection
papers.summary: We extend the $N$ branching Brownian motions model of population invasion to higher-order asexual reproduction. Increasing reproduction order leads to qualitative changes: invasion fronts generically cease to exist beyond binary reproduction; and in the binary case itself, their speed becomes diffusion-independent. Ternary reproduction shows critical behavior, with collapse into a strongly localized `invasion bullet' in the supercritical regime, diffusive spreading in the subcritical regime, and a continuous family of fronts at criticality. These results suggest that the dominance of division and binary reproduction in nature reflects fundamental constraints on invasion dynamics.

ai.tldr: 将N分支布朗运动模型扩展到高阶无性繁殖，发现繁殖阶数增加导致入侵前沿定性变化，二元繁殖速度与扩散无关，三元繁殖出现临界行为。
ai.motivation: 探索自然界中二元繁殖占主导地位背后的动力学约束。
ai.method: 扩展N分支布朗运动模型至高阶无性繁殖，分析不同繁殖阶数下的入侵前沿行为。
ai.result: 二元繁殖速度与扩散无关；三元繁殖出现超临界局域化、亚临界扩散和临界连续前沿。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解繁殖方式对种群空间扩张动力学的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 利用临界行为设计可控的种群扩张策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化真实生物繁殖的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究其他高阶合作过程在空间动力学中的临界现象。

en.tldr: Extending the N branching Brownian motions model to higher-order asexual reproduction reveals qualitative changes in invasion fronts: binary reproduction speed becomes diffusion-independent, and ternary reproduction exhibits critical behavior.
en.motivation: To explore the dynamical constraints underlying the dominance of binary reproduction in nature.
en.method: Extended the N branching Brownian motions model to higher-order asexual reproduction and analyzed invasion front behavior for different reproduction orders.
en.result: Binary reproduction speed is diffusion-independent; ternary reproduction shows supercritical localization, subcritical diffusion, and a continuous family of fronts at criticality.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how reproduction mode affects population spatial expansion dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage critical behavior to design controllable population expansion strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify the complexity of real biological reproduction.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires investigation of critical phenomena in other higher-order cooperative processes in spatial dynamics.

papers.title: Universal Smoothness via Bernstein Polynomials: A Constructive Approximation Approach for Activation Functions
papers.summary: The efficacy of deep neural networks is heavily reliant on the design of non-linear activation functions, yet existing approaches often struggle to balance optimization stability with computational efficiency. While piecewise linear functions offer inference speed, they suffer from optimization instability due to non-differentiability at the origin, whereas smooth counterparts typically incur significant computational overhead through their reliance on transcendental operations. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a general smoothing framework based on constructive approximation theory and introduces the Bernstein Linear Unit (BerLU). This novel activation function utilizes Bernstein polynomials to construct a differentiable quadratic transition region that effectively eliminates singularities while maintaining a piecewise linear structure. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that the proposed method guarantees strictly continuous differentiability and a non-expansive Lipschitz constant of one, which ensures stable gradient propagation and prevents the gradient explosion problems common in deep architectures. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across representative Vision Transformer and Convolutional Neural Network architectures confirm that this approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard image classification benchmarks while delivering superior computational and memory efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出基于伯恩斯坦多项式的通用平滑框架，设计BerLU激活函数，在保持分段线性结构的同时消除奇异性，实现严格连续可微和Lipschitz常数1，提升深度网络优化稳定性与计算效率。
ai.motivation: 现有激活函数难以兼顾优化稳定性与计算效率：分段线性函数在原点不可导导致优化不稳定，而平滑函数依赖超越运算带来高计算开销。
ai.method: 利用构造性逼近理论中的伯恩斯坦多项式构建可微二次过渡区域，提出BerLU激活函数，在保持分段线性结构的同时消除奇点，保证严格连续可微且Lipschitz常数为1。
ai.result: 在Vision Transformer和CNN架构上的图像分类基准测试中，BerLU一致优于现有基线，并具有更优的计算和内存效率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种即插即用的激活函数替代方案，可稳定梯度传播、防止梯度爆炸，适用于深层网络训练。

idea_spark.idea: 将伯恩斯坦多项式应用于激活函数设计，在保持线性计算效率的同时实现平滑可微，为激活函数设计提供了新的理论工具。
idea_spark.risk: 伯恩斯坦多项式的阶数选择可能影响性能，且二次过渡区域可能限制对更复杂非线性模式的表达能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从构造性逼近理论出发，利用多项式逼近解决深度学习中的非光滑优化问题，启发其他基于多项式近似的网络组件设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a general smoothing framework based on Bernstein polynomials, introducing BerLU activation that eliminates singularities while maintaining piecewise linear structure, achieving strictly continuous differentiability and a non-expansive Lipschitz constant of one for stable optimization and computational efficiency.
en.motivation: Existing activation functions struggle to balance optimization stability and computational efficiency: piecewise linear functions suffer from non-differentiability at the origin, while smooth counterparts incur high computational overhead due to transcendental operations.
en.method: Uses Bernstein polynomials from constructive approximation theory to construct a differentiable quadratic transition region, resulting in BerLU that eliminates singularities while preserving piecewise linear structure, ensuring strict continuous differentiability and a Lipschitz constant of one.
en.result: On Vision Transformer and CNN architectures for image classification, BerLU consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with superior computational and memory efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a plug-and-play activation function that stabilizes gradient propagation and prevents gradient explosion, suitable for training deep networks.

idea_spark.idea: Applying Bernstein polynomials to activation function design achieves smooth differentiability while maintaining linear computational efficiency, offering a new theoretical tool for activation design.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of Bernstein polynomial degree may affect performance, and the quadratic transition region may limit expressiveness for more complex nonlinear patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging constructive approximation theory to address non-smooth optimization in deep learning inspires other polynomial-based network component designs.

papers.title: RA-CMF: Region-Adaptive Conditional MeanFlow for CT Image Reconstruction
papers.summary: The use of CT imaging is important for screening, diagnosis, therapy planning, and prognosis of lung cancers. Unfortunately, due to differences in imaging protocols and scanner models, CT images acquired by different means may show large differences in noise statistics, contrast, and texture. In this study, we develop a novel conditional MeanFlow pipeline for CT image reconstruction. We introduce a conditional MeanFlow network that models the enhancement trajectory by predicting image-conditioned flow fields given intermediate image states. The image enhancement network is trained with a MeanFlow consistency loss along with the image reconstruction loss. In order to provide an adaptive refinement process in terms of spatial location of enhancements, we integrate a regional reinforcement learning-driven policy network into our approach. The policy network receives information about the MeanFlow rollouts and provides predictions in terms of tile-wise refinement budgets, stopping criteria, and total budget allocation of enhancement processes. Our policy network is trained through reinforcement learning in a policy gradient framework, where the goal of the training reward is to maximize improvement of enhancements while minimizing unnecessary computations and avoiding instabilities. In this way, our approach combines conditional flow-based enhancement with reinforcement learning-based spatial enhancement control. This allows our approach to focus more attention on enhancing difficult areas while stabilizing areas already showing sufficient quality. Our results show high accuracy in the tumor ROI, with the average radiomic feature CCC being 0.96, an average PSNR of 31.30 $\pm$ 4.16, and average SSIM of 0.94 $\pm$ 0.07. Moreover, there is an improvement in the overall quality of images, with an average PSNR of 34.23 $\pm$ 1.71 and average SSIM of 0.95 $\pm$ 0.01.

ai.tldr: 提出一种区域自适应条件MeanFlow管道，结合强化学习策略网络，实现CT图像的自适应增强与高质量重建。
ai.motivation: 不同CT设备和协议导致图像噪声、对比度和纹理差异大，现有方法难以自适应处理空间不均匀的增强需求。
ai.method: 构建条件MeanFlow网络预测图像增强流场，并集成区域强化学习策略网络，按瓦片分配增强预算、停止准则和总预算，通过策略梯度训练优化增强效果与计算效率。
ai.result: 肿瘤ROI的放射组学特征CCC达0.96，平均PSNR 31.30±4.16，SSIM 0.94±0.07；整体图像PSNR 34.23±1.71，SSIM 0.95±0.01。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种能自动聚焦困难区域、稳定高质量区域的CT重建方法，提升诊断图像的一致性和准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件流模型与强化学习空间控制结合，实现按需计算资源分配。
idea_spark.risk: 策略网络训练可能不稳定，需精心设计奖励函数；瓦片划分粒度影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用强化学习动态分配增强预算，启发在图像超分辨率、去噪等任务中引入空间自适应策略。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用强化学习动态分配增强预算，启发在图像超分辨率、去噪等任务中引入空间自适应策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a region-adaptive conditional MeanFlow pipeline with a reinforcement learning policy network for adaptive CT image reconstruction and enhancement.
en.motivation: CT images from different scanners/protocols vary in noise, contrast, and texture; existing methods lack spatial adaptivity for heterogeneous enhancement needs.
en.method: Builds a conditional MeanFlow network to predict image-conditioned flow fields, and integrates a regional RL-driven policy network that allocates tile-wise refinement budgets, stopping criteria, and total budget via policy gradient training.
en.result: Tumor ROI radiomic feature CCC 0.96, average PSNR 31.30±4.16, SSIM 0.94±0.07; overall image PSNR 34.23±1.71, SSIM 0.95±0.01.
en.help_to_user: Provides a CT reconstruction method that automatically focuses on difficult regions while stabilizing high-quality areas, improving diagnostic consistency and accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Combine conditional flow models with RL-based spatial control for on-demand computational resource allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Policy network training may be unstable; reward function design is critical; tile granularity affects performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using RL to dynamically allocate enhancement budgets inspires spatial adaptive strategies in tasks like super-resolution and denoising.

papers.title: Unifying Deep Stochastic Processes for Image Enhancement
papers.summary: Deep stochastic processes have recently become a central paradigm for image enhancement, with many methods explicitly conditioning the stochastic trajectory on the degraded input. However, the relationship between these conditional processes and standard diffusion models remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a unified perspective on stochastic image enhancement by classifying recent methods into three families of continuous-time processes: unconditional diffusion models, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) processes, and diffusion bridges. We show that all of these approaches arise from a common stochastic differential equation (SDE) formulation. This framework makes explicit that seemingly disparate methods differ primarily in their drift and diffusion terms, terminal distributions, and boundary conditions, while schedulers and samplers constitute orthogonal design choices. Leveraging this unification, we conduct a controlled empirical study across multiple image enhancement tasks using identical architectures and training protocols. Our results reveal no consistently dominant method; instead, we identify and disentangle the specific design choices that most strongly influence performance. Finally, we release ItoVision, a modular PyTorch library that implements the unified framework and enables rapid prototyping and fair comparison of stochastic image enhancement methods.

ai.tldr: 本文统一了基于深度随机过程的图像增强方法，将其分为无条件扩散模型、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程和扩散桥三类，并基于共同SDE框架进行实证比较，发现无单一方法占优，关键性能取决于具体设计选择。
ai.motivation: 现有图像增强方法虽多基于深度随机过程，但不同条件过程与标准扩散模型间的关系不明确，缺乏统一视角。
ai.method: 提出统一SDE框架，将方法按漂移项、扩散项、终端分布和边界条件分类，并构建模块化PyTorch库ItoVision进行公平比较。
ai.result: 在多个图像增强任务中，无方法始终最优；性能主要受特定设计选择影响。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员理解不同随机图像增强方法的本质联系，并利用ItoVision快速原型设计和公平比较。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该框架设计自适应调度器，根据输入退化程度动态调整扩散过程。
idea_spark.risk: 框架简化可能忽略某些方法特有的非线性或数据依赖特性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从控制论角度，将图像增强视为随机最优控制问题，优化漂移项以匹配目标分布。

en.method: A unified SDE framework classifies methods by drift, diffusion, terminal distribution, and boundary conditions; the modular PyTorch library ItoVision enables fair comparison.
en.result: No method consistently outperforms others across tasks; key design choices determine performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand connections among stochastic image enhancement methods and use ItoVision for rapid prototyping and fair benchmarking.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive scheduler that adjusts the diffusion process based on input degradation level.
idea_spark.risk: The framework may oversimplify method-specific nonlinearities or data-dependent features.
idea_spark.inspiration: View image enhancement as a stochastic optimal control problem, optimizing drift to match target distribution.

papers.title: Low-Latency Embedded Driver Monitoring System with a Multi-Task Neural Network
papers.summary: Road traffic accidents remain a significant global concern, with the majority attributed to human factors such as driver distraction and fatigue. This study proposes a camera-based approach to derive useful indicators to assess driver attentiveness and alertness. The proposed pipeline jointly satisfies the stringent real-time requirements imposed by the critical application and minimizes the computational requirements to allow for deployment on a tight computational budget. To this end, we develop a lightweight multi-task neural network that predicts multiple indicators for the face region in a single forward pass. The developed model is integrated into a complete execution workflow to produce a real-time estimate of attentiveness, fatigue, and engagement in distracting activities.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于轻量级多任务神经网络的嵌入式驾驶员监控系统，在低计算预算下实时评估注意力、疲劳和分心行为。
ai.motivation: 多数交通事故由驾驶员分心和疲劳等人为因素导致，现有系统难以在嵌入式设备上同时满足实时性和低计算需求。
ai.method: 设计轻量级多任务神经网络，单次前向传播同时预测面部区域的多个指标，并集成完整执行流程实现实时评估。
ai.result: 在严格实时要求下有效评估驾驶员注意力、疲劳和分心活动，计算需求低，适合嵌入式部署。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用轻量级多任务网络在资源受限设备上实现实时驾驶员状态监测。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将驾驶员状态预测与车辆控制信号融合，实现主动安全干预。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在极端光照或遮挡条件下可能性能下降，需增强鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多任务学习减少计算冗余的思路，可应用于边缘AI中的多传感器融合。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多任务学习减少计算冗余的思路，可应用于边缘AI中的多传感器融合。

en.tldr: Proposes a lightweight multi-task neural network for embedded driver monitoring, jointly estimating attentiveness, fatigue, and distraction in real-time with low computational cost.
en.motivation: Most road accidents are caused by human factors like distraction and fatigue; existing systems struggle to meet real-time and low-compute constraints on embedded devices.
en.method: Develops a lightweight multi-task neural network that predicts multiple facial indicators in a single forward pass, integrated into a complete real-time workflow.
en.result: Achieves real-time assessment of driver attentiveness, fatigue, and distracting activities under strict latency requirements with minimal computational budget.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to deploy real-time driver monitoring on resource-constrained embedded systems using a multi-task lightweight network.

idea_spark.idea: Explore fusing driver state predictions with vehicle control signals for proactive safety interventions.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under extreme lighting or occlusion; robustness enhancements are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of reducing computational redundancy via multi-task learning can inspire multi-sensor fusion in edge AI.

papers.title: SteeringDiffusion: A Bottlenecked Activation Control Interface for Diffusion Models
papers.summary: We introduce SteeringDiffusion, a bottlenecked activation-level control interface for diffusion models that exposes a smooth, monotonic, and runtime-adjustable control surface over the content--style trade-off. Our method keeps the U-Net backbone frozen and learns a small, prompt-conditioned latent code projected to FiLM/AdaGN-style modulation parameters. A zero-initialized design guarantees exact equivalence to the base model at zero scale, while timestep-aware gating restricts modulation to later denoising stages. A single scalar at inference continuously traverses the control surface without retraining. Across experiments on Stable Diffusion~1.5 and SDXL covering multiple artistic styles, we show that SteeringDiffusion produces smooth and monotonic content--style trade-offs. Under matched parameter budgets, it outperforms LoRA in controllability and stability, while ControlNet and rank-1 adapters do not expose a comparable control surface. We further introduce an inversion-stability diagnostic based on DDIM inversion, used as a post-hoc trajectory probe, which reveals strong correlations with intervention magnitude. These results position \emph{Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC)} as a practical, general-purpose control interface for frozen diffusion backbones.

ai.tldr: 提出SteeringDiffusion，一种瓶颈激活控制接口，通过冻结U-Net并学习提示条件潜码实现内容-风格平滑单调可调控制。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型控制方法（如LoRA、ControlNet）缺乏运行时连续可调的内容-风格权衡表面。
ai.method: 冻结U-Net骨干，学习提示条件潜码投影为FiLM/AdaGN调制参数；零初始化保证零尺度时与基模型等价；时间步感知门控限制调制仅作用于后期去噪阶段。
ai.result: 在SD1.5和SDXL上，SteeringDiffusion产生平滑单调的内容-风格权衡；在相同参数预算下，控制性和稳定性优于LoRA；ControlNet和秩1适配器无法暴露类似控制表面。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过单一标量在推理时连续调节扩散模型生成图像的内容与风格比例。

idea_spark.idea: 将DDIM反转稳定性作为后验轨迹探针，用于诊断干预幅度与生成一致性的相关性。
idea_spark.risk: 零初始化设计可能限制大尺度调制时的表达能力；时间步门控可能忽略早期去噪阶段对风格的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受FiLM和AdaGN调制机制启发，结合零初始化与时间步门控实现可解释的连续控制。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受FiLM和AdaGN调制机制启发，结合零初始化与时间步门控实现可解释的连续控制。

en.tldr: Proposes SteeringDiffusion, a bottlenecked activation control interface that freezes the U-Net and learns a prompt-conditioned latent code for smooth, monotonic, runtime-adjustable content-style trade-off.
en.motivation: Existing control methods for diffusion models (e.g., LoRA, ControlNet) lack a continuously adjustable content-style trade-off surface at runtime.
en.method: Freezes the U-Net backbone, learns a prompt-conditioned latent code projected to FiLM/AdaGN modulation parameters; zero-initialized design ensures exact equivalence to the base model at zero scale; timestep-aware gating restricts modulation to later denoising stages.
en.result: On SD1.5 and SDXL, SteeringDiffusion produces smooth and monotonic content-style trade-offs; under matched parameter budgets, it outperforms LoRA in controllability and stability; ControlNet and rank-1 adapters do not expose a comparable control surface.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to continuously adjust the content-style ratio of images generated by diffusion models using a single scalar at inference.

idea_spark.idea: Uses DDIM inversion stability as a post-hoc trajectory probe to diagnose correlations between intervention magnitude and generation consistency.
idea_spark.risk: Zero-initialized design may limit expressiveness at large modulation scales; timestep gating may ignore early denoising stages' influence on style.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by FiLM and AdaGN modulation mechanisms, combined with zero initialization and timestep gating to achieve interpretable continuous control.

papers.title: Adversarial Flow Matching for Imperceptible Attacks on End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Autonomous driving (AD) is evolving towards end-to-end (E2E) frameworks through two primary paradigms: monolithic models exemplified by Vision-Language-Action (VLA), and specialized modular architectures. Despite their divergent designs, both paradigms increasingly rely on Transformer backbones for complex reasoning, potentially causing a shared vulnerability: visually imperceptible perturbations can manipulate E2E AD models into hazardous maneuvers by targeting the Transformer module. Most existing adversarial attack approaches against AD systems operate under white-box or black-box settings; yet, they typically necessitate full model transparency, or suffer from either prohibitive query latency or limited attack transferability. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Flow Matching (AFM), a novel gray-box attack framework that exploits Transformer structural vulnerabilities in E2E AD models. AFM enables efficient one-step generation of adversarial examples via a neural average velocity field. Additionally, the proposed technique yields effective and visually imperceptible attacks by synergistically perturbing the generative latent space and the neural average velocity field. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AFM achieves a superior trade-off between attack effectiveness and imperceptibility: it substantially degrades the performance of both VLA and modular AD agents across various scenarios compared to baselines, while maintaining state-of-the-art visual imperceptibility. Furthermore, adversarial examples generated by AFM exhibit robust cross-model transferability, indicating that AFM closely approximates a black-box attack setting while requiring only the prior knowledge that the target AD model incorporates a Transformer-based module.

ai.tldr: 提出对抗流匹配（AFM）框架，针对端到端自动驾驶中Transformer模块的脆弱性，生成视觉不可察觉的对抗样本，实现高效、可迁移的攻击。
ai.motivation: 现有攻击方法要么需要完全模型透明（白盒），要么查询延迟高或迁移性差，而端到端自动驾驶模型普遍依赖Transformer，存在共享脆弱性。
ai.method: 利用神经平均速度场进行一步生成对抗样本，通过协同扰动生成潜空间和速度场实现不可察觉攻击。
ai.result: 在多种场景下显著降低VLA和模块化自动驾驶代理的性能，同时保持最先进的视觉不可察觉性，且对抗样本具有强跨模型迁移性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用Transformer结构脆弱性设计高效、不可察觉且可迁移的对抗攻击方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将对抗流匹配与扩散模型结合，探索在生成过程中动态调整扰动强度，以平衡攻击效果与不可察觉性。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击可能被用于恶意操控自动驾驶系统，导致安全事故；需注意防御措施的同步研究。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流匹配的连续生成过程出发，启发设计更平滑、更隐蔽的对抗扰动策略，或用于生成对抗训练数据。

idea_spark.risk: 攻击可能被用于恶意操控自动驾驶系统，导致安全事故；需注意防御措施的同步研究。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流匹配的连续生成过程出发，启发设计更平滑、更隐蔽的对抗扰动策略，或用于生成对抗训练数据。

en.tldr: Proposes Adversarial Flow Matching (AFM), a gray-box attack framework exploiting Transformer vulnerabilities in end-to-end autonomous driving, generating imperceptible adversarial examples with one-step efficiency and cross-model transferability.
en.motivation: Existing attacks require full model transparency (white-box) or suffer from high query latency or poor transferability; end-to-end AD models commonly rely on Transformers, creating a shared vulnerability.
en.method: Generates adversarial examples in one step via a neural average velocity field, synergistically perturbing the generative latent space and the velocity field for imperceptibility.
en.result: Significantly degrades performance of both VLA and modular AD agents across various scenarios while maintaining state-of-the-art visual imperceptibility; adversarial examples exhibit strong cross-model transferability.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to design efficient, imperceptible, and transferable adversarial attacks by exploiting Transformer structural vulnerabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adversarial flow matching with diffusion models to dynamically adjust perturbation strength during generation, balancing attack effectiveness and imperceptibility.
idea_spark.risk: Attacks could be maliciously used to manipulate autonomous driving systems, causing safety incidents; defensive measures should be studied concurrently.
idea_spark.inspiration: The continuous generation process of flow matching inspires smoother and more stealthy adversarial perturbation strategies, or for generating adversarial training data.

papers.title: FT-RAG: A Fine-grained Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Complex Table Reasoning
papers.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances Large Language Models (LLMs) by grounding responses in external knowledge during inference. However, conventiona RAG systems under-perform on structured tabular data, largely due to coarse retrieval granularity and insufficient table semantic comprehension. To address these limitations, we introduce FT-RAG, a fine-grained framework that employs knowledge association by decomposing tables into entry-level semantic units to construct a structured graph. FT-RAG employs a structural neighbor expansion mechanism to find semantically connected entities during graph retrieval, followed by multi-modal fusion to consolidate the context of table retrieval results. Further, to address the scarcity of specialized datasets in this domain, we introduce Multi-Table-RAG-Lib, a benchmark comprising 9870 QA pairs with high complexity and difficulty, curated to demand multi-table integration and text-table information fusion for reasoning. FT-RAG surpasses top-performing baselines across all metrics, achieving a 23.5\% and 59.2\% improvement in table-level and cell-level Hit Rates, respectively. Generation performance also sees a remarkable 62.2\% increase in exact value accuracy recall. These metrics verify the framework's effectiveness in factual grounding across both pure tabular and heterogeneous table-text contexts. Therefore, our method establishes a new state-of-the-art performance for complex reasoning over mixed-modality documents.

ai.tldr: 提出FT-RAG框架，通过将表格分解为条目级语义单元并构建结构图，结合结构邻居扩展与多模态融合，显著提升复杂表格推理的检索与生成性能。
ai.motivation: 传统RAG系统在处理结构化表格数据时表现不佳，主要由于检索粒度粗糙和表格语义理解不足。
ai.method: 将表格分解为条目级语义单元构建结构图，采用结构邻居扩展机制检索语义相连实体，并通过多模态融合整合表格检索上下文。
ai.result: 在表格级和单元格级命中率上分别提升23.5%和59.2%，生成准确率召回提升62.2%，在纯表格与异构表-文场景中均达到新SOTA。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更精准地从复杂表格中检索和生成事实性答案，尤其适用于需要跨表、表-文融合推理的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将表格语义单元与图神经网络结合，实现动态上下文扩展，可能进一步优化多跳推理。
idea_spark.risk: 图构建与邻居扩展的计算开销可能较大，需平衡效率与性能；对表格结构多样性（如嵌套表）的鲁棒性待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识图谱中实体链接与路径推理启发，将表格视为一种特殊的知识图进行检索增强。

zh.tldr: 提出FT-RAG框架，通过将表格分解为条目级语义单元并构建结构图，结合结构邻居扩展与多模态融合，显著提升复杂表格推理的检索与生成性能。
zh.motivation: 传统RAG系统在处理结构化表格数据时表现不佳，主要由于检索粒度粗糙和表格语义理解不足。
zh.method: 将表格分解为条目级语义单元构建结构图，采用结构邻居扩展机制检索语义相连实体，并通过多模态融合整合表格检索上下文。
zh.result: 在表格级和单元格级命中率上分别提升23.5%和59.2%，生成准确率召回提升62.2%，在纯表格与异构表-文场景中均达到新SOTA。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户更精准地从复杂表格中检索和生成事实性答案，尤其适用于需要跨表、表-文融合推理的场景。
